[index_revised_v24_13_larger_text_globe.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28604574/index_revised_v24_13_larger_text_globe.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>그렇다 — 불안을 가볍게 털어놓는 공간</title>
<style>
/* =========================================================
   모두가 말하기엔 애매하고, 혼자 두기엔 무거운 것들을
   가볍게 털어놓는 감성형 인터랙티브 웹사이트
   Single-file prototype / Pure HTML CSS JS
========================================================= */

:root {
  --bg: #05060A;
  --bg-deep: #020306;
  --ink: rgba(246, 246, 242, .92);
  --muted: rgba(226, 230, 238, .58);
  --soft: rgba(226, 230, 238, .28);
  --line: rgba(255,255,255,.105);
  --blue: rgba(154, 176, 204, .48);
  --panel: rgba(8, 10, 15, .58);
  --glass: rgba(9, 10, 14, .62);
}

* { box-sizing: border-box; }

html {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
  background: var(--bg);
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  min-height: 100vh;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  color: var(--ink);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%, rgba(108, 123, 151, .16), transparent 32rem),
    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 62%, rgba(85, 96, 120, .10), transparent 28rem),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #05060A 0%, #020306 52%, #05060A 100%);
  font-family:
    "Pretendard", "Noto Sans KR", "Apple SD Gothic Neo",
    "Malgun Gothic", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
}

/* 흐릿한 코드/데이터/스캔라인 배경 */
body::before {
  content: "";
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: -3;
  pointer-events: none;
  opacity: .22;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 94%, rgba(255,255,255,.035) 95% 96%, transparent 97%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.028) 0 1px, transparent 1px 13px),
    repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent 0 6px, rgba(255,255,255,.025) 7px);
  background-size: 180px 180px, 100% 14px, 100% 8px;
  animation: driftGrid 24s linear infinite;
}

body::after {
  content:
  "0110   worry   anxiety   archive   20252134   blank   0101\A"
  "불안     고민     무기력     미래     발표     과제     숨\A"
  "if (mind.heavy) { release(); }        data / trace / echo\A"
  "말하기엔 애매하고   혼자 두기엔 무거운 것들";
  white-space: pre;
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: -2;
  pointer-events: none;
  color: rgba(240, 245, 255, .065);
  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
  font-size: clamp(11px, 1.4vw, 18px);
  line-height: 3.6;
  letter-spacing: .12em;
  transform: rotate(-1.8deg) translateY(3vh);
  filter: blur(.4px);
  opacity: .82;
  animation: codeFloat 32s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
}

@keyframes driftGrid {
  from { background-position: 0 0, 0 0, 0 0; }
  to { background-position: 180px 100px, 0 80px, 0 40px; }
}

@keyframes codeFloat {
  from { transform: rotate(-1.8deg) translate(-1vw, 3vh); }
  to { transform: rotate(-1.2deg) translate(2vw, -2vh); }
}

a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
button, input { font: inherit; }

/* =========================================================
   Header — 배경과 분리되지 않도록 얇은 유리막 구조
========================================================= */
.site-header {
  position: fixed;
  top: 18px;
  left: 50%;
  width: min(1120px, calc(100% - 32px));
  height: 58px;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  z-index: 50;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 18px;
  padding: 0 18px;
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.055), rgba(255,255,255,.015)),
    rgba(5, 6, 10, .62);
  box-shadow:
    0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.36),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(130%);
}

.brand {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.brand-mark {
  width: 9px;
  height: 9px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.65);
  transform: rotate(45deg);
  box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(218,225,238,.22);
}

.brand-text {
  font-weight: 650;
  letter-spacing: .08em;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.82);
}

.nav-pill {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 5px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.035);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
}

.nav-pill a {
  position: relative;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  height: 34px;
  padding: 0 15px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: rgba(232, 236, 244, .58);
  font-size: 12px;
  letter-spacing: .03em;
  transition: color .25s ease, background .25s ease;
}

.nav-pill a:hover,
.nav-pill a.active {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.94);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.075);
}

.header-status {
  justify-self: end;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.45);
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: .12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.status-dot {
  width: 6px;
  height: 6px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(202, 218, 245, .62);
  box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(202, 218, 245, .35);
}

.scroll-progress {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 2px;
  width: 0%;
  z-index: 70;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(224,231,245,.72), transparent);
}

/* =========================================================
   공통 섹션
========================================================= */
.section {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 100svh;
  padding: 112px clamp(20px, 5vw, 72px);
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
}

.reveal {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(34px);
  filter: blur(10px);
  transition: opacity 1s ease, transform 1s ease, filter 1s ease;
}

.reveal.visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
  filter: blur(0);
}

.eyebrow {
  margin: 0 0 16px;
  color: rgba(222,228,240,.42);
  font-size: 12px;
  letter-spacing: .22em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.brush {
  font-family: "Nanum Myeongjo", "Batang", "GungSeo", serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -.06em;
  text-shadow: 0 0 26px rgba(255,255,255,.14);
}

/* =========================================================
   Home
========================================================= */
.hero {
  isolation: isolate;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.hero-inner {
  position: relative;
  width: min(1180px, 100%);
  min-height: calc(100svh - 160px);
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
}

.hero-copy {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 6;
  left: clamp(18px, 6vw, 76px);
  bottom: clamp(54px, 10vh, 110px);
  width: min(430px, 82vw);
  text-align: left;
}

.hero-copy .small {
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.50);
  font-size: clamp(14px, 1.15vw, 17px);
  line-height: 1.8;
}

.hero-title {
  margin: 0 0 20px;
  font-size: clamp(54px, 9vw, 132px);
  line-height: .86;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.92);
}

.hero-title span {
  display: block;
}

.statue-stage {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 1;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.statue-glow {
  position: absolute;
  width: min(56vw, 680px);
  height: min(56vw, 680px);
  border-radius: 50%;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle, rgba(230,235,245,.18), rgba(230,235,245,.04) 34%, transparent 68%);
  filter: blur(20px);
  transform: translateY(-8vh);
  animation: pulseGlow 7s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes pulseGlow {
  0%, 100% { opacity: .58; transform: translateY(-8vh) scale(.96); }
  50% { opacity: .9; transform: translateY(-9vh) scale(1.04); }
}

.statue-wrap {
  position: relative;
  width: min(58vw, 610px);
  height: min(88svh, 850px);
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  justify-content: center;
  transform: translateY(6vh);
  filter:
    drop-shadow(0 48px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.76))
    drop-shadow(0 0 46px rgba(224,231,245,.08));
}

.statue-wrap::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: -10%;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 14%, rgba(180,190,210,.08) 48%, transparent 82%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 30%, rgba(255,255,255,.08), transparent 50%);
  mix-blend-mode: screen;
  filter: blur(18px);
}

.statue-img {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  height: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
  object-fit: contain;
  object-position: center bottom;
  opacity: .96;
  -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, black 0%, black 76%, rgba(0,0,0,.72) 88%, transparent 100%);
  mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, black 0%, black 76%, rgba(0,0,0,.72) 88%, transparent 100%);
}

.hero-vignette {
  position: absolute;
  inset: -4px;
  z-index: 4;
  pointer-events: none;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 0 44%, rgba(0,0,0,.52) 75%, #05060A 100%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(5,6,10,.4) 0%, transparent 24%, rgba(5,6,10,.92) 100%);
}

.cta-row {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 8;
  top: 52%;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.cta-link {
  pointer-events: auto;
  width: min(260px, 28vw);
  min-height: 112px;
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
  align-content: center;
  padding: 20px 22px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  border-radius: 22px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.055), rgba(255,255,255,.015)),
    rgba(1,2,5,.40);
  box-shadow: 0 30px 70px rgba(0,0,0,.36);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  transition: transform .35s ease, border-color .35s ease, background .35s ease;
}

.cta-link:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.28);
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.085), rgba(255,255,255,.022)),
    rgba(3,4,9,.54);
}

.cta-right { text-align: right; }

.cta-kicker {
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.42);
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: .16em;
}

.cta-phrase {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 5px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.88);
  font-size: clamp(17px, 1.7vw, 24px);
  font-weight: 650;
  line-height: 1.15;
}

.cta-right .cta-phrase {
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.phrase-piece {
  display: inline-block;
  transition: transform .55s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1), opacity .55s ease, filter .55s ease;
}

.cta-release:hover .phrase-piece:nth-child(1) { transform: translate(-10px, -5px) rotate(-3deg); opacity: .82; }
.cta-release:hover .phrase-piece:nth-child(2) { transform: translate(8px, 3px) rotate(2deg); opacity: .72; }
.cta-release:hover .phrase-piece:nth-child(3) { transform: translate(-2px, 9px) rotate(-1deg); opacity: .62; filter: blur(.35px); }

.cta-gather .phrase-piece:nth-child(1) { transform: translate(-9px, 4px); opacity: .64; }
.cta-gather .phrase-piece:nth-child(2) { transform: translate(9px, -5px); opacity: .66; }
.cta-gather .phrase-piece:nth-child(3) { transform: translate(-3px, 8px); opacity: .68; }
.cta-gather:hover .phrase-piece { transform: translate(0,0) rotate(0); opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); }

.scroll-hint {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 8;
  right: clamp(18px, 5vw, 72px);
  bottom: 42px;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.38);
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: .18em;
  writing-mode: vertical-rl;
}

.scroll-hint::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 1px;
  height: 54px;
  margin: 12px auto 0;
  background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(255,255,255,.35), transparent);
}

/* =========================================================
   Scroll Statement
========================================================= */
.statement {
  min-height: 72svh;
}

.statement-box {
  width: min(860px, 100%);
  text-align: center;
}

.statement-box h2 {
  margin: 0 0 22px;
  font-size: clamp(28px, 5vw, 72px);
  line-height: 1.12;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
}

.statement-box p {
  margin: 0 auto;
  max-width: 680px;
  color: rgba(228,233,244,.58);
  font-size: clamp(15px, 1.4vw, 19px);
  line-height: 2;
}

/* =========================================================
   Emotion Space
========================================================= */
.emotion {
  align-items: stretch;
  padding-bottom: 96px;
}

.section-head {
  width: min(1120px, 100%);
  margin: 0 auto 24px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: end;
  gap: 20px;
}

.section-head h2 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: clamp(32px, 5vw, 74px);
  line-height: 1;
}

.section-head p {
  margin: 0;
  width: min(430px, 100%);
  color: rgba(226,230,238,.53);
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.75;
}

.emotion-stage {
  position: relative;
  width: min(1120px, 100%);
  height: min(72svh, 680px);
  min-height: 500px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  border-radius: 34px;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 30%, rgba(230,235,245,.055), transparent 34rem),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.035), rgba(255,255,255,.008)),
    rgba(2,3,6,.66);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 120px rgba(0,0,0,.64), 0 40px 90px rgba(0,0,0,.36);
  cursor: crosshair;
}

.emotion-stage::before {
  content: "정리하지 않아도 됩니다. 문장이 아니어도 괜찮습니다.";
  position: absolute;
  left: 30px;
  top: 28px;
  z-index: 3;
  max-width: 330px;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.28);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.7;
  pointer-events: none;
}

#drawCanvas {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 1;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
}

#emotionLayer {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 2;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.emotion-note {
  position: absolute;
  max-width: min(520px, 78%);
  padding: 14px 18px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius: 18px;
  color: rgba(248,248,245,.9);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.035);
  box-shadow: 0 24px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.18);
  font-size: var(--note-size);
  font-weight: var(--note-weight);
  line-height: 1.55;
  letter-spacing: -.025em;
  transform: rotate(var(--rotate));
  opacity: var(--op);
  animation: noteAppear .7s ease both;
}

.emotion-chip {
  position: absolute;
  color: rgba(224,230,242,.56);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09);
  font-size: var(--chip-size);
  letter-spacing: -.02em;
  opacity: .74;
  transform: rotate(var(--rotate));
  animation: chipFloat 8s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes noteAppear {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px) rotate(var(--rotate)); filter: blur(8px); }
  to { opacity: var(--op); transform: translateY(0) rotate(var(--rotate)); filter: blur(0); }
}

@keyframes chipFloat {
  0%,100% { translate: 0 0; }
  50% { translate: 0 -9px; }
}

.emotion-controls {
  width: min(1120px, 100%);
  margin: 18px auto 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto;
  gap: 12px;
}

.emotion-input {
  height: 56px;
  padding: 0 20px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.045);
  outline: none;
  transition: border-color .25s ease, background .25s ease;
}

.emotion-input:focus {
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.28);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.07);
}

.control-buttons {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
}

.control-buttons button {
  height: 56px;
  padding: 0 20px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.13);
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.76);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.055);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: transform .2s ease, background .2s ease, color .2s ease;
}

.control-buttons button:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.11);
  color: #fff;
}

/* =========================================================
   Shared Feelings
========================================================= */
.cloud {
  align-items: stretch;
}

.cloud-stage {
  position: relative;
  width: min(1120px, 100%);
  min-height: min(74svh, 700px);
  margin: 0 auto;
  border-radius: 34px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);
  overflow: hidden;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 70% 24%, rgba(210,220,240,.08), transparent 28rem),
    radial-gradient(circle at 20% 72%, rgba(120,150,190,.08), transparent 24rem),
    rgba(3,4,8,.62);
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 90px rgba(0,0,0,.55);
}

.cloud-stage::before {
  content: "나만\A그런 게\A아니었다";
  white-space: pre;
  position: absolute;
  left: clamp(22px, 4vw, 52px);
  top: clamp(22px, 4vw, 48px);
  z-index: 2;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.88);
  font-family: "Nanum Myeongjo", "Batang", serif;
  font-size: clamp(34px, 7vw, 96px);
  line-height: 1.08;
  letter-spacing: -.08em;
  text-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(255,255,255,.12);
}

#cloudWords {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 3;
}

.cloud-word {
  position: absolute;
  display: inline-block;
  padding: .12em .24em;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.76);
  line-height: 1.05;
  font-weight: 640;
  letter-spacing: -.04em;
  text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  animation: cloudFloat var(--dur) ease-in-out infinite;
}

.cloud-word.major {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
}

.cloud-word.phrase {
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.035);
  letter-spacing: -.02em;
}

@keyframes cloudFloat {
  0%,100% { transform: translate(0,0) rotate(var(--rot)); }
  50% { transform: translate(0,-12px) rotate(var(--rot)); }
}

.cloud-note {
  position: absolute;
  left: clamp(22px, 4vw, 52px);
  bottom: clamp(22px, 4vw, 44px);
  z-index: 4;
  width: min(570px, calc(100% - 44px));
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.52);
  font-size: 15px;
  line-height: 1.8;
}

/* =========================================================
   About
========================================================= */
.about {
  min-height: 88svh;
}

.about-card {
  width: min(920px, 100%);
  padding: clamp(30px, 6vw, 70px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.11);
  border-radius: 34px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.055), rgba(255,255,255,.014)),
    rgba(3,4,8,.62);
  box-shadow: 0 40px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.34);
}

.about-card h2 {
  margin: 0 0 26px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
  font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 72px);
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.about-card p {
  margin: 0 0 14px;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.62);
  font-size: clamp(15px, 1.2vw, 18px);
  line-height: 1.9;
}

.about-card strong {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.88);
  font-weight: 650;
}

.toast {
  position: fixed;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: 28px;
  z-index: 80;
  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(20px);
  opacity: 0;
  padding: 12px 18px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.82);
  background: rgba(3,4,8,.72);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  transition: opacity .25s ease, transform .25s ease;
}

.toast.show {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0);
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .site-header {
    top: 10px;
    width: calc(100% - 20px);
    height: auto;
    min-height: 58px;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 10px 12px;
    border-radius: 24px;
  }

  .brand, .header-status { display: none; }

  .nav-pill {
    justify-content: center;
    overflow-x: auto;
  }

  .nav-pill a {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    height: 32px;
    padding: 0 11px;
    font-size: 11px;
  }

  .section { padding: 112px 18px 72px; }

  .hero-inner {
    min-height: calc(100svh - 130px);
  }

  .statue-wrap {
    width: min(106vw, 560px);
    height: min(76svh, 690px);
    transform: translateY(1vh);
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(46px, 20vw, 86px);
  }

  .hero-copy {
    left: 18px;
    bottom: 112px;
    width: calc(100% - 36px);
  }

  .hero-copy .small {
    max-width: 310px;
    font-size: 13px;
  }

  .cta-row {
    top: auto;
    bottom: 24px;
    transform: none;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .cta-link {
    width: calc(50% - 5px);
    min-height: 82px;
    padding: 14px;
    border-radius: 18px;
  }

  .cta-kicker { font-size: 9px; }
  .cta-phrase { font-size: 15px; }

  .scroll-hint { display: none; }

  .section-head {
    display: block;
  }

  .section-head p {
    margin-top: 16px;
  }

  .emotion-stage {
    min-height: 520px;
    border-radius: 24px;
  }

  .emotion-controls {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .control-buttons button {
    flex: 1;
  }

  .control-buttons {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .cloud-stage {
    min-height: 660px;
    border-radius: 24px;
  }

  .cloud-stage::before {
    font-size: clamp(42px, 15vw, 72px);
  }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  * { animation: none !important; transition: none !important; scroll-behavior: auto !important; }
}

/* =========================================================
   Requested revision: first screen spacing, quiet header, subtle links
========================================================= */

/* 불필요한 장식 요소 제거 */
.scroll-progress,
.brand,
.header-status,
.scroll-hint {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 상단 메뉴: 별도 박스 없이 배경 위에 존재하는 느낌 */
.site-header {
  position: fixed;
  top: 26px;
  left: 50%;
  width: auto;
  height: auto;
  min-height: 0;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  z-index: 60;
  display: block;
  padding: 0;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 0;
  background: transparent;
  box-shadow: none;
  backdrop-filter: none;
  transition: transform .42s ease, opacity .42s ease, filter .42s ease;
}

.site-header.header-hidden {
  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-46px);
  opacity: 0;
  filter: blur(8px);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.nav-line {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: clamp(10px, 1.8vw, 26px);
  color: rgba(235, 238, 246, .62);
  font-size: clamp(11px, .95vw, 14px);
  letter-spacing: .03em;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(0,0,0,.9);
}

.nav-line a {
  position: relative;
  display: inline-block;
  color: rgba(235, 238, 246, .58);
  padding: 4px 0;
  transition: color .24s ease, opacity .24s ease;
}

.nav-line a::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: -5px;
  width: 0;
  height: 1px;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.46);
  transition: width .24s ease;
}

.nav-line a:hover,
.nav-line a.active {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
}

.nav-line a:hover::after,
.nav-line a.active::after {
  width: 100%;
}

.nav-sep {
  color: rgba(235,238,246,.22);
  user-select: none;
}

/* 첫 화면 텍스트: 조각상/버튼과 겹치지 않게 손 위쪽 중앙으로 이동 */
.hero-copy {
  top: clamp(72px, 10vh, 118px);
  left: 50%;
  bottom: auto;
  width: min(560px, calc(100% - 48px));
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  text-align: center;
  z-index: 9;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.hero-title {
  margin: 0 0 12px;
  font-size: clamp(30px, 4.8vw, 58px);
  line-height: .95;
  letter-spacing: -.08em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
}

.hero-title span {
  display: inline;
}

.hero-title span + span::before {
  content: " ";
}

.hero-copy .small {
  margin: 0 auto;
  max-width: 480px;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.50);
  font-size: clamp(12px, 1.05vw, 15px);
  line-height: 1.72;
}

.hero-copy .small p {
  margin: 3px 0;
}

/* 조각상과 텍스트 간격 확보 */
.statue-wrap {
  transform: translateY(9vh);
  width: min(56vw, 600px);
  height: min(84svh, 820px);
}

/* 좌우 이동 버튼: 버튼 박스 느낌 제거, 문장 링크처럼 */
.cta-row {
  top: 58%;
  padding: 0 clamp(18px, 3.6vw, 46px);
}

.cta-link {
  width: auto;
  min-height: 0;
  padding: 12px 0;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 0;
  background: transparent;
  box-shadow: none;
  backdrop-filter: none;
  color: rgba(232,236,244,.66);
}

.cta-link:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  border-color: transparent;
  background: transparent;
}

.cta-kicker {
  display: none;
}

.cta-phrase {
  position: relative;
  display: inline-flex;
  gap: 6px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.72);
  font-size: clamp(16px, 1.45vw, 22px);
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: -.02em;
  text-shadow: 0 0 26px rgba(0,0,0,.82);
}

.cta-phrase::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: -9px;
  height: 1px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,.34), transparent);
  transform: scaleX(.55);
  opacity: .55;
  transition: transform .35s ease, opacity .35s ease;
}

.cta-link:hover .cta-phrase::after {
  transform: scaleX(1);
  opacity: .88;
}

/* 첫 화면의 잡다한 레이어 텍스트를 줄이고 선/노이즈만 남김 */
body::after {
  content: "";
  opacity: .22;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 82%, rgba(255,255,255,.035) 83%, transparent 84%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0 92%, rgba(255,255,255,.025) 93%, transparent 94%);
  background-size: 260px 180px;
}

/* 모바일 정리 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .site-header {
    top: 18px;
    width: calc(100% - 26px);
  }

  .nav-line {
    gap: 8px;
    overflow-x: auto;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 10.5px;
    scrollbar-width: none;
  }

  .nav-line::-webkit-scrollbar {
    display: none;
  }

  .hero-copy {
    top: 74px;
    width: calc(100% - 32px);
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(28px, 9vw, 42px);
  }

  .hero-copy .small {
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.55;
  }

  .statue-wrap {
    width: min(108vw, 560px);
    height: min(72svh, 660px);
    transform: translateY(9vh);
  }

  .cta-row {
    top: auto;
    bottom: 42px;
    padding: 0 20px;
  }

  .cta-link {
    width: auto;
    min-height: 0;
    padding: 8px 0;
  }

  .cta-phrase {
    font-size: 13.5px;
    gap: 4px;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   Requested revision v3:
   - 상단 메뉴 더 크게, 간격 넓게
   - 첫 화면에는 "모두가 그렇다"만 손 위 중앙에 작게
   - 좌우 이동 텍스트 더 크게
========================================================= */

.site-header {
  top: 30px;
}

.nav-line {
  gap: clamp(18px, 3.2vw, 48px);
  font-size: clamp(14px, 1.22vw, 18px);
  letter-spacing: .045em;
}

.nav-line a {
  color: rgba(238, 241, 248, .68);
}

.nav-sep {
  color: rgba(238, 241, 248, .28);
}

/* 첫 화면 중앙 문구: 손 위에 작게 */
.hero-copy {
  top: clamp(92px, 12.5vh, 145px);
  left: 50%;
  width: min(420px, calc(100% - 48px));
  text-align: center;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  z-index: 12;
}

.hero-title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: clamp(24px, 3.1vw, 40px);
  line-height: 1;
  letter-spacing: -.07em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.88);
  text-shadow:
    0 0 22px rgba(255,255,255,.14),
    0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.86);
}

.hero-title span {
  display: inline;
}

.hero-title span + span::before {
  content: " ";
}

/* 기존 설명 문장 숨김 */
.hero-copy .small {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 좌우 텍스트형 버튼: 더 크게 */
.cta-row {
  top: 57%;
  padding: 0 clamp(24px, 5vw, 82px);
}

.cta-phrase {
  gap: 9px;
  font-size: clamp(24px, 2.55vw, 42px);
  font-weight: 520;
  letter-spacing: -.04em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.78);
}

.cta-phrase::after {
  bottom: -13px;
  transform: scaleX(.48);
}

.cta-link:hover .cta-phrase {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.94);
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .site-header {
    top: 18px;
    width: calc(100% - 22px);
  }

  .nav-line {
    gap: 12px;
    font-size: 12px;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    padding: 0 4px;
  }

  .hero-copy {
    top: clamp(82px, 13vh, 120px);
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(22px, 7vw, 32px);
  }

  .cta-row {
    bottom: 48px;
    padding: 0 22px;
  }

  .cta-phrase {
    gap: 5px;
    font-size: clamp(17px, 4.5vw, 24px);
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   Requested revision v4:
   - 상단 메뉴 간격 더 넓힘
   - "모두가 그렇다"는 직전 버전의 크기/위치감으로 롤백
   - 좌우 텍스트 링크는 2줄 배치
   - 베젤/패널 배경을 홈페이지 배경과 통일
========================================================= */

/* 상단 메뉴 간격 더 넓게 */
.site-header {
  top: 31px;
}

.nav-line {
  gap: clamp(28px, 4.8vw, 74px);
  font-size: clamp(14px, 1.22vw, 18px);
}

.nav-sep {
  margin: 0 clamp(2px, .45vw, 10px);
}

/* 모두가 그렇다: v2의 손 위 중앙 배치/크기감으로 롤백 */
.hero-copy {
  top: clamp(72px, 10vh, 118px);
  left: 50%;
  bottom: auto;
  width: min(560px, calc(100% - 48px));
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  text-align: center;
  z-index: 12;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.hero-title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: clamp(30px, 4.8vw, 58px);
  line-height: .95;
  letter-spacing: -.08em;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
  text-shadow:
    0 0 26px rgba(255,255,255,.14),
    0 14px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.88);
}

.hero-title span {
  display: inline;
}

.hero-title span + span::before {
  content: " ";
}

/* 설명 문장은 계속 숨김: 첫 화면은 모두가 그렇다만 유지 */
.hero-copy .small {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 좌우 링크 2줄 배치 */
.cta-row {
  top: 58%;
  padding: 0 clamp(28px, 5.8vw, 96px);
}

.cta-phrase {
  display: inline-flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 4px;
  font-size: clamp(26px, 2.7vw, 46px);
  line-height: 1.02;
  font-weight: 520;
  letter-spacing: -.045em;
}

.cta-right .cta-phrase {
  align-items: flex-end;
}

.phrase-line {
  display: inline-flex;
  gap: 10px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.cta-release:hover .phrase-piece:nth-child(1),
.cta-release:hover .phrase-piece:nth-child(2),
.cta-release:hover .phrase-piece:nth-child(3) {
  opacity: .78;
}

.cta-phrase::after {
  bottom: -14px;
}

/* 베젤/패널 배경: 홈페이지 배경과 같은 검은 톤으로 통일 */
.emotion-stage,
.cloud-stage,
.about-card {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%, rgba(108, 123, 151, .12), transparent 32rem),
    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 62%, rgba(85, 96, 120, .075), transparent 28rem),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #05060A 0%, #020306 52%, #05060A 100%) !important;
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.085);
}

.emotion-input,
.control-buttons button,
.emotion-note,
.cloud-word.phrase {
  background: rgba(5, 6, 10, .34) !important;
}

/* 모바일에서는 메뉴 간격이 너무 벌어지지 않게 스크롤형 유지 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .site-header {
    top: 18px;
    width: calc(100% - 22px);
  }

  .nav-line {
    gap: 16px;
    font-size: 12px;
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }

  .nav-sep {
    margin: 0 1px;
  }

  .hero-copy {
    top: clamp(76px, 12vh, 116px);
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(27px, 8.2vw, 40px);
  }

  .cta-row {
    bottom: 45px;
    padding: 0 22px;
  }

  .cta-phrase {
    font-size: clamp(20px, 5.8vw, 30px);
    gap: 3px;
  }

  .phrase-line {
    gap: 6px;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   Requested revision v5:
   - 베젤/패널 거의 제거, 화면 크게 사용
   - "모두가 그렇다" 아래 작은 문장 롤백
   - 조각상 하단/발 부분까지 어둠 패널과 자연스럽게 연결
========================================================= */

/* 첫 화면 문구 + 설명 문장 복구 */
.hero-copy {
  top: clamp(72px, 9.4vh, 112px);
  width: min(620px, calc(100% - 48px));
}

.hero-title {
  margin: 0 0 12px;
  font-size: clamp(30px, 4.6vw, 56px);
}

.hero-copy .small {
  display: block !important;
  margin: 0 auto;
  max-width: 520px;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.50);
  font-size: clamp(12px, 1.05vw, 15px);
  line-height: 1.68;
  text-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.9);
}

.hero-copy .small p {
  margin: 2px 0;
}

/* 조각상 하단이 끊겨 보이지 않도록 발 아래까지 어둠과 연결 */
.statue-wrap {
  width: min(60vw, 640px);
  height: min(92svh, 900px);
  transform: translateY(11vh);
  overflow: visible;
}

.statue-img {
  -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, black 0%, black 83%, rgba(0,0,0,.92) 92%, rgba(0,0,0,.22) 98%, transparent 100%);
  mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, black 0%, black 83%, rgba(0,0,0,.92) 92%, rgba(0,0,0,.22) 98%, transparent 100%);
}

.statue-wrap::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 3;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: -7vh;
  width: min(118vw, 1180px);
  height: 34vh;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  pointer-events: none;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at center top, rgba(5,6,10,.18) 0%, rgba(5,6,10,.72) 48%, #05060A 82%, #05060A 100%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, #05060A 68%);
}

.hero-vignette {
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 0 48%, rgba(0,0,0,.46) 78%, #05060A 100%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(5,6,10,.26) 0%, transparent 30%, rgba(5,6,10,.98) 100%);
}

/* 베젤/패널 제거: 배경과 완전히 같은 면으로 보이게 */
.emotion {
  padding-left: clamp(12px, 2.2vw, 36px);
  padding-right: clamp(12px, 2.2vw, 36px);
}

.emotion-stage,
.cloud-stage {
  width: min(1440px, 96vw);
  border: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  outline: 0;
}

.emotion-stage {
  height: min(78svh, 760px);
  min-height: 560px;
}

.cloud-stage {
  width: min(1440px, 96vw);
  min-height: min(80svh, 760px);
}

/* About은 카드 느낌을 크게 약화하고 선만 아주 희미하게 */
.about-card {
  width: min(1120px, 94vw);
  border: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  padding-left: clamp(18px, 5vw, 70px);
  padding-right: clamp(18px, 5vw, 70px);
}

/* 패널 제거 후에도 기능 영역은 알아볼 수 있게 아주 약한 내부 기준선만 남김 */
.emotion-stage::after,
.cloud-stage::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.055);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  opacity: .72;
}

.emotion-stage::before {
  left: 10px;
  top: 8px;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.22);
}

/* 입력창/버튼도 패널과 분리되는 흰색 박스 느낌 약화 */
.emotion-input,
.control-buttons button {
  background: transparent !important;
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.10);
}

.emotion-input:focus {
  background: transparent !important;
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.24);
}

/* 섹션 헤더도 큰 화면 폭에 맞춤 */
.section-head,
.emotion-controls {
  width: min(1440px, 96vw);
}

.cloud-note {
  left: clamp(8px, 2vw, 28px);
  bottom: clamp(18px, 3vw, 34px);
}

.cloud-stage::before {
  left: clamp(8px, 2.2vw, 34px);
  top: clamp(16px, 3vw, 38px);
}

/* 모바일 조정 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .hero-copy {
    top: clamp(70px, 11vh, 104px);
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(27px, 8vw, 38px);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }

  .hero-copy .small {
    font-size: 11.5px;
    line-height: 1.52;
    max-width: 310px;
  }

  .statue-wrap {
    width: min(112vw, 590px);
    height: min(78svh, 690px);
    transform: translateY(10vh);
  }

  .statue-wrap::after {
    bottom: -5vh;
    height: 28vh;
  }

  .emotion-stage {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 560px;
    height: 74svh;
  }

  .cloud-stage {
    width: 100%;
    min-height: 700px;
  }

  .section-head,
  .emotion-controls {
    width: 100%;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   Requested revision v6:
   - 전체 화면을 훨씬 크게 사용
   - 섹션 좌우 여백 최소화
   - 감정 공간/키워드 공간을 거의 풀스크린으로 확장
   - 조각상과 좌우 텍스트도 화면 안에서 더 크게 사용
========================================================= */

.section {
  padding-left: clamp(8px, 1.2vw, 22px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(8px, 1.2vw, 22px) !important;
}

.hero-inner {
  width: 100vw !important;
  min-height: calc(100svh - 40px) !important;
}

.statue-wrap {
  width: min(72vw, 820px) !important;
  height: min(98svh, 980px) !important;
  transform: translateY(10vh) !important;
}

.statue-glow {
  width: min(72vw, 820px) !important;
  height: min(72vw, 820px) !important;
}

.hero-copy {
  top: clamp(66px, 8.2vh, 96px) !important;
}

.cta-row {
  top: 58% !important;
  padding-left: clamp(10px, 2.2vw, 34px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(10px, 2.2vw, 34px) !important;
}

.cta-phrase {
  font-size: clamp(34px, 3.6vw, 64px) !important;
  line-height: .98 !important;
}

/* 섹션 헤더도 화면 끝에 더 가깝게 */
.section-head,
.emotion-controls {
  width: min(1760px, 99vw) !important;
}

/* 감정 입력 공간: 거의 전체 화면 */
.emotion {
  padding-top: 84px !important;
  padding-bottom: 42px !important;
}

.emotion-stage {
  width: 99vw !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  height: 82svh !important;
  min-height: 680px !important;
  margin-left: calc(50% - 49.5vw) !important;
  margin-right: calc(50% - 49.5vw) !important;
}

/* 함께 남은 감정: 거의 전체 화면 */
.cloud {
  padding-top: 84px !important;
  padding-bottom: 42px !important;
}

.cloud-stage {
  width: 99vw !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  min-height: 84svh !important;
  margin-left: calc(50% - 49.5vw) !important;
  margin-right: calc(50% - 49.5vw) !important;
}

/* About도 카드 폭 제한을 줄이고 넓게 */
.about-card {
  width: min(1500px, 98vw) !important;
  padding-left: clamp(12px, 3vw, 48px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(12px, 3vw, 48px) !important;
}

/* 하단 선도 전체 폭에 맞춰 아주 약하게만 */
.emotion-stage::after,
.cloud-stage::after {
  border-top-color: rgba(255,255,255,.035) !important;
  border-bottom-color: rgba(255,255,255,.03) !important;
}

/* 모바일에서도 공간을 더 크게 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .section {
    padding-left: 8px !important;
    padding-right: 8px !important;
  }

  .statue-wrap {
    width: min(126vw, 680px) !important;
    height: min(82svh, 740px) !important;
    transform: translateY(11vh) !important;
  }

  .cta-row {
    padding-left: 14px !important;
    padding-right: 14px !important;
  }

  .cta-phrase {
    font-size: clamp(25px, 7.2vw, 38px) !important;
  }

  .emotion-stage,
  .cloud-stage {
    width: 100vw !important;
    margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw) !important;
    margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw) !important;
  }

  .emotion-stage {
    height: 78svh !important;
    min-height: 650px !important;
  }

  .cloud-stage {
    min-height: 78svh !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   Requested revision v7:
   - v6보다 살짝 축소해서 화면 밖으로 나가지 않게 조정
   - 좌우 CTA 텍스트 안전 영역 확보
   - 전체 폰트/자간/행간 정돈
========================================================= */

/* 전체 폰트 품질 조정 */
body {
  font-family:
    "Pretendard Variable", "Pretendard",
    "SUIT Variable", "SUIT",
    "Noto Sans KR",
    "Apple SD Gothic Neo",
    "Malgun Gothic",
    system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif !important;
  font-weight: 400;
  letter-spacing: -.015em;
  word-break: keep-all;
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

/* 감성 타이틀용 폰트: 너무 장식적이지 않게 정리 */
.brush,
.hero-title,
.statement-box h2,
.section-head h2,
.cloud-stage::before,
.about-card h2 {
  font-family:
    "Nanum Myeongjo",
    "Noto Serif KR",
    "Batang",
    "AppleMyungjo",
    serif !important;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -.075em;
}

/* 화면 사용량: v6보다 조금 줄여서 안정화 */
.section {
  padding-left: clamp(16px, 2.2vw, 42px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(16px, 2.2vw, 42px) !important;
}

.hero-inner {
  width: min(1500px, 96vw) !important;
  min-height: calc(100svh - 56px) !important;
}

.statue-wrap {
  width: min(64vw, 720px) !important;
  height: min(92svh, 900px) !important;
  transform: translateY(10vh) !important;
}

.statue-glow {
  width: min(64vw, 720px) !important;
  height: min(64vw, 720px) !important;
}

/* 첫 화면 중앙 텍스트 */
.hero-copy {
  top: clamp(70px, 8.8vh, 105px) !important;
  width: min(600px, calc(100vw - 48px)) !important;
}

.hero-title {
  font-size: clamp(30px, 4.2vw, 52px) !important;
  line-height: 1.02 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.08em !important;
}

.hero-copy .small {
  max-width: min(520px, calc(100vw - 64px)) !important;
  font-size: clamp(12px, 1vw, 14.5px) !important;
  line-height: 1.62 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.015em !important;
}

/* 좌우 CTA: 화면 밖으로 나가지 않게 크기 축소 + 안전 폭 지정 */
.cta-row {
  top: 58% !important;
  padding-left: clamp(28px, 4.2vw, 72px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(28px, 4.2vw, 72px) !important;
  gap: 20px !important;
}

.cta-link {
  max-width: min(34vw, 420px) !important;
}

.cta-phrase {
  font-family:
    "Pretendard Variable", "Pretendard",
    "SUIT Variable", "SUIT",
    "Noto Sans KR",
    "Apple SD Gothic Neo",
    "Malgun Gothic",
    system-ui, sans-serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(28px, 3.0vw, 50px) !important;
  line-height: 1.05 !important;
  font-weight: 560 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.055em !important;
}

.phrase-line {
  max-width: 100%;
  gap: clamp(6px, .7vw, 12px) !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.cta-right .phrase-line {
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

/* 섹션 영역: 크게 쓰되 과하게 꽉 차지 않게 */
.section-head,
.emotion-controls {
  width: min(1540px, 96vw) !important;
}

.emotion-stage {
  width: min(1540px, 96vw) !important;
  height: min(78svh, 760px) !important;
  min-height: 620px !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
}

.cloud-stage {
  width: min(1540px, 96vw) !important;
  min-height: min(78svh, 760px) !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
}

/* 본문 타이포그래피 */
.section-head h2 {
  font-size: clamp(34px, 4.7vw, 70px) !important;
  line-height: 1.05 !important;
}

.section-head p,
.about-card p,
.statement-box p,
.cloud-note {
  font-size: clamp(14px, 1.05vw, 17px) !important;
  line-height: 1.82 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.015em !important;
}

.eyebrow {
  font-family:
    "Pretendard Variable", "Pretendard",
    "SUIT Variable", "SUIT",
    "Noto Sans KR", sans-serif !important;
  font-size: 11px !important;
  font-weight: 520 !important;
  letter-spacing: .18em !important;
}

/* 키워드 클라우드도 과하게 커지지 않게 */
.cloud-word {
  max-width: min(38vw, 560px);
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  word-break: keep-all;
}

/* 모바일 안전 조정 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .section {
    padding-left: 14px !important;
    padding-right: 14px !important;
  }

  .hero-inner {
    width: 100% !important;
  }

  .statue-wrap {
    width: min(112vw, 610px) !important;
    height: min(77svh, 700px) !important;
    transform: translateY(10vh) !important;
  }

  .hero-copy {
    top: clamp(74px, 11vh, 104px) !important;
    width: calc(100vw - 36px) !important;
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(27px, 7.6vw, 38px) !important;
  }

  .hero-copy .small {
    max-width: 330px !important;
    font-size: 11.5px !important;
    line-height: 1.5 !important;
  }

  .cta-row {
    bottom: 42px !important;
    padding-left: 18px !important;
    padding-right: 18px !important;
    gap: 12px !important;
  }

  .cta-link {
    max-width: calc(50vw - 26px) !important;
  }

  .cta-phrase {
    font-size: clamp(20px, 5.6vw, 30px) !important;
    line-height: 1.08 !important;
  }

  .phrase-line {
    gap: 5px !important;
  }

  .emotion-stage,
  .cloud-stage {
    width: 100% !important;
    margin-left: auto !important;
    margin-right: auto !important;
  }

  .emotion-stage {
    height: 74svh !important;
    min-height: 600px !important;
  }

  .cloud-stage {
    min-height: 74svh !important;
  }

  .section-head h2 {
    font-size: clamp(31px, 9vw, 52px) !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   Requested revision v8:
   - 첫 페이지 폰트 위계 대/중/소 확실히 구분
   - 조각상 이미지 더 크게 사용
   - 허벅지 부근에서 서서히 사라지는 마스크
   - 스크롤 시 조각상이 어둠으로 더 녹아드는 효과
========================================================= */

:root {
  --heroScroll: 0;
}

/* 첫 페이지 위계: 제목은 크게, 설명은 작게, 좌우 이동 문구는 중간 */
.hero-copy {
  top: clamp(64px, 7.6vh, 92px) !important;
  width: min(720px, calc(100vw - 48px)) !important;
}

.hero-title {
  margin: 0 0 14px !important;
  font-size: clamp(44px, 6.8vw, 94px) !important;
  line-height: .9 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.105em !important;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.92) !important;
  text-shadow:
    0 0 34px rgba(255,255,255,.13),
    0 18px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.94) !important;
}

.hero-copy .small {
  max-width: min(560px, calc(100vw - 70px)) !important;
  font-size: clamp(11px, .88vw, 13.5px) !important;
  line-height: 1.72 !important;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.46) !important;
  letter-spacing: -.02em !important;
}

.hero-copy .small p {
  margin: 1px 0 !important;
}

/* 좌우 CTA는 제목보다 확실히 작지만 존재감 있게 */
.cta-row {
  top: 59% !important;
  padding-left: clamp(34px, 5vw, 82px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(34px, 5vw, 82px) !important;
}

.cta-phrase {
  font-size: clamp(26px, 2.65vw, 46px) !important;
  line-height: 1.04 !important;
  font-weight: 520 !important;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.72) !important;
}

.cta-link {
  max-width: min(32vw, 390px) !important;
}

/* 조각상 더 크게, 하단은 허벅지 부근에서 사라지게 */
.statue-stage {
  transform: translateY(calc(var(--heroScroll) * -18px));
}

.statue-wrap {
  width: min(75vw, 900px) !important;
  height: min(105svh, 1060px) !important;
  transform:
    translateY(calc(16vh + (var(--heroScroll) * -4vh)))
    scale(calc(1 + (var(--heroScroll) * .035))) !important;
  opacity: calc(1 - (var(--heroScroll) * .18));
  transition: opacity .08s linear;
}

.statue-img {
  object-fit: contain !important;
  object-position: center top !important;
  /* 0~62%는 선명, 70%부터 허벅지 근처로 사라짐 */
  -webkit-mask-image:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      black 0%,
      black 58%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.82) 64%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.35) 70%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.08) 76%,
      transparent 82%
    ) !important;
  mask-image:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      black 0%,
      black 58%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.82) 64%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.35) 70%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.08) 76%,
      transparent 82%
    ) !important;
}

.statue-wrap::after {
  bottom: 3vh !important;
  height: 44vh !important;
  width: min(130vw, 1380px) !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at center top, rgba(5,6,10,.06) 0%, rgba(5,6,10,.52) 36%, #05060A 74%, #05060A 100%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(5,6,10,.72) 28%, #05060A 74%) !important;
  opacity: calc(.92 + (var(--heroScroll) * .08));
}

/* 스크롤 시 첫 페이지 요소가 천천히 어둠으로 섞이게 */
.hero-copy {
  opacity: calc(1 - (var(--heroScroll) * .7));
  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(calc(var(--heroScroll) * -22px)) !important;
}

.cta-row {
  opacity: calc(1 - (var(--heroScroll) * .58));
  transform: translateY(-50%) translateY(calc(var(--heroScroll) * 28px)) !important;
}

.hero-vignette {
  opacity: calc(.85 + (var(--heroScroll) * .28));
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 0 38%, rgba(0,0,0,.56) 70%, #05060A 100%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(5,6,10,.22) 0%, transparent 26%, rgba(5,6,10,1) 100%) !important;
}

/* 모바일에서는 이미지 과확대/텍스트 이탈 방지 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .hero-copy {
    top: clamp(74px, 10.2vh, 100px) !important;
    width: calc(100vw - 36px) !important;
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-size: clamp(38px, 12vw, 62px) !important;
    margin-bottom: 9px !important;
  }

  .hero-copy .small {
    max-width: 330px !important;
    font-size: 11px !important;
    line-height: 1.48 !important;
  }

  .statue-wrap {
    width: min(138vw, 760px) !important;
    height: min(88svh, 820px) !important;
    transform:
      translateY(calc(16vh + (var(--heroScroll) * -3vh)))
      scale(calc(1 + (var(--heroScroll) * .02))) !important;
  }

  .statue-img {
    -webkit-mask-image:
      linear-gradient(
        to bottom,
        black 0%,
        black 56%,
        rgba(0,0,0,.72) 63%,
        rgba(0,0,0,.28) 70%,
        transparent 80%
      ) !important;
    mask-image:
      linear-gradient(
        to bottom,
        black 0%,
        black 56%,
        rgba(0,0,0,.72) 63%,
        rgba(0,0,0,.28) 70%,
        transparent 80%
      ) !important;
  }

  .cta-row {
    bottom: 42px !important;
    top: auto !important;
    transform: translateY(calc(var(--heroScroll) * 22px)) !important;
    padding-left: 18px !important;
    padding-right: 18px !important;
  }

  .cta-phrase {
    font-size: clamp(20px, 5.8vw, 30px) !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   Requested revision v9:
   - 첫 페이지 스크롤 버벅임 완화
   - Home ↔ About만 세로 스크롤 연결
   - 감정을 꺼내는 공간 / 함께 남은 감정은 별도 화면 전환
========================================================= */

/* v8의 실시간 스크롤 변형 효과를 끄고 정적인 마스크로 변경 */
:root {
  --heroScroll: 0 !important;
}

.statue-stage,
.statue-wrap,
.hero-copy,
.cta-row,
.hero-vignette {
  transition: none !important;
  will-change: auto !important;
}

.statue-stage {
  transform: none !important;
}

.statue-wrap {
  transform: translateY(16vh) !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
}

.hero-copy {
  transform: translateX(-50%) !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
}

.cta-row {
  transform: translateY(-50%) !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
}

.hero-vignette {
  opacity: .92 !important;
}

/* Home과 About만 스크롤 흐름에 남김 */
.statement {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 별도 화면 전환용 페이지 */
#emotion.section,
#cloud.section {
  position: fixed !important;
  inset: 0 !important;
  z-index: 45 !important;
  width: 100vw !important;
  min-height: 100svh !important;
  height: 100svh !important;
  display: block !important;
  overflow-y: auto !important;
  padding: 112px clamp(18px, 3vw, 54px) 54px !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%, rgba(108, 123, 151, .13), transparent 32rem),
    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 62%, rgba(85, 96, 120, .08), transparent 28rem),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #05060A 0%, #020306 52%, #05060A 100%) !important;
  opacity: 0 !important;
  visibility: hidden !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
  transform: translateY(18px) scale(.985) !important;
  filter: blur(10px) !important;
  transition:
    opacity .42s ease,
    transform .42s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1),
    filter .42s ease,
    visibility 0s linear .42s !important;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion,
body.view-cloud #cloud {
  opacity: 1 !important;
  visibility: visible !important;
  pointer-events: auto !important;
  transform: translateY(0) scale(1) !important;
  filter: blur(0) !important;
  transition:
    opacity .42s ease,
    transform .42s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1),
    filter .42s ease,
    visibility 0s !important;
}

body.view-emotion,
body.view-cloud {
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* 별도 화면 안에서는 기존 reveal 효과 때문에 안 보이는 문제 방지 */
body.view-emotion #emotion .reveal,
body.view-cloud #cloud .reveal {
  opacity: 1 !important;
  transform: none !important;
  filter: none !important;
}

/* 별도 화면용 뒤로가기 */
.view-close {
  position: fixed;
  right: clamp(18px, 3vw, 46px);
  top: clamp(72px, 8vh, 92px);
  z-index: 75;
  display: none;
  border: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.28);
  padding: 6px 0;
  color: rgba(238, 242, 248, .66);
  background: transparent;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: clamp(12px, .95vw, 14px);
  letter-spacing: .04em;
}

body.view-emotion .view-close,
body.view-cloud .view-close {
  display: block;
}

.view-close:hover {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.92);
  border-bottom-color: rgba(255,255,255,.58);
}

/* 별도 화면의 작업 공간은 큰 화면을 쓰되 안정적으로 */
#emotion .section-head,
#emotion .emotion-controls,
#cloud .section-head {
  width: min(1480px, 96vw) !important;
}

#emotion .emotion-stage,
#cloud .cloud-stage {
  width: min(1480px, 96vw) !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
}

#emotion .emotion-stage {
  height: min(74svh, 720px) !important;
  min-height: 580px !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-stage {
  min-height: min(74svh, 720px) !important;
}

/* 메뉴는 별도 화면에서도 배경 위에 보이게 */
body.view-emotion .site-header,
body.view-cloud .site-header {
  opacity: 1 !important;
  filter: none !important;
  transform: translateX(-50%) !important;
  pointer-events: auto !important;
}

/* 모바일 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .statue-wrap {
    transform: translateY(16vh) !important;
  }

  .cta-row {
    transform: none !important;
  }

  #emotion.section,
  #cloud.section {
    padding: 104px 14px 44px !important;
  }

  .view-close {
    top: 64px;
    right: 18px;
  }

  #emotion .emotion-stage {
    height: 70svh !important;
    min-height: 560px !important;
  }

  #cloud .cloud-stage {
    min-height: 70svh !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   Revision from uploaded v9:
   - Scroll effect added back softly
   - About centered with quiet line elements
   - No accent colors added
========================================================= */

:root {
  --homeScrollMotion: 0;
}

/* 스크롤 내릴 때 보이는 부드러운 모션 */
.statue-stage,
.statue-wrap,
.hero-copy,
.cta-row,
.hero-vignette {
  will-change: transform, opacity;
}

.statue-stage {
  transform: translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * -12px), 0) !important;
}

.statue-wrap {
  transform:
    translate3d(0, calc(16vh + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * -2.8vh)), 0)
    scale(calc(1 + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .018))) !important;
  opacity: calc(1 - (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .12)) !important;
}

.hero-copy {
  transform:
    translateX(-50%)
    translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * -16px), 0) !important;
  opacity: calc(1 - (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .44)) !important;
}

.cta-row {
  transform:
    translateY(-50%)
    translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * 20px), 0) !important;
  opacity: calc(1 - (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .36)) !important;
}

.hero-vignette {
  opacity: calc(.90 + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .12)) !important;
}

/* 배경이 아주 미세하게 움직이는 느낌 */
.hero::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0 78%, rgba(255,255,255,.026) 79%, transparent 80%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0 88%, rgba(255,255,255,.018) 89%, transparent 90%);
  background-size: 220px 180px;
  opacity: calc(.14 + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .16));
  transform: translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * -26px), 0);
}

/* About 중앙 정렬 */
.about {
  min-height: 100svh !important;
  text-align: center !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  padding-top: clamp(120px, 16vh, 170px) !important;
  padding-bottom: clamp(90px, 12vh, 140px) !important;
}

.about-card {
  width: min(980px, 92vw) !important;
  margin: 0 auto !important;
  padding: clamp(42px, 6vw, 78px) clamp(20px, 5vw, 72px) !important;
  text-align: center !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  position: relative;
}

.about-card::before,
.about-card::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: min(560px, 72vw);
  height: 1px;
  margin: 0 auto clamp(30px, 4vw, 48px);
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg,
      transparent 0%,
      rgba(255,255,255,.10) 18%,
      rgba(255,255,255,.40) 50%,
      rgba(255,255,255,.10) 82%,
      transparent 100%);
}

.about-card::after {
  margin: clamp(30px, 4vw, 48px) auto 0;
  opacity: .74;
}

.about-card .eyebrow {
  margin-bottom: clamp(18px, 2.6vw, 28px) !important;
  text-align: center !important;
}

.about-card h2 {
  margin: 0 auto clamp(24px, 3.6vw, 40px) !important;
  max-width: 860px;
  text-align: center !important;
  font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 78px) !important;
  line-height: 1.16 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.085em !important;
}

.about-card p {
  max-width: 720px;
  margin: 0 auto 14px !important;
  text-align: center !important;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.62) !important;
  font-size: clamp(14px, 1.1vw, 18px) !important;
  line-height: 1.9 !important;
}

.about-ending {
  margin-top: clamp(28px, 4vw, 48px) !important;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.88) !important;
  font-family: "Nanum Myeongjo", "Noto Serif KR", "Batang", serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(24px, 3.4vw, 52px) !important;
  line-height: 1.1 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.07em !important;
  text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(255,255,255,.12);
}

/* 모바일에서 About 텍스트가 답답하지 않게 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .about {
    padding-top: 116px !important;
  }

  .about-card {
    width: 94vw !important;
    padding-left: 18px !important;
    padding-right: 18px !important;
  }

  .about-card h2 {
    font-size: clamp(31px, 9vw, 52px) !important;
  }

  .about-card p {
    font-size: 13.5px !important;
    line-height: 1.78 !important;
  }

  .about-card::before,
  .about-card::after {
    width: min(320px, 78vw);
  }

  .hero-copy {
    transform:
      translateX(-50%)
      translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * -10px), 0) !important;
  }

  .cta-row {
    transform: translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * 12px), 0) !important;
  }

  .statue-wrap {
    transform:
      translate3d(0, calc(16vh + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * -1.6vh)), 0)
      scale(calc(1 + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .012))) !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   Revision:
   - v8의 살짝 버벅이는 듯한 모션을 자연스럽게 재도입
   - 스크롤 시 흩어진 키워드들이 위로 올라가는 효과
   - 중간 기획 의도 섹션 활성화
   - About은 v9처럼 원래 텍스트와 좌정렬로 복귀
========================================================= */

:root {
  --homeScrollMotion: 0;
  --homeScrollStepped: 0;
}

/* 홈 스크롤 모션: 부드러운 값 + 아주 약한 단계감 */
.statue-stage,
.statue-wrap,
.hero-copy,
.cta-row,
.hero-vignette,
.scroll-keywords span {
  will-change: transform, opacity;
}

.statue-stage {
  transform: translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * -10px), 0) !important;
}

.statue-wrap {
  transform:
    translate3d(0, calc(16vh + (var(--homeScrollStepped) * -3.1vh)), 0)
    scale(calc(1 + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .022))) !important;
  opacity: calc(1 - (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .13)) !important;
}

.hero-copy {
  transform:
    translateX(-50%)
    translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollStepped) * -18px), 0) !important;
  opacity: calc(1 - (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .48)) !important;
}

.cta-row {
  transform:
    translateY(-50%)
    translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollStepped) * 24px), 0) !important;
  opacity: calc(1 - (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .38)) !important;
}

.hero-vignette {
  opacity: calc(.88 + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .15)) !important;
}

/* 흩어진 키워드 상승 */
.scroll-keywords {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 7;
  pointer-events: none;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.scroll-keywords span {
  position: absolute;
  left: var(--x);
  top: var(--y);
  color: rgba(232,236,244,.18);
  font-size: clamp(13px, 1.1vw, 18px);
  letter-spacing: -.03em;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  opacity: calc((var(--homeScrollMotion) - var(--delay)) * 1.9);
  transform:
    translate3d(
      calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * 18px),
      calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -1 * var(--rise)),
      0
    )
    rotate(calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -5deg));
}

.scroll-keywords span:nth-child(2n) {
  color: rgba(232,236,244,.13);
}

.scroll-keywords span:nth-child(3n) {
  font-family: "Nanum Myeongjo", "Noto Serif KR", "Batang", serif;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.16);
}

/* 중간 기획 의도 섹션 활성화 */
.statement {
  display: grid !important;
  min-height: 96svh !important;
  padding-top: clamp(112px, 15vh, 160px) !important;
  padding-bottom: clamp(90px, 12vh, 140px) !important;
  text-align: center !important;
}

.statement-box {
  width: min(880px, 92vw) !important;
  margin: 0 auto !important;
  text-align: center !important;
  position: relative;
}

.statement-box::before,
.statement-box::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: min(460px, 70vw);
  height: 1px;
  margin: 0 auto clamp(28px, 4vw, 44px);
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg,
      transparent 0%,
      rgba(255,255,255,.10) 15%,
      rgba(255,255,255,.36) 50%,
      rgba(255,255,255,.10) 85%,
      transparent 100%);
}

.statement-box::after {
  margin: clamp(28px, 4vw, 44px) auto 0;
  opacity: .72;
}

.statement-box h2 {
  margin: 0 auto clamp(24px, 3vw, 36px) !important;
  font-size: clamp(32px, 5.6vw, 76px) !important;
  line-height: 1.16 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.085em !important;
}

.statement-box p {
  max-width: 720px !important;
  margin: 0 auto 14px !important;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.58) !important;
  font-size: clamp(14px, 1.15vw, 18px) !important;
  line-height: 1.9 !important;
  text-align: center !important;
}

/* About: 중앙 정렬 오버라이드 해제 후 좌정렬로 복귀 */
.about {
  min-height: 88svh !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  padding-top: 112px !important;
  padding-bottom: 80px !important;
}

.about-card {
  width: min(920px, 100%) !important;
  max-width: 920px !important;
  margin: 0 auto !important;
  padding: clamp(30px, 6vw, 70px) !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  position: relative;
}

.about-card::before,
.about-card::after {
  display: none !important;
}

.about-card h2 {
  margin: 0 0 26px !important;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.9) !important;
  font-family:
    "Nanum Myeongjo",
    "Noto Serif KR",
    "Batang",
    "AppleMyungjo",
    serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(34px, 5vw, 72px) !important;
  line-height: 1.1 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.075em !important;
  text-align: left !important;
}

.about-card p {
  max-width: 760px !important;
  margin: 0 0 14px !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.62) !important;
  font-size: clamp(15px, 1.2vw, 18px) !important;
  line-height: 1.9 !important;
}

.about-card strong {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.88) !important;
  font-weight: 650 !important;
}

/* 별도 화면 overlay가 statement 추가로 영향받지 않도록 */
#emotion.section,
#cloud.section {
  scroll-snap-align: none !important;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .statement {
    min-height: 92svh !important;
    padding-top: 112px !important;
  }

  .statement-box h2 {
    font-size: clamp(31px, 9vw, 52px) !important;
  }

  .statement-box p {
    font-size: 13.5px !important;
    line-height: 1.78 !important;
  }

  .scroll-keywords span {
    font-size: 12px;
  }

  .scroll-keywords span:nth-child(n+6) {
    display: none;
  }

  .cta-row {
    transform: translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollStepped) * 14px), 0) !important;
  }

  .statue-wrap {
    transform:
      translate3d(0, calc(16vh + (var(--homeScrollStepped) * -1.9vh)), 0)
      scale(calc(1 + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .014))) !important;
  }

  .hero-copy {
    transform:
      translateX(-50%)
      translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollStepped) * -11px), 0) !important;
  }

  .about-card {
    padding-left: 18px !important;
    padding-right: 18px !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   Revision:
   - 스크롤 시 더 많은 모션 추가
   - 천천히 사라짐 / 스윽 등장 / 키워드 상승감 강화
   - About 제목 제거, 원래 좌정렬 설명문만 유지
========================================================= */

:root {
  --homeScrollMotion: 0;
  --homeScrollStepped: 0;
  --intentMotion: 0;
}

/* 홈 스크롤: 조금 더 눈에 보이는 움직임 */
.statue-wrap {
  transform:
    translate3d(0, calc(16vh + (var(--homeScrollStepped) * -4.2vh)), 0)
    scale(calc(1 + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .032))) !important;
  opacity: calc(1 - (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .20)) !important;
  filter:
    drop-shadow(0 48px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.76))
    drop-shadow(0 0 calc(46px + var(--homeScrollMotion) * 28px) rgba(224,231,245,.08))
    blur(calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * .7px)) !important;
}

.hero-copy {
  transform:
    translateX(-50%)
    translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollStepped) * -34px), 0) !important;
  opacity: calc(1 - (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .66)) !important;
  filter: blur(calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * 4px)) !important;
}

.cta-row {
  transform:
    translateY(-50%)
    translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollStepped) * 42px), 0) !important;
  opacity: calc(1 - (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .56)) !important;
  filter: blur(calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * 3px)) !important;
}

.hero-vignette {
  opacity: calc(.86 + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .22)) !important;
}

/* 흩어진 키워드가 더 분명하게 올라오고 사라지도록 */
.scroll-keywords span {
  opacity: calc((var(--homeScrollMotion) - var(--delay)) * 2.6);
  transform:
    translate3d(
      calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * 30px),
      calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -1 * var(--rise)),
      0
    )
    rotate(calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -8deg))
    scale(calc(.92 + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .12)));
  filter: blur(calc((1 - var(--homeScrollMotion)) * .7px));
}

.scroll-keywords span:nth-child(2n) {
  transform:
    translate3d(
      calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -24px),
      calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -1 * var(--rise)),
      0
    )
    rotate(calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * 7deg))
    scale(calc(.92 + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .10)));
}

/* 기획 의도 섹션: 스윽 올라오며 등장 */
.statement-box {
  opacity: calc(.15 + (var(--intentMotion) * .85)) !important;
  transform:
    translate3d(0, calc((1 - var(--intentMotion)) * 54px), 0)
    scale(calc(.985 + (var(--intentMotion) * .015))) !important;
  filter: blur(calc((1 - var(--intentMotion)) * 10px)) !important;
}

.statement-box::before,
.statement-box::after {
  transform: scaleX(calc(.35 + (var(--intentMotion) * .65)));
  opacity: calc(.16 + (var(--intentMotion) * .58));
  transform-origin: center;
}

/* 기획 의도 안의 텍스트도 순차적으로 등장 */
.statement-box .eyebrow {
  opacity: calc(var(--intentMotion) * 1.2);
  transform: translateY(calc((1 - var(--intentMotion)) * 14px));
}

.statement-box h2 {
  opacity: calc(var(--intentMotion) * 1.15);
  transform: translateY(calc((1 - var(--intentMotion)) * 22px));
}

.statement-box p {
  opacity: calc((var(--intentMotion) - .18) * 1.55);
  transform: translateY(calc((1 - var(--intentMotion)) * 28px));
}

/* About: 제목 없이 좌정렬 텍스트만 차분하게 */
.about {
  text-align: left !important;
  place-items: center !important;
}

.about-card {
  width: min(920px, 92vw) !important;
  max-width: 920px !important;
  margin: 0 auto !important;
  padding: clamp(28px, 5vw, 62px) !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

.about-card::before,
.about-card::after {
  display: none !important;
}

.about-card h2 {
  display: none !important;
}

.about-card p {
  max-width: 760px !important;
  margin: 0 0 14px !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.62) !important;
  font-size: clamp(15px, 1.15vw, 18px) !important;
  line-height: 1.9 !important;
}

.about-card p:first-child {
  margin-top: 0 !important;
}

.about-card strong {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.88) !important;
  font-weight: 650 !important;
}

/* About 자체도 스크롤 진입 시 자연스럽게 */
.about-card.reveal.visible {
  animation: aboutSoftIn 1.1s cubic-bezier(.18,.84,.25,1) both;
}

@keyframes aboutSoftIn {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(34px);
    filter: blur(10px);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
    filter: blur(0);
  }
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .hero-copy {
    transform:
      translateX(-50%)
      translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollStepped) * -18px), 0) !important;
  }

  .cta-row {
    transform: translate3d(0, calc(var(--homeScrollStepped) * 20px), 0) !important;
  }

  .statue-wrap {
    transform:
      translate3d(0, calc(16vh + (var(--homeScrollStepped) * -2.4vh)), 0)
      scale(calc(1 + (var(--homeScrollMotion) * .018))) !important;
  }

  .about-card {
    width: 94vw !important;
    padding-left: 20px !important;
    padding-right: 20px !important;
  }

  .about-card p {
    font-size: 13.5px !important;
    line-height: 1.78 !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   Revision:
   - About section restored to screenshot-style layout
   - Left positioned, left aligned, large title
========================================================= */

.about {
  min-height: 100svh !important;
  place-items: center start !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  padding-top: clamp(108px, 14vh, 150px) !important;
  padding-bottom: clamp(80px, 11vh, 120px) !important;
  padding-left: clamp(36px, 4.8vw, 88px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(24px, 5vw, 84px) !important;
}

.about-card {
  width: min(1260px, 94vw) !important;
  max-width: 1260px !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

.about-card::before,
.about-card::after {
  display: none !important;
}

.about-kicker {
  margin: 0 0 clamp(24px, 3vw, 34px) !important;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.62) !important;
  font-family:
    "Pretendard Variable", "Pretendard",
    "SUIT Variable", "SUIT",
    "Noto Sans KR",
    "Apple SD Gothic Neo",
    "Malgun Gothic",
    system-ui, sans-serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(18px, 1.45vw, 26px) !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  line-height: 1 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.035em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.about-main-title {
  display: block !important;
  margin: 0 0 clamp(34px, 4.4vw, 58px) !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.92) !important;
  font-family:
    "Nanum Myeongjo",
    "Noto Serif KR",
    "Batang",
    "AppleMyungjo",
    serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(58px, 7.6vw, 124px) !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  line-height: 1.02 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.105em !important;
  text-shadow:
    0 0 30px rgba(255,255,255,.12),
    0 18px 44px rgba(0,0,0,.86) !important;
}

.about-card h2:not(.about-main-title) {
  display: none !important;
}

.about-card p {
  max-width: none !important;
  width: min(1280px, 94vw) !important;
  margin: 0 0 clamp(24px, 2.4vw, 34px) !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.60) !important;
  font-family:
    "Pretendard Variable", "Pretendard",
    "SUIT Variable", "SUIT",
    "Noto Sans KR",
    "Apple SD Gothic Neo",
    "Malgun Gothic",
    system-ui, sans-serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(18px, 1.55vw, 25px) !important;
  font-weight: 520 !important;
  line-height: 1.65 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.045em !important;
}

.about-card p strong {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.90) !important;
  font-weight: 780 !important;
}

/* about entrance remains subtle but not centered */
.about-card.reveal.visible {
  animation: aboutLeftSoftIn 1s cubic-bezier(.18,.84,.25,1) both;
}

@keyframes aboutLeftSoftIn {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(38px);
    filter: blur(10px);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
    filter: blur(0);
  }
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .about {
    padding-left: 22px !important;
    padding-right: 18px !important;
    padding-top: 110px !important;
  }

  .about-kicker {
    font-size: 14px !important;
    margin-bottom: 22px !important;
  }

  .about-main-title {
    font-size: clamp(42px, 15vw, 76px) !important;
    line-height: 1.05 !important;
    margin-bottom: 30px !important;
  }

  .about-card p {
    width: 100% !important;
    font-size: 14.5px !important;
    line-height: 1.75 !important;
    margin-bottom: 20px !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v12 update:
   - About typography tightened
   - Passing keyword effect added during scroll
   - Version name: v12
========================================================= */

/* About 마지막 화면 폰트/자간/행간 재조정 */
.about {
  padding-left: clamp(32px, 4.2vw, 76px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(24px, 4vw, 70px) !important;
}

.about-kicker {
  margin: 0 0 clamp(18px, 2.1vw, 26px) !important;
  font-size: clamp(14px, 1.05vw, 19px) !important;
  font-weight: 680 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.02em !important;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.54) !important;
}

.about-main-title {
  margin: 0 0 clamp(26px, 3.2vw, 42px) !important;
  font-size: clamp(48px, 6.25vw, 98px) !important;
  line-height: 1.02 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.095em !important;
  text-shadow:
    0 0 24px rgba(255,255,255,.10),
    0 14px 38px rgba(0,0,0,.78) !important;
}

.about-card p {
  width: min(1120px, 90vw) !important;
  margin: 0 0 clamp(15px, 1.55vw, 23px) !important;
  font-size: clamp(15.5px, 1.18vw, 20px) !important;
  font-weight: 470 !important;
  line-height: 1.52 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.035em !important;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.57) !important;
}

.about-card p strong {
  font-weight: 760 !important;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.86) !important;
}

/* 스크롤 중 지나가는 키워드 효과 */
.passing-keywords {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 7;
  overflow: hidden;
  pointer-events: none;
  opacity: calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * 1.1);
}

.passing-keywords span {
  position: absolute;
  top: var(--top);
  left: 50%;
  white-space: nowrap;
  color: rgba(236,240,248,.16);
  font-family:
    "Pretendard Variable", "Pretendard",
    "SUIT Variable", "SUIT",
    "Noto Sans KR",
    "Apple SD Gothic Neo",
    "Malgun Gothic",
    system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(14px, 1.35vw, 24px);
  font-weight: 520;
  letter-spacing: -.045em;
  text-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(255,255,255,.055);
  transform:
    translate3d(
      calc(-72vw + (var(--homeScrollMotion) - var(--delay)) * 168vw * var(--speed)),
      calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -32px),
      0
    )
    rotate(calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - .5) * 4deg));
  filter: blur(calc((1 - var(--homeScrollMotion)) * .8px));
}

.passing-keywords span:nth-child(2n) {
  color: rgba(236,240,248,.11);
  font-family: "Nanum Myeongjo", "Noto Serif KR", "Batang", serif;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.passing-keywords span:nth-child(3n) {
  font-size: clamp(18px, 2vw, 34px);
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.12);
}

/* 기존 상승 키워드와 지나가는 키워드가 섞여 보이도록 기존 키워드 투명도 살짝 낮춤 */
.scroll-keywords span {
  color: rgba(232,236,244,.145) !important;
}

/* 중간 기획 의도 섹션도 전체 행간 과도하지 않게 */
.statement-box p {
  line-height: 1.72 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.025em !important;
}

/* 모바일 조정 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .about {
    padding-left: 22px !important;
    padding-right: 18px !important;
  }

  .about-kicker {
    font-size: 12.5px !important;
    margin-bottom: 18px !important;
  }

  .about-main-title {
    font-size: clamp(38px, 13vw, 64px) !important;
    margin-bottom: 24px !important;
  }

  .about-card p {
    width: 100% !important;
    font-size: 13.5px !important;
    line-height: 1.62 !important;
    letter-spacing: -.025em !important;
    margin-bottom: 16px !important;
  }

  .passing-keywords span {
    font-size: 12px;
    transform:
      translate3d(
        calc(-92vw + (var(--homeScrollMotion) - var(--delay)) * 195vw * var(--speed)),
        calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -24px),
        0
      )
      rotate(calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - .5) * 3deg));
  }

  .passing-keywords span:nth-child(n+5) {
    display: none;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v13 update:
   - 좌우로 지나가는 키워드 제거
   - 스크롤과 맞춰 위로 올라가는 역방향 비/키워드 레이어로 변경
========================================================= */

/* v12 passing-keywords 비활성화 */
.passing-keywords {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 화면 전체에 흩어진 단어가 비처럼 역방향으로 올라가는 효과 */
.keyword-rain {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 7;
  overflow: hidden;
  pointer-events: none;
  opacity: calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * 1.05);
  mix-blend-mode: screen;
}

.keyword-rain span {
  position: absolute;
  left: var(--x);
  top: var(--y);
  white-space: nowrap;
  color: rgba(235,240,248,.145);
  font-family:
    "Pretendard Variable", "Pretendard",
    "SUIT Variable", "SUIT",
    "Noto Sans KR",
    "Apple SD Gothic Neo",
    "Malgun Gothic",
    system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(12px, 1.05vw, 19px);
  font-weight: 520;
  letter-spacing: -.045em;
  text-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(255,255,255,.055);
  transform:
    translate3d(
      calc(var(--drift) * var(--homeScrollMotion)),
      calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -1 * var(--rise)),
      0
    )
    rotate(calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -2.4deg));
  opacity: calc((var(--homeScrollMotion) - var(--delay)) * 2.25);
  filter: blur(calc((1 - var(--homeScrollMotion)) * .55px));
}

.keyword-rain span::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  top: 120%;
  width: 1px;
  height: clamp(26px, 4.5vh, 62px);
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,.16), transparent);
  opacity: calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * .5);
}

.keyword-rain span:nth-child(2n) {
  color: rgba(235,240,248,.095);
  font-family: "Nanum Myeongjo", "Noto Serif KR", "Batang", serif;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: clamp(13px, 1.25vw, 22px);
}

.keyword-rain span:nth-child(3n) {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.18);
  transform:
    translate3d(
      calc(var(--drift) * var(--homeScrollMotion)),
      calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -1 * var(--rise)),
      0
    )
    rotate(calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * 1.8deg));
}

/* 기존 위로 떠오르는 키워드는 뒤쪽 레이어처럼 더 약하게 */
.scroll-keywords span {
  color: rgba(232,236,244,.09) !important;
  opacity: calc((var(--homeScrollMotion) - var(--delay)) * 1.25) !important;
}

/* 모바일에서는 수량 줄이고 속도 안정화 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .keyword-rain span {
    font-size: 11.5px;
  }

  .keyword-rain span:nth-child(n+8) {
    display: none;
  }

  .keyword-rain span::after {
    height: 34px;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v14 update:
   - 홈 화면에서 '함께 남은 감정'이 활성화 밑줄로 보이는 문제 수정
   - 키워드 역방향 비 효과를 더 잘 보이게 강화
========================================================= */

/* 현재 화면 표시: 기본 active 밑줄은 끄고, 실제 화면 상태에 맞는 것만 표시 */
.nav-line a.active::after {
  width: 0 !important;
}

body:not(.view-emotion):not(.view-cloud) .nav-line a[href="#home"].is-current::after,
body.view-emotion .nav-line a[href="#emotion"]::after,
body.view-cloud .nav-line a[href="#cloud"]::after {
  width: 100% !important;
}

body:not(.view-emotion):not(.view-cloud) .nav-line a[href="#home"].is-current,
body.view-emotion .nav-line a[href="#emotion"],
body.view-cloud .nav-line a[href="#cloud"] {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.9) !important;
}

/* 스크롤 키워드 비 효과 강화: 너무 흐려서 안 보이던 문제 수정 */
.keyword-rain {
  z-index: 10 !important;
  opacity: calc(.08 + var(--homeScrollMotion) * 1.15) !important;
  mix-blend-mode: normal !important;
}

.keyword-rain span {
  color: rgba(238,242,250,.34) !important;
  font-size: clamp(14px, 1.22vw, 24px) !important;
  font-weight: 560 !important;
  text-shadow:
    0 0 18px rgba(255,255,255,.16),
    0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.62) !important;
  opacity: calc((var(--homeScrollMotion) - var(--delay)) * 3.2) !important;
  transform:
    translate3d(
      calc(var(--drift) * var(--homeScrollMotion)),
      calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -1 * var(--rise)),
      0
    )
    rotate(calc((var(--homeScrollStepped) - var(--delay)) * -2.4deg)) !important;
}

.keyword-rain span:nth-child(2n) {
  color: rgba(238,242,250,.24) !important;
}

.keyword-rain span:nth-child(3n) {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.42) !important;
  font-size: clamp(18px, 1.8vw, 34px) !important;
}

.keyword-rain span::after {
  height: clamp(42px, 7vh, 96px) !important;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,.28), rgba(255,255,255,.05), transparent) !important;
  opacity: calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * .85) !important;
}

/* 추가 밀도: 기존 상승 키워드도 조금 더 보이게 */
.scroll-keywords {
  z-index: 9 !important;
}

.scroll-keywords span {
  color: rgba(232,236,244,.18) !important;
  opacity: calc((var(--homeScrollMotion) - var(--delay)) * 1.8) !important;
}

/* 조각상보다 앞에 보이되, 메인 제목보다는 방해하지 않게 */
.hero-copy {
  z-index: 12 !important;
}

.cta-row {
  z-index: 11 !important;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .keyword-rain span {
    font-size: 12px !important;
  }

  .keyword-rain span:nth-child(3n) {
    font-size: 15px !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v15 update:
   - 키워드 비 효과를 홈 화면 안쪽이 아니라 스크롤 연결 화면 전체의 양옆 사이드에 배치
   - Home / 기획 의도 / About을 지나갈 때 계속 올라가는 느낌
========================================================= */

/* 기존 홈 내부 keyword-rain은 너무 국소적이라 약하게 처리 */
.keyword-rain {
  opacity: calc(var(--homeScrollMotion) * .28) !important;
}

/* 전체 스크롤에 붙는 사이드 키워드 레이어 */
.global-side-keywords {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 8;
  pointer-events: none;
  overflow: hidden;
  opacity: .92;
}

.side-keywords {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: clamp(92px, 13vw, 210px);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.side-left {
  left: 0;
}

.side-right {
  right: 0;
}

.side-keywords span {
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  top: calc(108vh + (var(--i) * 18vh));
  transform:
    translateX(-50%)
    translateY(calc(var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * -225vh + var(--drift)))
    rotate(calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) - .5) * 3deg));
  white-space: nowrap;
  color: rgba(232,236,244,.18);
  font-family:
    "Pretendard Variable", "Pretendard",
    "SUIT Variable", "Noto Sans KR",
    "Apple SD Gothic Neo",
    "Malgun Gothic",
    system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(12px, 1.05vw, 18px);
  font-weight: 520;
  letter-spacing: -.045em;
  text-shadow:
    0 0 20px rgba(255,255,255,.08),
    0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.72);
  opacity: calc(.18 + var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * .82);
  will-change: transform, opacity;
}

.side-right span {
  left: 48%;
}

.side-keywords span:nth-child(2n) {
  color: rgba(232,236,244,.115);
