  font-family: "Nanum Myeongjo", "Noto Serif KR", "Batang", serif;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.side-keywords span:nth-child(3n) {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.24);
  font-size: clamp(15px, 1.35vw, 24px);
}

.side-keywords span::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  top: 120%;
  width: 1px;
  height: clamp(44px, 8vh, 104px);
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,.20), rgba(255,255,255,.04), transparent);
  opacity: .58;
}

/* 중앙 콘텐츠를 방해하지 않게, 사이드 쪽만 은근하게 보이도록 가장자리 그라디언트 */
.global-side-keywords::before,
.global-side-keywords::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: clamp(160px, 18vw, 300px);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.global-side-keywords::before {
  left: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(5,6,10,.05), transparent);
}

.global-side-keywords::after {
  right: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(270deg, rgba(5,6,10,.05), transparent);
}

/* 오버레이 화면에서는 사이드 키워드가 기능을 방해하지 않도록 약하게 */
body.view-emotion .global-side-keywords,
body.view-cloud .global-side-keywords {
  opacity: .18;
}

/* 작은 화면에서는 양옆이 좁아서 너무 지저분해지지 않게 일부 숨김 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .side-keywords {
    width: 74px;
  }

  .side-keywords span {
    font-size: 10.5px;
    opacity: calc(.10 + var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * .55);
  }

  .side-keywords span:nth-child(n+6) {
    display: none;
  }

  .side-keywords span::after {
    height: 42px;
    opacity: .38;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v16 update:
   - 사이드 키워드 비 효과 가시성 강화
   - 나타났다 사라지는 느낌이 아니라 스크롤에 맞춰 실제로 위로 이동
   - 주제를 해치지 않는 선에서 좌우 흔들림/깊이감 변주 추가
========================================================= */

.global-side-keywords {
  z-index: 9 !important;
  opacity: .98 !important;
}

/* 좌우 영역 조금 넓혀서 더 잘 보이게 */
.side-keywords {
  width: clamp(120px, 16vw, 260px) !important;
}

.side-left {
  left: clamp(4px, 1vw, 18px) !important;
}

.side-right {
  right: clamp(4px, 1vw, 18px) !important;
}

/*
  핵심:
  top 고정 + pageScrollMotion에 의해 translateY가 크게 변화하므로
  스크롤을 내릴수록 단어들이 실제로 아래에서 위로 올라감.
  각 단어마다 --amp, --wave, --depth 값을 다르게 줘서 일직선이 아니라 은근히 흔들림.
*/
.side-keywords span {
  left: calc(50% + var(--offset, 0px)) !important;
  top: calc(118vh + (var(--i) * 24vh)) !important;
  color: rgba(238,242,250,.32) !important;
  font-size: clamp(14px, 1.22vw, 23px) !important;
  font-weight: 560 !important;
  opacity: .72 !important;
  filter: blur(calc(var(--depth, .4) * .45px));
  transform:
    translateX(calc(-50% + (sin((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * var(--wave, 8) + var(--i)) * 1rad) * var(--amp, 12px))))
    translateY(calc(var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * -285vh + var(--drift)))
    rotate(calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * var(--wave, 8) - var(--i)) * .9deg))
    scale(calc(.92 + (var(--depth, .5) * .12))) !important;
}

.side-keywords span:nth-child(2n) {
  color: rgba(238,242,250,.23) !important;
  font-size: clamp(13px, 1.05vw, 20px) !important;
  opacity: .58 !important;
}

.side-keywords span:nth-child(3n) {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.42) !important;
  font-size: clamp(17px, 1.45vw, 28px) !important;
  opacity: .76 !important;
}

.side-keywords span:nth-child(4n) {
  letter-spacing: -.06em;
  opacity: .50 !important;
}

/* 비처럼 올라가는 잔상선을 조금 더 선명하게 */
.side-keywords span::after {
  height: clamp(54px, 9vh, 118px) !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      rgba(255,255,255,.32),
      rgba(255,255,255,.08) 42%,
      transparent 100%
    ) !important;
  opacity: .72 !important;
}

/* 단어별 위치 변주 */
.side-left span:nth-child(1) { --offset: -34px; --amp: 16px; --wave: 7.2; --depth: .8; }
.side-left span:nth-child(2) { --offset: 28px; --amp: 9px; --wave: 8.6; --depth: .35; }
.side-left span:nth-child(3) { --offset: -6px; --amp: 22px; --wave: 6.1; --depth: .55; }
.side-left span:nth-child(4) { --offset: 42px; --amp: 13px; --wave: 9.2; --depth: .7; }
.side-left span:nth-child(5) { --offset: -48px; --amp: 11px; --wave: 7.9; --depth: .28; }
.side-left span:nth-child(6) { --offset: 6px; --amp: 18px; --wave: 6.8; --depth: .48; }
.side-left span:nth-child(7) { --offset: 38px; --amp: 15px; --wave: 8.1; --depth: .62; }
.side-left span:nth-child(8) { --offset: -20px; --amp: 10px; --wave: 7.4; --depth: .3; }

.side-right span:nth-child(1) { --offset: 36px; --amp: 13px; --wave: 8.4; --depth: .55; }
.side-right span:nth-child(2) { --offset: -24px; --amp: 18px; --wave: 6.7; --depth: .72; }
.side-right span:nth-child(3) { --offset: 4px; --amp: 9px; --wave: 9.4; --depth: .28; }
.side-right span:nth-child(4) { --offset: -44px; --amp: 17px; --wave: 7.6; --depth: .65; }
.side-right span:nth-child(5) { --offset: 48px; --amp: 11px; --wave: 8.8; --depth: .4; }
.side-right span:nth-child(6) { --offset: -8px; --amp: 22px; --wave: 6.3; --depth: .82; }
.side-right span:nth-child(7) { --offset: 28px; --amp: 14px; --wave: 7.1; --depth: .52; }
.side-right span:nth-child(8) { --offset: -32px; --amp: 10px; --wave: 8.2; --depth: .3; }

/* 중앙 콘텐츠는 방해하지 않도록 가장자리에서만 보이게 하는 마스크 */
.global-side-keywords {
  -webkit-mask-image:
    linear-gradient(90deg,
      black 0%,
      black 17%,
      transparent 34%,
      transparent 66%,
      black 83%,
      black 100%);
  mask-image:
    linear-gradient(90deg,
      black 0%,
      black 17%,
      transparent 34%,
      transparent 66%,
      black 83%,
      black 100%);
}

/* 스크롤 초반에도 움직임이 보이게 시작점을 살짝 당김 */
.side-keywords span:nth-child(1),
.side-keywords span:nth-child(2) {
  top: calc(92vh + (var(--i) * 21vh)) !important;
}

/* 오버레이 화면에서는 계속 약하게만 유지 */
body.view-emotion .global-side-keywords,
body.view-cloud .global-side-keywords {
  opacity: .16 !important;
}

/* 모바일에서는 사이드 공간이 좁아서 가시성은 유지하되 개수/폭 조절 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .side-keywords {
    width: 88px !important;
  }

  .side-left {
    left: 0 !important;
  }

  .side-right {
    right: 0 !important;
  }

  .side-keywords span {
    font-size: 11.5px !important;
    opacity: .52 !important;
    transform:
      translateX(calc(-50% + (sin((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * var(--wave, 8) + var(--i)) * 1rad) * calc(var(--amp, 10px) * .55))))
      translateY(calc(var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * -260vh + var(--drift)))
      rotate(calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * var(--wave, 8) - var(--i)) * .55deg))
      scale(.95) !important;
  }

  .side-keywords span:nth-child(n+6) {
    display: none !important;
  }

  .global-side-keywords {
    -webkit-mask-image:
      linear-gradient(90deg, black 0%, black 20%, transparent 38%, transparent 62%, black 80%, black 100%);
    mask-image:
      linear-gradient(90deg, black 0%, black 20%, transparent 38%, transparent 62%, black 80%, black 100%);
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v17 update:
   - 키워드 비 효과를 더 잘 보이게 조정
   - 중앙 주제부 근처는 연하게, 사이드 바깥쪽은 더 진하게
   - 좌/우 위치 패턴을 다르게 구성
   - 글자별이 아니라 키워드 단위로 폰트/크기/굵기 변화
========================================================= */

/* 사이드 레이어를 조금 더 안쪽까지 확장 */
.side-keywords {
  width: clamp(170px, 22vw, 370px) !important;
}

.side-left {
  left: clamp(6px, 1.4vw, 26px) !important;
}

.side-right {
  right: clamp(6px, 1.4vw, 26px) !important;
}

/*
  단어별 개별 변수
  --offset: 사이드 안에서의 좌우 위치
  --amp: 스크롤 중 흔들림
  --depth: 진하기/크기감
  --fontScale: 키워드 단위 크기 변화
*/
.side-keywords span {
  left: calc(50% + var(--offset, 0px)) !important;
  top: calc(116vh + (var(--i) * 23vh)) !important;
  font-size: calc(clamp(13px, 1.14vw, 21px) * var(--fontScale, 1)) !important;
  font-weight: var(--weight, 560) !important;
  letter-spacing: var(--tracking, -.045em) !important;
  opacity: calc(.48 + (var(--depth, .5) * .34)) !important;
  color: rgba(238,242,250, calc(.20 + (var(--depth, .5) * .30))) !important;
  filter: blur(calc((1 - var(--depth, .5)) * .48px));
  transform:
    translateX(calc(-50% + (sin((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * var(--wave, 8) + var(--i)) * 1rad) * var(--amp, 12px))))
    translateY(calc(var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * -300vh + var(--drift)))
    rotate(calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * var(--wave, 8) - var(--i)) * var(--rotate, .7deg)))
    scale(calc(.94 + (var(--depth, .5) * .10))) !important;
}

/* 중심부에 가까운 단어는 연하게 */
.side-keywords span[data-zone="inner"] {
  opacity: .34 !important;
  color: rgba(238,242,250,.18) !important;
  text-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(255,255,255,.04) !important;
}

/* 사이드 바깥쪽 단어는 더 선명하게 */
.side-keywords span[data-zone="outer"] {
  opacity: .84 !important;
  color: rgba(245,247,252,.50) !important;
  text-shadow:
    0 0 22px rgba(255,255,255,.16),
    0 10px 26px rgba(0,0,0,.72) !important;
}

/* 명조/산세리프를 키워드 단위로 섞음 */
.side-keywords span.serif {
  font-family: "Nanum Myeongjo", "Noto Serif KR", "Batang", serif !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.075em !important;
}

.side-keywords span.sans {
  font-family:
    "Pretendard Variable", "Pretendard",
    "SUIT Variable", "Noto Sans KR",
    "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic",
    system-ui, sans-serif !important;
}

/* 잔상선도 중심부는 약하게, 사이드는 선명하게 */
.side-keywords span::after {
  height: calc(clamp(48px, 8vh, 108px) * var(--trail, 1)) !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      rgba(255,255,255, calc(.15 + var(--depth, .5) * .20)),
      rgba(255,255,255,.06) 45%,
      transparent 100%
    ) !important;
  opacity: calc(.38 + (var(--depth, .5) * .36)) !important;
}

.side-keywords span[data-zone="inner"]::after {
  opacity: .22 !important;
}

.side-keywords span[data-zone="outer"]::after {
  opacity: .78 !important;
}

/* 좌우 패턴이 거의 같아 보이지 않도록 완전히 다른 위치/속도 구성 */
.side-left span:nth-child(1) { --offset: -82px; --amp: 28px; --wave: 5.7; --depth: .92; --fontScale: 1.18; --weight: 650; --rotate: .9deg; --trail: 1.15; }
.side-left span:nth-child(2) { --offset: 18px; --amp: 12px; --wave: 8.9; --depth: .38; --fontScale: .86; --weight: 460; --rotate: .45deg; --trail: .78; }
.side-left span:nth-child(3) { --offset: -38px; --amp: 34px; --wave: 6.4; --depth: .64; --fontScale: 1.34; --weight: 700; --rotate: .65deg; --trail: 1.08; }
.side-left span:nth-child(4) { --offset: 92px; --amp: 18px; --wave: 9.6; --depth: .28; --fontScale: .94; --weight: 500; --rotate: .5deg; --trail: .72; }
.side-left span:nth-child(5) { --offset: -112px; --amp: 15px; --wave: 7.2; --depth: .88; --fontScale: 1.02; --weight: 620; --rotate: .75deg; --trail: 1.2; }
.side-left span:nth-child(6) { --offset: 44px; --amp: 26px; --wave: 6.1; --depth: .46; --fontScale: .82; --weight: 440; --rotate: .55deg; --trail: .88; }
.side-left span:nth-child(7) { --offset: 126px; --amp: 22px; --wave: 8.3; --depth: .22; --fontScale: 1.12; --weight: 560; --rotate: .38deg; --trail: .66; }
.side-left span:nth-child(8) { --offset: -18px; --amp: 14px; --wave: 5.9; --depth: .58; --fontScale: .76; --weight: 470; --rotate: .8deg; --trail: .94; }

.side-right span:nth-child(1) { --offset: 104px; --amp: 18px; --wave: 8.1; --depth: .86; --fontScale: .92; --weight: 620; --rotate: -.7deg; --trail: 1.18; }
.side-right span:nth-child(2) { --offset: -76px; --amp: 31px; --wave: 5.8; --depth: .72; --fontScale: 1.28; --weight: 700; --rotate: -.55deg; --trail: 1.05; }
.side-right span:nth-child(3) { --offset: 26px; --amp: 13px; --wave: 9.7; --depth: .30; --fontScale: .78; --weight: 450; --rotate: -.38deg; --trail: .74; }
.side-right span:nth-child(4) { --offset: -132px; --amp: 20px; --wave: 7.0; --depth: .94; --fontScale: 1.06; --weight: 650; --rotate: -.82deg; --trail: 1.26; }
.side-right span:nth-child(5) { --offset: 72px; --amp: 37px; --wave: 6.5; --depth: .42; --fontScale: .98; --weight: 500; --rotate: -.5deg; --trail: .86; }
.side-right span:nth-child(6) { --offset: -20px; --amp: 24px; --wave: 8.8; --depth: .66; --fontScale: 1.42; --weight: 720; --rotate: -.65deg; --trail: 1.12; }
.side-right span:nth-child(7) { --offset: 138px; --amp: 15px; --wave: 7.5; --depth: .82; --fontScale: .84; --weight: 580; --rotate: -.78deg; --trail: 1.0; }
.side-right span:nth-child(8) { --offset: -96px; --amp: 29px; --wave: 6.0; --depth: .36; --fontScale: .72; --weight: 420; --rotate: -.42deg; --trail: .7; }

/* 중심 주제부를 침범하지 않게 하되, 이전보다 조금 더 중앙으로 보이도록 마스크 완화 */
.global-side-keywords {
  -webkit-mask-image:
    linear-gradient(90deg,
      black 0%,
      black 24%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.32) 36%,
      transparent 44%,
      transparent 56%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.32) 64%,
      black 76%,
      black 100%) !important;
  mask-image:
    linear-gradient(90deg,
      black 0%,
      black 24%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.32) 36%,
      transparent 44%,
      transparent 56%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.32) 64%,
      black 76%,
      black 100%) !important;
}

/* 오버레이 화면에서는 더 약하게 */
body.view-emotion .global-side-keywords,
body.view-cloud .global-side-keywords {
  opacity: .13 !important;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .side-keywords {
    width: 112px !important;
  }

  .side-keywords span {
    font-size: calc(11px * var(--fontScale, 1)) !important;
    transform:
      translateX(calc(-50% + (sin((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * var(--wave, 8) + var(--i)) * 1rad) * calc(var(--amp, 12px) * .45))))
      translateY(calc(var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * -268vh + var(--drift)))
      rotate(calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * var(--wave, 8) - var(--i)) * .38deg))
      scale(.96) !important;
  }

  .side-left span:nth-child(1) { --offset: -34px; }
  .side-left span:nth-child(3) { --offset: -18px; }
  .side-left span:nth-child(5) { --offset: -42px; }
  .side-right span:nth-child(1) { --offset: 34px; }
  .side-right span:nth-child(2) { --offset: -28px; }
  .side-right span:nth-child(4) { --offset: -42px; }

  .side-keywords span:nth-child(n+6) {
    display: none !important;
  }

  .global-side-keywords {
    -webkit-mask-image:
      linear-gradient(90deg, black 0%, black 27%, transparent 42%, transparent 58%, black 73%, black 100%) !important;
    mask-image:
      linear-gradient(90deg, black 0%, black 27%, transparent 42%, transparent 58%, black 73%, black 100%) !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v18 update:
   - 사이드 키워드 양 증가
   - 좌우 대칭 배치 제거
   - 각 단어의 흐름 간격/시작점/위치 변주 강화
========================================================= */

.side-keywords span {
  top: calc(104vh + (var(--i) * 14.5vh)) !important;
}

/* 양이 늘어난 만큼 스크롤 이동 범위를 길게 */
.side-keywords span {
  transform:
    translateX(calc(-50% + (sin((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * var(--wave, 8) + var(--i)) * 1rad) * var(--amp, 12px))))
    translateY(calc(var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * -390vh + var(--drift)))
    rotate(calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * var(--wave, 8) - var(--i)) * var(--rotate, .7deg)))
    scale(calc(.94 + (var(--depth, .5) * .10))) !important;
}

/* 왼쪽과 오른쪽의 전체 폭/시작 위치 자체를 다르게 해서 대칭감 제거 */
.side-left {
  width: clamp(190px, 24vw, 410px) !important;
  left: clamp(0px, .6vw, 12px) !important;
}

.side-right {
  width: clamp(150px, 19vw, 320px) !important;
  right: clamp(16px, 2.6vw, 58px) !important;
}

/* 기존 8개 이후 추가 키워드의 개별 스타일 */
.side-left span:nth-child(9)  { --offset: -146px; --amp: 21px; --wave: 6.9; --depth: .88; --fontScale: 1.10; --weight: 650; --rotate: .65deg; --trail: 1.18; }
.side-left span:nth-child(10) { --offset: 118px; --amp: 16px; --wave: 9.8; --depth: .26; --fontScale: .80; --weight: 460; --rotate: .42deg; --trail: .68; }
.side-left span:nth-child(11) { --offset: -62px; --amp: 35px; --wave: 5.6; --depth: .50; --fontScale: .92; --weight: 520; --rotate: .9deg; --trail: .96; }
.side-left span:nth-child(12) { --offset: 72px; --amp: 12px; --wave: 7.8; --depth: .76; --fontScale: 1.22; --weight: 700; --rotate: .58deg; --trail: 1.12; }
.side-left span:nth-child(13) { --offset: -104px; --amp: 28px; --wave: 8.7; --depth: .34; --fontScale: .74; --weight: 430; --rotate: .38deg; --trail: .72; }
.side-left span:nth-child(14) { --offset: 8px; --amp: 20px; --wave: 6.2; --depth: .62; --fontScale: 1.05; --weight: 560; --rotate: .76deg; --trail: .9; }

.side-right span:nth-child(9)  { --offset: 42px; --amp: 19px; --wave: 8.9; --depth: .28; --fontScale: .82; --weight: 460; --rotate: -.44deg; --trail: .70; }
.side-right span:nth-child(10) { --offset: -126px; --amp: 33px; --wave: 5.9; --depth: .56; --fontScale: .94; --weight: 520; --rotate: -.72deg; --trail: .94; }
.side-right span:nth-child(11) { --offset: 96px; --amp: 14px; --wave: 7.4; --depth: .86; --fontScale: 1.18; --weight: 680; --rotate: -.68deg; --trail: 1.16; }
.side-right span:nth-child(12) { --offset: -48px; --amp: 21px; --wave: 9.6; --depth: .24; --fontScale: .70; --weight: 420; --rotate: -.36deg; --trail: .62; }
.side-right span:nth-child(13) { --offset: 16px; --amp: 29px; --wave: 6.6; --depth: .48; --fontScale: .88; --weight: 500; --rotate: -.54deg; --trail: .82; }
.side-right span:nth-child(14) { --offset: 138px; --amp: 17px; --wave: 8.2; --depth: .90; --fontScale: 1.08; --weight: 650; --rotate: -.82deg; --trail: 1.22; }
.side-right span:nth-child(15) { --offset: -88px; --amp: 24px; --wave: 7.1; --depth: .36; --fontScale: .76; --weight: 440; --rotate: -.48deg; --trail: .74; }

/* 대칭감 제거를 위해 오른쪽 일부 키워드는 시작 시점을 더 아래로 */
.side-right span:nth-child(3n) {
  top: calc(128vh + (var(--i) * 13.2vh)) !important;
}

.side-left span:nth-child(4n) {
  top: calc(92vh + (var(--i) * 15.8vh)) !important;
}

/* 중앙 침범 단어는 더 연하게, 바깥 단어는 선명하게 유지 */
.side-keywords span[data-zone="inner"] {
  opacity: .30 !important;
  color: rgba(238,242,250,.15) !important;
}

.side-keywords span[data-zone="outer"] {
  opacity: .88 !important;
  color: rgba(245,247,252,.54) !important;
}

/* 모바일은 개수만 적당히 유지 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .side-keywords span:nth-child(n+8) {
    display: none !important;
  }

  .side-left {
    width: 104px !important;
  }

  .side-right {
    width: 92px !important;
    right: 0 !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v19 update:
   - Surface Color #020205로 배경/패널 톤 통일
   - 첫 화면 스크롤 전에는 사이드 키워드가 보이지 않도록 아래로 이동
   - 스크롤 키워드 밑 잔상선 제거
   - 조각상 하단이 허벅지에서 뚝 끊겨 보이는 문제 완화
========================================================= */

:root {
  --bg: #020205 !important;
  --bg-deep: #020205 !important;
  --surface: #020205 !important;
}

/* 전체 배경 색 통일 */
html,
body {
  background-color: #020205 !important;
}

body {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%, rgba(108, 123, 151, .10), transparent 34rem),
    radial-gradient(circle at 18% 62%, rgba(85, 96, 120, .055), transparent 28rem),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #020205 0%, #020205 100%) !important;
}

/* 배경 레이어들도 #020205 기준으로 통일 */
.hero,
.section,
.statement,
.about,
#emotion.section,
#cloud.section {
  background-color: #020205 !important;
}

body::before {
  opacity: .16 !important;
}

body::after {
  opacity: .14 !important;
}

/* 이미지 뒤쪽 패널/베젤처럼 보이던 차이를 줄이기 */
.hero-inner,
.statue-stage,
.statue-wrap {
  background: transparent !important;
}

.statue-glow {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle, rgba(230,235,245,.105), rgba(230,235,245,.025) 34%, transparent 70%) !important;
  filter: blur(24px) !important;
}

/* 조각상 하단이 허벅지에서 뚝 끊기지 않도록 마스크를 더 길고 부드럽게 */
.statue-img {
  -webkit-mask-image:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      black 0%,
      black 62%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.88) 70%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.54) 80%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.20) 91%,
      transparent 100%
    ) !important;
  mask-image:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      black 0%,
      black 62%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.88) 70%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.54) 80%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.20) 91%,
      transparent 100%
    ) !important;
}

/* 하단 암부를 같은 #020205로 덮어 색 단차 제거 */
.statue-wrap::after {
  bottom: -2vh !important;
  height: 52vh !important;
  width: min(140vw, 1500px) !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at center top, rgba(2,2,5,0) 0%, rgba(2,2,5,.42) 36%, #020205 76%, #020205 100%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(2,2,5,.60) 34%, #020205 82%, #020205 100%) !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
}

/* 전체 비네트도 #020205로 통일 */
.hero-vignette {
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at center, transparent 0 42%, rgba(2,2,5,.55) 72%, #020205 100%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(2,2,5,.18) 0%, transparent 25%, rgba(2,2,5,.78) 78%, #020205 100%) !important;
}

/* 첫 화면 스크롤 전에는 키워드가 안 보이게: 시작 위치를 더 아래로 내림 */
.side-keywords span {
  top: calc(136vh + (var(--i) * 15.5vh)) !important;
  opacity: calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) - .055) * 5.8) !important;
}

/* 기존 오른쪽/왼쪽 변주 top 규칙도 더 아래쪽 기준으로 보정 */
.side-right span:nth-child(3n) {
  top: calc(154vh + (var(--i) * 14vh)) !important;
}

.side-left span:nth-child(4n) {
  top: calc(126vh + (var(--i) * 16.4vh)) !important;
}

/* 단어 밑에 있던 비/잔상선 제거 */
.side-keywords span::after,
.keyword-rain span::after {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 사이드 단어는 스크롤 후 더 자연스럽게 보이게 */
.global-side-keywords {
  opacity: .96 !important;
}

.side-keywords span[data-zone="outer"] {
  color: rgba(245,247,252,.50) !important;
}

.side-keywords span[data-zone="inner"] {
  color: rgba(238,242,250,.13) !important;
  opacity: calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) - .06) * 3.7) !important;
}

/* 기능 화면의 배경도 같은 Surface Color */
.emotion-stage,
.cloud-stage,
.about-card,
.emotion-input,
.control-buttons button,
.emotion-note,
.cloud-word.phrase {
  background-color: transparent !important;
}

#emotion.section,
#cloud.section {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 18%, rgba(108, 123, 151, .085), transparent 32rem),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #020205 0%, #020205 100%) !important;
}

/* 모바일에서도 첫 화면 진입 시 키워드가 먼저 보이지 않게 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .side-keywords span {
    top: calc(142vh + (var(--i) * 16vh)) !important;
  }

  .statue-wrap::after {
    bottom: -3vh !important;
    height: 44vh !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v20 update:
   - 첫 화면 스크롤 전 사이드 키워드 완전 숨김
   - Surface Color #020205로 보이는 배경/패널 단차 제거
   - 조각상 하단 다리/패널이 생긴 것처럼 보이는 문제 수정
========================================================= */

/* 1) 전체 배경을 단일 Surface Color로 강제 통일 */
html,
body,
main,
.section,
.hero,
.statement,
.about,
.hero-inner,
.statue-stage,
.statue-wrap {
  background: #020205 !important;
  background-color: #020205 !important;
}

/* 배경 그리드/코드 레이어가 검은 색을 나누어 보이게 해서 거의 제거 */
body::before,
body::after,
.hero::before {
  opacity: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
}

/* 홈 비네트도 사각 패널이 아니라 전체 배경에 아주 약한 중심광만 남김 */
.hero-vignette {
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 36%, rgba(235,240,248,.055) 0%, rgba(2,2,5,0) 48%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(2,2,5,0) 0%, rgba(2,2,5,.34) 72%, #020205 100%) !important;
}

/* 조각상 뒤 광원도 색 단차가 생기지 않게 약화 */
.statue-glow {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle, rgba(230,235,245,.07), rgba(230,235,245,.018) 36%, transparent 70%) !important;
  filter: blur(26px) !important;
}

/* 2) 허벅지 아래에서 부드럽게 사라지되, 다리가 더 생긴 것처럼 보이지 않게 */
.statue-img {
  -webkit-mask-image:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      black 0%,
      black 56%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.86) 63%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.46) 72%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.12) 80%,
      transparent 88%,
      transparent 100%
    ) !important;
  mask-image:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      black 0%,
      black 56%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.86) 63%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.46) 72%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.12) 80%,
      transparent 88%,
      transparent 100%
    ) !important;
}

/* 하단 사각 그라디언트 패널이 검은 블록처럼 보이므로 제거 */
.statue-wrap::after {
  display: none !important;
  background: transparent !important;
}

/* 혹시 남아 있는 패널성 배경도 전부 Surface Color/투명으로 정리 */
.emotion-stage,
.cloud-stage,
.about-card,
.emotion-input,
.control-buttons button,
.emotion-note,
.cloud-word.phrase,
#emotion.section,
#cloud.section {
  background-color: transparent !important;
  background-image: none !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 3) 첫 화면 스크롤 전에는 사이드 키워드가 절대 보이지 않게.
   pageScrollMotion이 0.11 이상부터 서서히 나타나게 함 */
.global-side-keywords {
  opacity: clamp(0, calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) - .11) * 8), .96) !important;
}

/* 키워드 시작 위치도 더 아래로 내려서 첫 화면 정지 상태에서는 안 보이게 */
.side-keywords span {
  top: calc(178vh + (var(--i) * 16vh)) !important;
  opacity: calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) - .12) * 6.5) !important;
}

/* 변주용 top 규칙도 전부 아래쪽 기준으로 재보정 */
.side-right span:nth-child(3n) {
  top: calc(198vh + (var(--i) * 14.8vh)) !important;
}

.side-left span:nth-child(4n) {
  top: calc(162vh + (var(--i) * 17.2vh)) !important;
}

/* 밑 선/잔상선 제거 유지 */
.side-keywords span::after,
.keyword-rain span::after {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 내부 홈 키워드 레이어도 첫 화면에서 보이지 않게 거의 숨김 */
.scroll-keywords,
.keyword-rain {
  opacity: clamp(0, calc((var(--homeScrollMotion, 0) - .18) * 3), .35) !important;
}

/* 모바일도 동일하게 첫 화면에서는 숨김 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .global-side-keywords {
    opacity: clamp(0, calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) - .12) * 7), .72) !important;
  }

  .side-keywords span {
    top: calc(188vh + (var(--i) * 17vh)) !important;
  }

  .statue-img {
    -webkit-mask-image:
      linear-gradient(
        to bottom,
        black 0%,
        black 54%,
        rgba(0,0,0,.75) 62%,
        rgba(0,0,0,.30) 72%,
        transparent 84%,
        transparent 100%
      ) !important;
    mask-image:
      linear-gradient(
        to bottom,
        black 0%,
        black 54%,
        rgba(0,0,0,.75) 62%,
        rgba(0,0,0,.30) 72%,
        transparent 84%,
        transparent 100%
      ) !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v21 update:
   - 조각상 뒤에 보이던 네모 박스 제거
   - 조각상을 화면에 더 크게 배치
   - 배경은 Surface Color #020205 유지
========================================================= */

/* 검은 사각 이미지 영역이 보이지 않도록 블렌딩 처리 */
.statue-img {
  mix-blend-mode: screen !important;
  opacity: .92 !important;
  filter:
    contrast(.98)
    brightness(.92)
    saturate(.88) !important;
}

/* 조각상 자체를 더 크게, 화면 중심 비주얼로 확장 */
.statue-wrap {
  width: min(82vw, 980px) !important;
  height: min(108svh, 1080px) !important;
  transform:
    translate3d(0, calc(14vh + (var(--homeScrollStepped, 0) * -4.2vh)), 0)
    scale(calc(1 + (var(--homeScrollMotion, 0) * .028))) !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

/* 이미지가 사각 패널처럼 보이지 않도록 주변 광원만 아주 약하게 */
.statue-wrap::before {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 36%, rgba(255,255,255,.075), transparent 48%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 58%, rgba(255,255,255,.035), transparent 56%) !important;
  filter: blur(24px) !important;
  opacity: .68 !important;
}

.statue-stage {
  background: transparent !important;
}

/* 기존 하단 덮개/패널 완전 제거 */
.statue-wrap::after {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 조각상은 허벅지 아래로 자연스럽게만 사라지게 */
.statue-img {
  -webkit-mask-image:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      black 0%,
      black 58%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.88) 66%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.48) 76%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.14) 86%,
      transparent 96%,
      transparent 100%
    ) !important;
  mask-image:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      black 0%,
      black 58%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.88) 66%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.48) 76%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.14) 86%,
      transparent 96%,
      transparent 100%
    ) !important;
}

/* 네모 박스처럼 보이던 중앙 배경 영역 제거 */
.hero-inner,
.hero,
.hero-vignette {
  background-color: #020205 !important;
}

.hero-vignette {
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 38%, rgba(240,245,255,.06) 0%, rgba(2,2,5,0) 46%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(2,2,5,0) 0%, rgba(2,2,5,.44) 82%, #020205 100%) !important;
}

/* 제목과 좌우 텍스트가 커진 이미지에 눌리지 않게 위계 유지 */
.hero-copy {
  z-index: 14 !important;
}

.cta-row {
  z-index: 13 !important;
}

/* 모바일에서도 조각상은 크게 보이되 잘림 방지 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .statue-wrap {
    width: min(138vw, 760px) !important;
    height: min(88svh, 820px) !important;
    transform:
      translate3d(0, calc(14vh + (var(--homeScrollStepped, 0) * -2.4vh)), 0)
      scale(calc(1 + (var(--homeScrollMotion, 0) * .018))) !important;
  }

  .statue-img {
    opacity: .9 !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v22 update:
   - 어색하게 추가로 보이던 하단 다리 제거
   - 키워드 상승 모션을 stepped 값이 아닌 continuous scroll 값으로 통일
   - 텍스트가 끊겨 올라가는 느낌 완화
========================================================= */

/* 조각상 하단: 허벅지 아래가 더 이상 길게 보이지 않도록 더 빨리/부드럽게 페이드 */
.statue-img {
  -webkit-mask-image:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      black 0%,
      black 50%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.84) 58%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.48) 65%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.16) 72%,
      transparent 80%,
      transparent 100%
    ) !important;
  mask-image:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      black 0%,
      black 50%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.84) 58%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.48) 65%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.16) 72%,
      transparent 80%,
      transparent 100%
    ) !important;
}

/* 화면 하단으로 이어지는 검은 박스/다리처럼 보이는 영역 제거 */
.statue-wrap {
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

.statue-wrap::after {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 조각상 높이를 약간 줄여 하단 잔상이 다음 섹션으로 넘어오지 않게 */
.statue-wrap {
  height: min(100svh, 980px) !important;
  transform:
    translate3d(0, calc(13vh + (var(--homeScrollMotion, 0) * -3vh)), 0)
    scale(calc(1 + (var(--homeScrollMotion, 0) * .022))) !important;
}

/* 키워드 상승 모션: stepped 값을 사용하지 않고 continuous 값으로 통일 */
.side-keywords span {
  transform:
    translateX(calc(-50% + (sin((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * var(--wave, 8) + var(--i)) * 1rad) * var(--amp, 12px))))
    translateY(calc(var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * -390vh + var(--drift)))
    rotate(calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) * var(--wave, 8) - var(--i)) * var(--rotate, .7deg)))
    scale(calc(.94 + (var(--depth, .5) * .10))) !important;
  transition: none !important;
  will-change: transform, opacity;
}

/* 기존 홈 내부 키워드도 끊기는 stepped 느낌을 줄이고 continuous로 변경 */
.scroll-keywords span {
  transform:
    translate3d(
      calc((var(--homeScrollMotion, 0) - var(--delay)) * 18px),
      calc((var(--homeScrollMotion, 0) - var(--delay)) * -1 * var(--rise)),
      0
    )
    rotate(calc((var(--homeScrollMotion, 0) - var(--delay)) * -5deg)) !important;
  transition: none !important;
}

/* keyword-rain도 continuous 기준으로 통일 */
.keyword-rain span {
  transform:
    translate3d(
      calc(var(--drift) * var(--homeScrollMotion, 0)),
      calc((var(--homeScrollMotion, 0) - var(--delay)) * -1 * var(--rise)),
      0
    )
    rotate(calc((var(--homeScrollMotion, 0) - var(--delay)) * -2.4deg)) !important;
  transition: none !important;
}

/* 기획 의도 섹션 등장도 stepped 없이 연속값으로 */
.statement-box {
  transform:
    translate3d(0, calc((1 - var(--intentMotion, 0)) * 54px), 0)
    scale(calc(.985 + (var(--intentMotion, 0) * .015))) !important;
  opacity: calc(.15 + (var(--intentMotion, 0) * .85)) !important;
  filter: blur(calc((1 - var(--intentMotion, 0)) * 8px)) !important;
}

/* 스크롤 스냅이 키워드 흐름을 갑자기 점프시키는 느낌을 줄이기 위해 약화 */
html {
  scroll-snap-type: none !important;
}

/* 배경 Surface 통일 유지 */
html,
body,
main,
.section,
.hero,
.statement,
.about,
.hero-inner,
.statue-stage,
.statue-wrap {
  background: #020205 !important;
  background-color: #020205 !important;
}

/* 모바일 하단 잔상 방지 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  .statue-img {
    -webkit-mask-image:
      linear-gradient(
        to bottom,
        black 0%,
        black 48%,
        rgba(0,0,0,.72) 56%,
        rgba(0,0,0,.28) 65%,
        transparent 76%,
        transparent 100%
      ) !important;
    mask-image:
      linear-gradient(
        to bottom,
        black 0%,
        black 48%,
        rgba(0,0,0,.72) 56%,
        rgba(0,0,0,.28) 65%,
        transparent 76%,
        transparent 100%
      ) !important;
  }

  .statue-wrap {
    height: min(82svh, 760px) !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v23 update:
   - 이미지 자체의 남은 검은 배경/하단 다리 잔상을 투명 처리한 PNG로 교체
   - 사각 패널이 보이지 않도록 배경/블렌딩 정리
   - 키워드는 연속형 모션 유지
========================================================= */

html,
body,
main,
.section,
.hero,
.statement,
.about,
.hero-inner,
.statue-stage,
.statue-wrap {
  background: #020205 !important;
  background-color: #020205 !important;
}

body {
  background: #020205 !important;
}

body::before,
body::after,
.hero::before {
  opacity: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
}

.statue-img {
  mix-blend-mode: normal !important;
  opacity: .94 !important;
  filter:
    contrast(.98)
    brightness(.94)
    saturate(.88)
    drop-shadow(0 34px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.60)) !important;
  /* 이미지 파일에서 이미 하단 페이드와 배경 제거 처리했기 때문에 CSS 마스크는 약하게만 */
  -webkit-mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, black 0%, black 82%, rgba(0,0,0,.5) 94%, transparent 100%) !important;
  mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, black 0%, black 82%, rgba(0,0,0,.5) 94%, transparent 100%) !important;
}

.statue-wrap {
  overflow: visible !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

.statue-wrap::after {
  display: none !important;
}

.statue-wrap::before {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 36%, rgba(255,255,255,.058), transparent 46%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 58%, rgba(255,255,255,.025), transparent 58%) !important;
  filter: blur(26px) !important;
  opacity: .58 !important;
}

.hero-vignette {
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 38%, rgba(240,245,255,.045) 0%, rgba(2,2,5,0) 48%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(2,2,5,0) 0%, rgba(2,2,5,.36) 82%, #020205 100%) !important;
}

/* 키워드 움직임은 연속형으로 유지 */
html {
  scroll-snap-type: none !important;
}

.side-keywords span,
.scroll-keywords span,
.keyword-rain span {
  transition: none !important;
  will-change: transform, opacity;
}

/* 첫 화면 정지 상태에서는 사이드 키워드가 보이지 않도록 유지 */
.global-side-keywords {
  opacity: clamp(0, calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) - .11) * 8), .96) !important;
}

.side-keywords span {
  top: calc(178vh + (var(--i) * 16vh)) !important;
  opacity: calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) - .12) * 6.5) !important;
}

.side-keywords span::after,
.keyword-rain span::after {
  display: none !important;
}


/* =========================================================
   v24 update:
   - 화면 중간/하단에 보이던 검은 네모 단차 제거
   - 상단 레이아웃/조각상/타이포 위치는 건드리지 않음
   - Surface Color #020205 유지
========================================================= */

/* 이전 버전에서 Home 하단 여운용으로 만든 사각 그라디언트가
   배경과 분리되어 보였기 때문에 완전히 제거 */
.hero::after {
  display: none !important;
  content: none !important;
  background: transparent !important;
}

/* Hero와 다음 섹션 사이에 남는 모든 가상 배경 레이어 제거 */
.hero::before,
.statement::before,
.statement::after,
.about::before,
.about::after {
  background: transparent !important;
  opacity: 0 !important;
}

/* 스크롤 연결 영역 전체를 같은 Surface Color로 강제 */
html,
body,
main,
.hero,
.statement,
.about,
.section,
.hero-inner {
  background: #020205 !important;
  background-color: #020205 !important;
}

/* 중앙 아래쪽에 남는 패널감 방지: 섹션 내부도 투명하게 */
.statement-box,
.about-card {
  background: transparent !important;
  background-color: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

/* 조각상 주변 광원은 유지하되, 하단 박스처럼 보이지 않게 아래쪽 영향 제거 */
.hero-vignette {
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 34%, rgba(240,245,255,.045) 0%, rgba(2,2,5,0) 50%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(2,2,5,0) 0%, rgba(2,2,5,.18) 74%, #020205 100%) !important;
}

/* 이미지 자체가 남기는 미세한 하단 사각 단차를 방지 */
.statue-wrap {
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

.statue-wrap::after {
  display: none !important;
}

/* 홈 화면 위쪽은 유지하고, 아래로 갈수록 배경과 자연스럽게 섞이도록만 보정 */
.statue-img {
  -webkit-mask-image:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      black 0%,
      black 56%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.88) 64%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.44) 73%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.10) 82%,
      transparent 92%,
      transparent 100%
    ) !important;
  mask-image:
    linear-gradient(
      to bottom,
      black 0%,
      black 56%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.88) 64%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.44) 73%,
      rgba(0,0,0,.10) 82%,
      transparent 92%,
      transparent 100%
    ) !important;
}

/* 기획 의도 섹션 상단에 어두운 사각 경계가 보이지 않도록 여백 배경 통일 */
.statement {
  background: #020205 !important;
  background-image: none !important;
}

/* 사이드 키워드 레이어는 유지하되, 배경색 차이를 만들지 않도록 혼합 효과 제거 */
.global-side-keywords {
  mix-blend-mode: normal !important;
}

/* 기능 오버레이도 같은 Surface Color */
#emotion.section,
#cloud.section {
  background: #020205 !important;
  background-color: #020205 !important;
  background-image: none !important;
}


/* =========================================================
   v24-3 focused fix:
   - 기획 의도 슬라이드에서만 위로 올라가는 텍스트 보이게 보강
   - 홈 화면에서는 함께 남은 감정 메뉴가 선택된 것처럼 밝아 보이지 않게 조정
   - 다른 레이아웃/조각상/배경은 건드리지 않음
========================================================= */

/* 1) 상단 현재 위치 표시 정리: 기본 active 밝기 제거 */
.nav-line a,
.nav-line a.active {
  color: rgba(235, 238, 246, .46) !important;
}

.nav-line a::after,
.nav-line a.active::after {
  width: 0 !important;
}

/* hover는 유지 */
.nav-line a:hover {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.82) !important;
}

.nav-line a:hover::after {
  width: 100% !important;
}

/* 실제 현재 위치만 밝게 */
body:not(.view-emotion):not(.view-cloud) .nav-line a[href="#home"].is-current,
body.view-emotion .nav-line a[href="#emotion"].is-current,
body.view-cloud .nav-line a[href="#cloud"].is-current,
body:not(.view-emotion):not(.view-cloud) .nav-line a[href="#about"].is-current {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.90) !important;
}

body:not(.view-emotion):not(.view-cloud) .nav-line a[href="#home"].is-current::after,
body.view-emotion .nav-line a[href="#emotion"].is-current::after,
body.view-cloud .nav-line a[href="#cloud"].is-current::after,
body:not(.view-emotion):not(.view-cloud) .nav-line a[href="#about"].is-current::after {
  width: 100% !important;
}

/* 홈 화면일 때 다른 메뉴는 모두 낮은 대비 */
body:not(.view-emotion):not(.view-cloud) .nav-line a:not(.is-current) {
  color: rgba(235,238,246,.42) !important;
}

/* 2) 기획 의도 섹션 전용 상승 키워드 */
.statement {
  overflow: hidden;
}

.statement-rise-keywords {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 1;
  pointer-events: none;
  overflow: hidden;
  opacity: calc(var(--intentMotion, 0) * .95);
}

.statement-box {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;
}

.statement-rise-keywords span {
  position: absolute;
  left: var(--x);
  top: var(--y);
  white-space: nowrap;
  color: rgba(232,236,244,.20);
  font-family:
    "Pretendard Variable", "Pretendard",
    "SUIT Variable", "Noto Sans KR",
    "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Malgun Gothic",
    system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(13px, 1.1vw, 20px);
  font-weight: 520;
  letter-spacing: -.045em;
  text-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(255,255,255,.07);
  transform:
    translate3d(
      calc(var(--drift) * var(--intentMotion, 0)),
      calc((var(--intentMotion, 0) - var(--delay)) * -1 * var(--rise)),
      0
    )
    rotate(calc((var(--intentMotion, 0) - var(--delay)) * -3deg));
  opacity: calc((var(--intentMotion, 0) - var(--delay)) * 2.4);
  will-change: transform, opacity;
}

.statement-rise-keywords span:nth-child(2n) {
  color: rgba(232,236,244,.13);
  font-family: "Nanum Myeongjo", "Noto Serif KR", "Batang", serif;
  font-size: clamp(15px, 1.3vw, 24px);
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -.075em;
}

.statement-rise-keywords span:nth-child(3n) {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.24);
}

/* 기획 의도 슬라이드에 들어오면 기존 사이드 키워드도 조금 보이게만 보강 */
.global-side-keywords {
  opacity: max(
    clamp(0, calc((var(--pageScrollMotion, 0) - .11) * 8), .96),
    calc(var(--intentMotion, 0) * .58)
  ) !important;
}


/* =========================================================
   v24-4 focused fix:
   - 감정을 꺼내는 공간만 수정
   - 감정 공간에서 스크롤을 내리면 상단 메뉴 숨김
   - 그리기/쓰기 대시보드 범위 확장
   - 다른 섹션/홈/어바웃/함께 남은 감정은 건드리지 않음
========================================================= */

/* 감정을 꺼내는 공간 안에서만 상단 메뉴 숨김 */
body.view-emotion.emotion-scrolled .site-header {
  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-48px) !important;
  opacity: 0 !important;
  filter: blur(8px) !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

/* 감정을 꺼내는 공간 오버레이 내부 여백만 조정 */
body.view-emotion #emotion.section {
  padding-left: clamp(10px, 1.6vw, 28px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(10px, 1.6vw, 28px) !important;
  padding-bottom: clamp(32px, 4vw, 54px) !important;
}

/* 감정 공간의 상단 설명/컨트롤 폭 확장 */
body.view-emotion #emotion .section-head,
body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-controls {
  width: min(1760px, 98vw) !important;
}

/* 그리거나 쓸 수 있는 대시보드만 더 크게 */
body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-stage {
  width: min(1760px, 98vw) !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  height: min(84svh, 860px) !important;
  min-height: 720px !important;
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
}

/* 큰 대시보드에서도 안내 문구가 너무 안쪽으로 밀리지 않게 */
body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-stage::before {
  left: clamp(18px, 2vw, 34px) !important;
  top: clamp(18px, 2vw, 34px) !important;
}

/* 모바일에서는 화면이 답답하지 않게 높이만 적당히 확장 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  body.view-emotion #emotion.section {
    padding-left: 10px !important;
    padding-right: 10px !important;
  }

  body.view-emotion #emotion .section-head,
  body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-controls {
    width: 100% !important;
  }

  body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-stage {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 78svh !important;
    min-height: 660px !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v24-5 focused update:
   - 감정을 꺼내는 공간만 수정
   - 우측 hover 툴 패널 추가
   - 선택/그리기/텍스트 모드 추가
   - 브러시 색상 #F316B0 / #0FD86E 및 5가지 굵기/5가지 방식 추가
   - 감정 대시보드 오른쪽 사용 범위 확장
========================================================= */

/* 감정 대시보드 좌우 사용 범위 확장 */
body.view-emotion #emotion.section {
  padding-left: clamp(6px, 1vw, 18px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(6px, 1vw, 18px) !important;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion .section-head,
body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-controls {
  width: min(1880px, 99vw) !important;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-stage {
  width: min(1880px, 99vw) !important;
  height: min(86svh, 900px) !important;
  min-height: 740px !important;
}

/* 기존 캔버스는 보이지만 새 SVG 드로잉 레이어가 입력을 담당 */
body.view-emotion #drawCanvas {
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

#emotionSvgLayer {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 2;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: visible;
  pointer-events: auto;
}

#emotionLayer {
  z-index: 3;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-select #emotionLayer,
body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-text #emotionLayer {
  pointer-events: auto !important;
}

.emotion-note,
.emotion-chip,
.mode-text-note {
  user-select: none;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-select .emotion-note,
body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-select .emotion-chip,
body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-select .mode-text-note,
body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-select .emotion-svg-stroke {
  cursor: grab;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-select .is-dragging {
  cursor: grabbing !important;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-draw .emotion-stage {
  cursor: crosshair !important;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-text .emotion-stage {
  cursor: text !important;
}

/* 텍스트 모드에서 생성되는 텍스트 */
.mode-text-note {
  position: absolute;
  min-width: 48px;
  max-width: min(560px, 74%);
  padding: 4px 6px;
  color: rgba(248,248,245,.90);
  font-size: var(--text-size, 22px);
  font-weight: var(--text-weight, 520);
  line-height: 1.45;
  letter-spacing: -.035em;
  outline: none;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: transparent;
  text-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.72);
  transform: rotate(var(--rotate, 0deg));
  opacity: .92;
}

.mode-text-note:focus {
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.18);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.035);
}

.emotion-note,
.emotion-chip,
.mode-text-note,
.emotion-svg-stroke {
  transform-origin: center center;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-select .emotion-note.is-selected,
body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-select .emotion-chip.is-selected,
body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-select .mode-text-note.is-selected {
  outline: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.38);
  box-shadow:
    0 0 0 6px rgba(255,255,255,.055),
    0 22px 54px rgba(0,0,0,.26);
}

/* SVG stroke */
.emotion-svg-stroke {
  fill: none;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-linejoin: round;
  vector-effect: none;
  transform-box: fill-box;
  pointer-events: stroke;
  filter: var(--brush-filter, none);
}

body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-select .emotion-svg-stroke.is-selected {
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,.52)) var(--brush-filter, none);
}

.selection-transform-box {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 16;
  display: none;
  border: 1px solid rgba(232,238,248,.78);
  border-radius: 4px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(232,238,248,.22), rgba(232,238,248,0)) 0 0 / 36px 1px no-repeat,
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(232,238,248,.22), rgba(232,238,248,0)) 0 0 / 1px 36px no-repeat,
    linear-gradient(270deg, rgba(232,238,248,.22), rgba(232,238,248,0)) 100% 100% / 36px 1px no-repeat,
    linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(232,238,248,.22), rgba(232,238,248,0)) 100% 100% / 1px 36px no-repeat;
  box-shadow:
    0 0 0 1px rgba(5,6,10,.62),
    0 0 28px rgba(183,204,238,.16),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  pointer-events: auto;
  transform-origin: center center;
}

.selection-transform-box.is-visible {
  display: block;
}

.selection-transform-box::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  top: 50%;
  width: 5px;
  height: 5px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(232,238,248,.82);
  box-shadow:
    0 0 0 1px rgba(4,6,12,.85),
    0 0 12px rgba(232,238,248,.34);
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.selection-handle {
  position: absolute;
  width: 11px;
  height: 11px;
  padding: 0;
  border: 1px solid rgba(3,5,10,.92);
  border-radius: 3px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.98), rgba(202,213,229,.92));
  box-shadow:
    0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.22),
    0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.34);
}

.selection-handle[data-handle="nw"] { left: -6px; top: -6px; cursor: nwse-resize; }
.selection-handle[data-handle="ne"] { right: -6px; top: -6px; cursor: nesw-resize; }
.selection-handle[data-handle="sw"] { left: -6px; bottom: -6px; cursor: nesw-resize; }
.selection-handle[data-handle="se"] { right: -6px; bottom: -6px; cursor: nwse-resize; }
.selection-handle[data-handle="rotate"] {
  left: 50%;
  top: -34px;
  width: 14px;
  height: 14px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  cursor: grab;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 42% 38%, #fff 0 28%, rgba(218,228,244,.96) 29% 100%);
}

.selection-handle[data-handle="rotate"]::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  top: 13px;
  width: 1px;
  height: 21px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.42);
  transform: translateX(-50%);
}

body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-erase .emotion-stage {
  cursor: none !important;
}

.eraser-cursor {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 18;
  display: none;
  width: var(--eraser-size, 28px);
  height: var(--eraser-size, 28px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.82);
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.055);
  box-shadow:
    0 0 0 1px rgba(2,2,5,.62),
    0 0 24px rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  pointer-events: none;
  translate: -50% -50%;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion.mode-erase .eraser-cursor.is-visible {
  display: block;
}

.erase-spot {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 3;
  display: block;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle, rgba(2,3,6,.98) 0 58%, rgba(2,3,6,.88) 72%, rgba(2,3,6,0) 100%);
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(2,3,6,.32);
  pointer-events: none;
}

/* 우측 hover 툴 패널 */
.emotion-tool-hotzone {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  right: 0;
  width: 86px;
  height: 100svh;
  z-index: 120;
  display: none;
}

body.view-emotion .emotion-tool-hotzone {
  display: block;
}

body.view-emotion.selection-drag-active .emotion-tool-hotzone {
  pointer-events: none;
}

body.view-emotion.eraser-drag-active .emotion-tool-hotzone {
  pointer-events: none;
}

body.view-emotion.tools-disabled .emotion-tool-hotzone {
  width: 34px;
}

.emotion-tool-panel {
  position: fixed;
  top: 50%;
  right: 18px;
  z-index: 130;
  width: 236px;
  max-height: min(82svh, 720px);
  overflow: auto;
  transform: translate(122%, -50%);
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  padding: 14px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.11);
  border-radius: 24px;
  background: rgba(2,2,5,.82);
  box-shadow: 0 26px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.54);
  backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
  transition: transform .36s cubic-bezier(.18,.84,.24,1), opacity .28s ease;
}

body.view-emotion:not(.tools-disabled) .emotion-tool-hotzone:hover .emotion-tool-panel,
body.view-emotion:not(.tools-disabled) .emotion-tool-panel:hover,
body.view-emotion:not(.tools-disabled) .emotion-tool-panel.is-open {
  transform: translate(0, -50%);
  opacity: 1;
  pointer-events: auto;
}

body.view-emotion.selection-drag-active .emotion-tool-panel {
  transform: translate(122%, -50%) !important;
  opacity: 0 !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

body.view-emotion.eraser-drag-active .emotion-tool-panel {
  transform: translate(122%, -50%) !important;
  opacity: 0 !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

.emotion-tool-tab {
  position: fixed;
  top: 50%;
  right: 10px;
  z-index: 125;
  display: none;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  writing-mode: vertical-rl;
  color: rgba(235,238,246,.54);
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: .14em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  pointer-events: none;
}

body.view-emotion .emotion-tool-tab {
  display: block;
}

body.view-emotion:not(.tools-disabled) .emotion-tool-hotzone:hover .emotion-tool-tab,
body.view-emotion:not(.tools-disabled) .emotion-tool-panel:hover + .emotion-tool-tab {
  opacity: 0;
}

.emotion-tool-panel h3 {
  margin: 0 0 10px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.88);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 650;
  letter-spacing: -.02em;
}

.tool-group {
  padding: 10px 0;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);
}

.tool-group:first-child {
  border-top: 0;
  padding-top: 0;
}

.tool-label {
  display: block;
  margin: 0 0 8px;
  color: rgba(235,238,246,.38);
  font-size: 10px;
  letter-spacing: .16em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.tool-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 7px;
}

.tool-btn {
  min-width: 34px;
  height: 32px;
  padding: 0 10px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: rgba(235,238,246,.66);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.035);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 12px;
  transition: background .2s ease, color .2s ease, border-color .2s ease, transform .2s ease;
}

.tool-btn:hover {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.92);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.22);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

.tool-btn.active {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.94);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.32);
}

.color-dot {
  width: 30px;
  min-width: 30px;
  padding: 0;
}

.color-dot::before {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 14px;
  height: 14px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--swatch);
  box-shadow: 0 0 16px color-mix(in srgb, var(--swatch) 38%, transparent);
}

.tool-hint {
  margin: 8px 0 0;
  color: rgba(235,238,246,.34);
  font-size: 11px;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.tool-toggle-floating {
  position: fixed;
  right: 18px;
  bottom: 18px;
  z-index: 132;
  display: none;
  height: 34px;
  padding: 0 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.13);
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: rgba(235,238,246,.62);
  background: rgba(2,2,5,.72);
  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 11px;
}

body.view-emotion .tool-toggle-floating {
  display: block;
}

body.view-emotion.tools-disabled .tool-toggle-floating {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.86);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.24);
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-stage {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 80svh !important;
    min-height: 690px !important;
  }

  .emotion-tool-panel {
    width: min(230px, calc(100vw - 34px));
    right: 12px;
  }

  .emotion-tool-hotzone {
    width: 54px;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v24-6 focused update:
   - 감정을 꺼내는 공간만 정리
   - tools on/off 위치 개선
   - 우측 툴 패널 위치/사용성 개선
   - section head 정렬 보정
   - 흰색 soft/solid 펜 가시성 강화
========================================================= */

/* 섹션 헤더를 대시보드 안내 문구 기준선과 맞춤 */
body.view-emotion #emotion .section-head {
  width: min(1880px, 99vw) !important;
  padding-left: clamp(18px, 2vw, 34px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(18px, 2vw, 34px) !important;
  align-items: start !important;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion .section-head > div {
  padding-top: 0 !important;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion .section-head > p {
  width: min(520px, 34vw) !important;
  max-width: 520px !important;
  margin-top: clamp(4px, .6vw, 10px) !important;
  margin-right: clamp(8px, 1vw, 18px) !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  line-height: 1.72 !important;
  color: rgba(226,230,238,.50) !important;
}

/* 대시보드 오른쪽까지 더 안정적으로 사용 */
body.view-emotion #emotion.section {
  padding-left: clamp(6px, .8vw, 16px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(6px, .8vw, 16px) !important;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-stage {
  width: min(1920px, 99.2vw) !important;
  height: min(86svh, 900px) !important;
  min-height: 740px !important;
}

/* 우측 툴 패널: 너무 끝에 붙지 않게 안쪽으로 이동 + 폭 확장 */
.emotion-tool-hotzone {
  width: 150px !important;
}

.emotion-tool-panel {
  right: clamp(42px, 4.2vw, 78px) !important;
  width: 276px !important;
  padding: 16px !important;
  border-radius: 26px !important;
}

/* 모드 버튼은 한눈에 누르기 편하게 3등분 */
.emotion-tool-panel [data-tool-group="mode"] {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr) !important;
  gap: 8px !important;
}

.emotion-tool-panel [data-tool-group="mode"] .tool-btn {
  width: 100% !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  height: 38px !important;
  padding: 0 8px !important;
  font-size: 11.5px !important;
}

/* on/off 버튼은 우측 중하단에 확실히 보이게 */
.tool-toggle-floating {
  right: clamp(42px, 4.2vw, 78px) !important;
  bottom: clamp(28px, 4vh, 46px) !important;
  height: 40px !important;
  padding: 0 16px !important;
  border-radius: 999px !important;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.82) !important;
  background: rgba(2,2,5,.86) !important;
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.24) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.48) !important;
  font-size: 12px !important;
  letter-spacing: .02em !important;
}

body.view-emotion.tools-disabled .tool-toggle-floating {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.94) !important;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.10) !important;
}

/* 툴 탭도 위치를 패널과 맞춤 */
.emotion-tool-tab {
  right: clamp(16px, 2vw, 30px) !important;
  color: rgba(235,238,246,.64) !important;
}

/* 흰색 펜이 더 선명하게 보이도록 SVG 기본 렌더링 보정 */
.emotion-svg-stroke[stroke*="246"],
.emotion-svg-stroke[stroke*="248"],
.emotion-svg-stroke[stroke*="245"] {
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,.08)) var(--brush-filter, none) !important;
}

/* 텍스트 편집 중 빠져나가는 힌트 */
.mode-text-note:focus::after {
  content: "";
}

/* 모바일에서도 버튼이 안 보이지 않게 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  body.view-emotion #emotion .section-head {
    padding-left: 12px !important;
    padding-right: 12px !important;
  }

  body.view-emotion #emotion .section-head > p {
    width: 100% !important;
    max-width: none !important;
    margin-right: 0 !important;
  }

  .emotion-tool-panel {
    right: 14px !important;
    width: min(276px, calc(100vw - 30px)) !important;
  }

  .tool-toggle-floating {
    right: 14px !important;
    bottom: 16px !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   v24-7 focused update:
   - 감정을 꺼내는 공간만 수정
   - 중복 안내 문구 제거
   - 입력창 placeholder 문구 변경
   - tools on/off 버튼 눌린 느낌 강화
   - 하단 입력창/비우기/남기기 위치 조정
========================================================= */

/* 대시보드 안쪽 중복 안내 문구 제거 */
body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-stage::before {
  content: none !important;
  display: none !important;
}

/* 하단 입력/버튼 영역이 화면 끝과 tools 버튼에 붙지 않도록 정리 */
body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-controls {
  width: min(1420px, calc(100vw - 240px)) !important;
  max-width: 1420px !important;
  margin: clamp(18px, 2.2vh, 28px) auto 0 !important;
  padding-left: clamp(18px, 2vw, 36px) !important;
  padding-right: clamp(18px, 2vw, 36px) !important;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 1fr) auto !important;
  align-items: center !important;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-input {
  height: 54px !important;
  padding-left: 22px !important;
  padding-right: 22px !important;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-input::placeholder {
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.34) !important;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion .control-buttons {
  padding-right: clamp(8px, 1vw, 18px) !important;
}

body.view-emotion #emotion .control-buttons button {
  height: 54px !important;
  min-width: 86px !important;
  padding-left: 20px !important;
  padding-right: 20px !important;
}

/* tools on/off 버튼: 더 눌러진 물리 버튼 느낌 */
.tool-toggle-floating {
  height: 42px !important;
  min-width: 96px !important;
  padding: 0 17px !important;
  border-radius: 999px !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.22) !important;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.82) !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.12), rgba(255,255,255,.035)),
    rgba(2,2,5,.88) !important;
  box-shadow:
    0 14px 36px rgba(0,0,0,.50),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.14),
    inset 0 -3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.42) !important;
  transform: translateY(0) !important;
  transition:
    transform .16s ease,
    box-shadow .16s ease,
    background .16s ease,
    color .16s ease !important;
}

.tool-toggle-floating:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px) !important;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.94) !important;
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.32) !important;
}

.tool-toggle-floating:active {
  transform: translateY(2px) !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.035), rgba(255,255,255,.10)),
    rgba(2,2,5,.92) !important;
  box-shadow:
    0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.42),
    inset 0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.56),
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important;
}

/* off 상태는 확실히 눌린/잠긴 느낌 */
body.view-emotion.tools-disabled .tool-toggle-floating {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.92) !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.055), rgba(255,255,255,.015)),
    rgba(2,2,5,.96) !important;
  box-shadow:
    0 5px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.46),
    inset 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.62),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important;
  transform: translateY(2px) !important;
}

/* 모바일에서는 입력창이 너무 좁아지지 않게 세로 배치 */
@media (max-width: 860px) {
  body.view-emotion #emotion .emotion-controls {
    width: calc(100vw - 28px) !important;
    padding-left: 0 !important;
    padding-right: 0 !important;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
    gap: 10px !important;
  }

  body.view-emotion #emotion .control-buttons {
    padding-right: 0 !important;
  }

  body.view-emotion #emotion .control-buttons button {
    flex: 1 !important;
  }

  .tool-toggle-floating {
    min-width: 88px !important;
    height: 38px !important;
  }
}

/* Final cloud view: ordered keyword cluster */
#cloud .cloud-stage::before,
#cloud .cloud-stage::after {
  content: none !important;
  display: none !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-stage {
  min-height: min(78svh, 760px) !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,.035), rgba(255,255,255,.008)),
    rgba(3,4,8,.70) !important;
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 0 100px rgba(0,0,0,.58),
    inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.035) !important;
}

#cloudWords {
  position: absolute !important;
  inset: 0 !important;
  z-index: 3 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-word {
  padding: 0 !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  color: rgba(var(--word-rgb, 232,238,248),var(--word-alpha, .72)) !important;
  font-weight: var(--word-weight, 560) !important;
  letter-spacing: 0 !important;
  line-height: .98 !important;
  text-align: center !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  text-shadow: none !important;
  transform:
    translate(-50%, -50%)
    rotate(var(--rot)) !important;
  animation: none !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-word.major {
  color: rgba(var(--word-rgb, 255,255,255),var(--word-alpha, .94)) !important;
  font-weight: var(--word-weight, 760) !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-word.phrase {
  letter-spacing: 0 !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-note {
  display: none !important;
}

@keyframes radialCloudPulse {
  0%, 100% {
    opacity: var(--word-alpha, .72);
    filter: blur(0);
    transform:
      translate(-50%, -50%)
      rotate(var(--rot))
      translate3d(0, 0, 0) !important;
  }
  50% {
    opacity: calc(var(--word-alpha, .72) + .06);
    filter: blur(var(--soft-blur, 0px));
    transform:
      translate(-50%, -50%)
      rotate(var(--rot))
      translate3d(0, var(--float-y, -7px), 0) !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  #cloud .cloud-stage {
    min-height: 72svh !important;
  }
}



/* =========================================================
   Requested revision v25:
   - 함께 남은 감정만 수정
   - 많이 언급된 감정일수록 중심에 크게/밝게 배치
   - 퍼즐 조각처럼 중심에서 바깥으로 퍼지는 키워드 구조
========================================================= */
#cloud .cloud-stage {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(255,255,255,.055), transparent 22rem),
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(120,150,190,.06), transparent 44rem),
    rgba(3,4,8,.70) !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-word {
  padding: .18em .34em !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,var(--piece-line, .08)) !important;
  border-radius: 2px 10px 3px 12px !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg,
      rgba(255,255,255,var(--piece-light, .075)),
      rgba(255,255,255,var(--piece-dark, .018))
    ) !important;
  box-shadow:
    inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,var(--piece-top, .12)),
    inset -1px -1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.28),
    0 0 var(--piece-glow, 18px) rgba(255,255,255,var(--piece-glow-alpha, .035)) !important;
  clip-path: polygon(
    7% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 72%, 91% 72%,
    91% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 28%, 7% 28%
  );
  color: rgba(245,248,255,var(--word-alpha, .72)) !important;
  transform:
    translate(-50%, -50%)
    rotate(var(--rot))
    translate(var(--spread-x, 0px), var(--spread-y, 0px)) !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-word:nth-child(3n) {
  border-radius: 12px 2px 10px 3px !important;
  clip-path: polygon(
    0% 0%, 90% 0%, 90% 23%, 100% 23%,
    100% 100%, 9% 100%, 9% 75%, 0% 75%
  );
}

#cloud .cloud-word:nth-child(4n) {
  border-radius: 8px 3px 14px 2px !important;
  clip-path: polygon(
    4% 0%, 100% 0%, 100% 30%, 94% 30%,
    94% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 68%, 4% 68%
  );
}

#cloud .cloud-word.major {
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,var(--piece-line, .16)) !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg,
      rgba(255,255,255,var(--piece-light, .13)),
      rgba(255,255,255,var(--piece-dark, .035))
    ) !important;
}



/* =========================================================
   Requested revision v26:
   - 함께 남은 감정만 수정
   - 퍼즐 모양 제거, 글자 크기 차이로 생기는 빈 공간을 작은 단어가 채우는 조판
   - 기본은 지구본처럼 응축된 구형 클라우드
   - 클릭하면 크기/명도 위계를 유지한 채 평면적으로 펼쳐짐
========================================================= */
#cloud .cloud-stage {
  cursor: pointer !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 45%, rgba(255,255,255,.075), transparent 15rem),
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(105,130,170,.085), transparent 34rem),
    rgba(3,4,8,.70) !important;
  perspective: 980px !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-stage::before {
  content: "클릭하면 감정들이 평면으로 펼쳐집니다" !important;
  display: block !important;
  position: absolute !important;
  right: clamp(18px, 3vw, 42px) !important;
  top: clamp(14px, 2.4vw, 32px) !important;
  z-index: 4 !important;
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.30) !important;
  font-size: clamp(11px, .9vw, 13px) !important;
  letter-spacing: -.02em !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-stage.is-flat::before {
  content: "클릭하면 다시 모입니다" !important;
}

#cloudWords {
  transform-style: preserve-3d !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-word {
  padding: 0 !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  clip-path: none !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  color: rgba(245,248,255,var(--word-alpha, .62)) !important;
  font-size: var(--word-size, 32px) !important;
  font-weight: var(--word-weight, 520) !important;
  letter-spacing: var(--word-track, -.045em) !important;
  line-height: .92 !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  text-align: center !important;
  left: var(--globe-x, 50%) !important;
  top: var(--globe-y, 50%) !important;
  opacity: var(--globe-opacity, .72) !important;
  text-shadow:
    0 0 calc(var(--word-size, 32px) * .36) rgba(255,255,255,var(--word-glow, .05)),
    0 12px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.58) !important;
  filter: blur(var(--globe-blur, 0px)) !important;
  transform:
    translate(-50%, -50%)
    rotateY(var(--globe-ry, 0deg))
    rotateX(var(--globe-rx, 0deg))
    rotate(var(--globe-rot, 0deg))
    scale(var(--globe-scale, 1)) !important;
  transform-origin: center center !important;
  transition:
    left .86s cubic-bezier(.18,.84,.18,1),
    top .86s cubic-bezier(.18,.84,.18,1),
    opacity .68s ease,
    filter .68s ease,
    transform .86s cubic-bezier(.18,.84,.18,1),
    color .5s ease !important;
  animation: globeWordDrift var(--dur, 9s) ease-in-out infinite !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-word.major {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,var(--word-alpha, .94)) !important;
  font-weight: var(--word-weight, 760) !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-word.phrase {
  letter-spacing: -.055em !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-stage.is-flat .cloud-word {
  left: var(--flat-x, 50%) !important;
  top: var(--flat-y, 50%) !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
  filter: blur(0) !important;
  transform:
    translate(-50%, -50%)
    rotate(var(--flat-rot, 0deg))
    scale(1) !important;
  animation: none !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-stage.is-flat {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(255,255,255,.045), transparent 24rem),
    rgba(3,4,8,.70) !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-note {
  display: none !important;
}

@keyframes globeWordDrift {
  0%, 100% { translate: 0 0; }
  50% { translate: 0 var(--float-y, -7px); }
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  #cloud .cloud-stage::before {
    right: 16px !important;
    top: 12px !important;
    font-size: 11px !important;
  }
}



/* =========================================================
   Requested revision v27:
   - 구체 상태 더 조밀하게 채우되 단어 겹침 방지
   - 펼쳐진 상태는 6줄 행렬로 정렬
   - 행마다 좌/우 방향을 번갈아 무한 스크롤
   - 키워드 클릭 시 해당 키워드를 중심으로 다시 구체 생성
========================================================= */
#cloud .cloud-stage {
  cursor: pointer !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(255,255,255,.035), transparent 24rem),
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(104,128,168,.055), transparent 44rem),
    rgba(3,4,8,.72) !important;
}

/* 안내 문구 제거: 구체/행렬 전환은 화면 움직임으로만 전달 */
#cloud .cloud-stage::before,
#cloud .cloud-stage.is-flat::before {
  content: "" !important;
  display: none !important;
}

#cloudWords {
  perspective: 1000px !important;
  transform-style: preserve-3d !important;
}

#cloudWords .cloud-globe-shell {
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  top: 50%;
  width: min(88vmin, 820px);
  height: min(88vmin, 820px);
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  border-radius: 50%;
  pointer-events: none;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  opacity: 1;
}

/* 원을 선으로 그리지 않고 텍스트 배치 실루엣만 남김 */
#cloudWords .cloud-globe-shell::before,
#cloudWords .cloud-globe-shell::after {
  content: none !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-word {
  border: 0 !important;
  clip-path: none !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  font-size: var(--word-size, 28px) !important;
  color: rgba(245,248,255,var(--word-alpha, .62)) !important;
  font-weight: var(--word-weight, 520) !important;
  letter-spacing: var(--word-track, -.04em) !important;
  line-height: .92 !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  text-shadow:
    0 0 calc(var(--word-size, 28px) * .34) rgba(255,255,255,var(--word-glow, .04)),
    0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.58) !important;
}

#cloud:not(.is-marquee) .cloud-word {
  position: absolute !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
  left: var(--globe-x, 50%) !important;
  top: var(--globe-y, 50%) !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  opacity: var(--globe-opacity, .72) !important;
  filter: blur(var(--globe-blur, 0px)) !important;
  transform:
    translate(-50%, -50%)
    rotateY(var(--globe-ry, 0deg))
    rotateX(var(--globe-rx, 0deg))
    rotate(var(--globe-rot, 0deg))
    scale(var(--globe-scale, 1)) !important;
  transform-origin: center center !important;
  animation: globeWordDrift var(--dur, 9s) ease-in-out infinite !important;
}

#cloud.is-marquee {
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

#cloud.is-marquee .cloud-globe-shell {
  display: none !important;
}

#cloud .cloud-row {
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: var(--row-top);
  width: 100%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  overflow: visible;
  pointer-events: none;
}

#cloud .cloud-track {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 0;
  width: max-content;
  white-space: nowrap;
  will-change: transform;
  animation-duration: var(--row-speed, 88s);
  animation-timing-function: linear;
  animation-iteration-count: infinite;
}

#cloud .cloud-loop {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: clamp(34px, 5.2vw, 92px);
  padding-right: clamp(34px, 5.2vw, 92px);
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

#cloud .cloud-row[data-dir="left"] .cloud-track {
  animation-name: cloudMarqueeLeft;
}

#cloud .cloud-row[data-dir="right"] .cloud-track {
  animation-name: cloudMarqueeRight;
}

#cloud .cloud-stage.is-flat .cloud-row .cloud-word {
  position: relative !important;
  left: auto !important;
  top: auto !important;
  display: inline-block !important;
  flex: 0 0 auto !important;
  padding: .16em .04em !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  appearance: none !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  cursor: pointer !important;
  pointer-events: auto !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
  filter: none !important;
  transform: none !important;
  animation: none !important;
  font-size: clamp(25px, 1.85vw, 36px) !important;
  font-weight: 540 !important;
  letter-spacing: -.04em !important;
  line-height: 1 !important;
}


#cloud .cloud-advice {
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: clamp(22px, 4.2vw, 52px);
  z-index: 6;
  width: min(760px, calc(100% - 48px));
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  padding: 15px 20px;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.11);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.065);
  color: rgba(230,235,245,.68);
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(5,6,10,.52), transparent);
  font-size: clamp(13px, 1.04vw, 16px);
  line-height: 1.75;
  letter-spacing: -.02em;
  text-align: center;
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  transition: opacity .42s ease, transform .42s ease;
}

#cloud .cloud-advice.show {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-4px);
}

#cloud .cloud-stage.is-flat .cloud-advice {
  opacity: 0 !important;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  #cloud .cloud-advice {
    bottom: 18px;
    width: calc(100% - 28px);
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.62;
    padding: 12px 14px;
  }
}

#cloud .cloud-stage.is-flat .cloud-row .cloud-word:hover {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,1) !important;
  text-shadow:
    0 0 calc(var(--word-size, 28px) * .55) rgba(255,255,255,.18),
    0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.58) !important;
}

@keyframes cloudMarqueeLeft {
  from { transform: translateX(0); }
  to { transform: translateX(-25%); }
}

@keyframes cloudMarqueeRight {
  from { transform: translateX(-25%); }
  to { transform: translateX(0); }
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  #cloudWords .cloud-globe-shell {
    width: min(106vmin, 640px);
    height: min(106vmin, 640px);
  }

  #cloud .cloud-loop {
    gap: 34px;
    padding-right: 34px;
  }

  #cloud .cloud-stage.is-flat .cloud-row .cloud-word {
    font-size: clamp(21px, 5vw, 29px) !important;
  }
}


/* =========================================================
   Requested revision v28:
   - 함께 남은 감정 구체 실루엣 범위 확대
   - 폰트 크기는 유지하고 텍스트 배치 반경만 확장
========================================================= */
#cloudWords .cloud-globe-shell {
  width: min(98vmin, 1040px) !important;
  height: min(98vmin, 1040px) !important;
}

@media (max-width: 860px) {
  #cloudWords .cloud-globe-shell {
    width: min(122vmin, 760px) !important;
    height: min(122vmin, 760px) !important;
  }
}

</style>
</head>
<body>



<div class="global-side-keywords" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="side-keywords side-left">
    <span class="sans" data-zone="outer" style="--i:0; --drift:-8px;">불안</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="inner" style="--i:1.15; --drift:10px;">걱정</span>
    <span class="serif" data-zone="mid" style="--i:2.35; --drift:-6px;">말하지 못한 것</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="inner" style="--i:3.05; --drift:12px;">혼자 둔 마음</span>
    <span class="serif" data-zone="outer" style="--i:4.45; --drift:-10px;">무기력</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="mid" style="--i:5.10; --drift:8px;">괜찮은 척</span>
    <span class="serif" data-zone="inner" style="--i:6.60; --drift:-12px;">버티는 중</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="mid" style="--i:7.25; --drift:6px;">숨</span>
    <span class="serif" data-zone="outer" style="--i:8.75; --drift:-14px;">답답함</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="inner" style="--i:9.50; --drift:9px;">괜찮다고 말함</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="mid" style="--i:10.90; --drift:-7px;">잠들기 전</span>
    <span class="serif" data-zone="outer" style="--i:12.10; --drift:13px;">무거움</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="inner" style="--i:13.35; --drift:-9px;">작은 걱정</span>
    <span class="serif" data-zone="mid" style="--i:14.55; --drift:11px;">흔적</span>
  </div>
  <div class="side-keywords side-right">
    <span class="sans" data-zone="mid" style="--i:.45; --drift:8px;">미래</span>
    <span class="serif" data-zone="outer" style="--i:1.75; --drift:-10px;">고민</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="inner" style="--i:2.60; --drift:7px;">오늘</span>
    <span class="serif" data-zone="mid" style="--i:4.00; --drift:-13px;">위로</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="outer" style="--i:4.85; --drift:10px;">괜찮아</span>
    <span class="serif" data-zone="inner" style="--i:6.20; --drift:-6px;">나만 그런 게 아니었다</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="mid" style="--i:7.80; --drift:12px;">꺼내놓기</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="outer" style="--i:8.55; --drift:-8px;">가벼워짐</span>
    <span class="serif" data-zone="inner" style="--i:9.95; --drift:15px;">발표</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="mid" style="--i:11.15; --drift:-11px;">과제</span>
    <span class="serif" data-zone="outer" style="--i:12.65; --drift:7px;">취업</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="inner" style="--i:13.20; --drift:-14px;">돈</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="mid" style="--i:14.80; --drift:9px;">혼잣말</span>
    <span class="serif" data-zone="outer" style="--i:16.05; --drift:-12px;">안도</span>
    <span class="sans" data-zone="inner" style="--i:17.25; --drift:6px;">천천히</span>
  </div>
</div>



<div class="scroll-progress" id="scrollProgress"></div>

<header class="site-header">
  <nav class="nav-line" aria-label="주요 메뉴">
    <a href="#home">Home</a>
    <span class="nav-sep">ㅣ</span>
    <a href="#emotion">감정을 꺼내는 공간</a>
    <span class="nav-sep">ㅣ</span>
    <a href="#cloud">함께 남은 감정</a>
    <span class="nav-sep">ㅣ</span>
    <a href="#about">About</a>
  </nav>
</header>

<main>
  <!-- Home -->
  <section class="section hero" id="home">
    <div class="hero-inner">
      <div class="statue-stage" aria-hidden="true">
        <div class="statue-glow"></div>
        <div class="statue-wrap">
          <img class="statue-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-vignette" aria-hidden="true"></div>

      
      <div class="keyword-rain" aria-hidden="true">
        <span style="--x:6%; --y:82%; --rise:118vh; --delay:.00; --drift:-10px;">불안</span>
        <span style="--x:14%; --y:96%; --rise:132vh; --delay:.08; --drift:8px;">걱정</span>
        <span style="--x:23%; --y:74%; --rise:104vh; --delay:.16; --drift:-6px;">괜찮은 척</span>
        <span style="--x:31%; --y:105%; --rise:142vh; --delay:.04; --drift:12px;">혼자 둔 마음</span>
        <span style="--x:42%; --y:88%; --rise:128vh; --delay:.12; --drift:-14px;">말하지 못한 것</span>
        <span style="--x:52%; --y:112%; --rise:148vh; --delay:.20; --drift:7px;">버티는 중</span>
        <span style="--x:63%; --y:78%; --rise:116vh; --delay:.06; --drift:-8px;">미래</span>
        <span style="--x:72%; --y:101%; --rise:136vh; --delay:.18; --drift:13px;">무기력</span>
        <span style="--x:82%; --y:85%; --rise:124vh; --delay:.10; --drift:-11px;">숨</span>
        <span style="--x:92%; --y:108%; --rise:145vh; --delay:.24; --drift:5px;">위로</span>
        <span style="--x:18%; --y:122%; --rise:154vh; --delay:.28; --drift:16px;">오늘</span>
        <span style="--x:57%; --y:126%; --rise:160vh; --delay:.32; --drift:-18px;">나만 그런 게 아니었다</span>
      </div>

      <div class="scroll-keywords" aria-hidden="true">
        <span style="--x:12vw; --y:22vh; --rise:110px; --delay:.00;">불안</span>
        <span style="--x:76vw; --y:26vh; --rise:150px; --delay:.10;">걱정</span>
        <span style="--x:18vw; --y:58vh; --rise:180px; --delay:.18;">고민</span>
        <span style="--x:66vw; --y:62vh; --rise:130px; --delay:.05;">무기력</span>
        <span style="--x:42vw; --y:74vh; --rise:210px; --delay:.14;">미래</span>
        <span style="--x:82vw; --y:48vh; --rise:170px; --delay:.22;">혼자</span>
        <span style="--x:31vw; --y:35vh; --rise:145px; --delay:.07;">말하지 못한 것</span>
        <span style="--x:58vw; --y:40vh; --rise:190px; --delay:.16;">괜찮은 척</span>
      </div>

      <div class="hero-copy reveal">
        <h1 class="hero-title brush"><span>모두가</span><span>그렇다</span></h1>
        <div class="small">
          <p>말하기엔 애매하고, 혼자 두기엔 무거운 것들이 있습니다.</p>
          <p>이곳에 가볍게 털어놓으세요.</p>
          <p>불안은 사라지지 않아도, 꺼내놓을 수는 있습니다.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="cta-row">
        <a class="cta-link cta-release" href="#emotion">
          <span class="cta-kicker">Release</span>
          <span class="cta-phrase">
            <span class="phrase-line">
              <span class="phrase-piece">감정을</span>
              <span class="phrase-piece">꺼내는</span>
            </span>
            <span class="phrase-line">
              <span class="phrase-piece">공간</span>
            </span>
          </span>
        </a>

        <a class="cta-link cta-gather cta-right" href="#cloud">
          <span class="cta-kicker">Gather</span>
          <span class="cta-phrase">
            <span class="phrase-line">
              <span class="phrase-piece">함께</span>
              <span class="phrase-piece">남은</span>
            </span>
            <span class="phrase-line">
              <span class="phrase-piece">감정</span>
            </span>
          </span>
        </a>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Scroll Statement -->
  <section class="section statement">

    <div class="statement-rise-keywords" aria-hidden="true">
      <span style="--x:9%; --y:92%; --rise:112vh; --delay:.00; --drift:-10px;">불안</span>
      <span style="--x:21%; --y:108%; --rise:126vh; --delay:.08; --drift:8px;">말하지 못한 것</span>
      <span style="--x:78%; --y:98%; --rise:118vh; --delay:.04; --drift:-12px;">괜찮은 척</span>
      <span style="--x:89%; --y:116%; --rise:132vh; --delay:.14; --drift:10px;">혼자 둔 마음</span>
      <span style="--x:14%; --y:130%; --rise:140vh; --delay:.18; --drift:14px;">걱정</span>
      <span style="--x:83%; --y:136%; --rise:146vh; --delay:.22; --drift:-8px;">버티는 중</span>
      <span style="--x:31%; --y:122%; --rise:128vh; --delay:.12; --drift:-7px;">꺼내놓기</span>
      <span style="--x:70%; --y:128%; --rise:138vh; --delay:.26; --drift:13px;">작은 안도</span>
    </div>

    <div class="statement-box reveal">
      <p class="eyebrow">planning intention</p>
