      <h2 class="brush">말하지 못한 불안을,<br />잠시 밖으로 꺼내는 경험.</h2>
      <p>
        이 홈페이지는 불안을 해결해주는 공간이 아니라,
        사용자가 자신의 감정을 글자와 낙서로 꺼내놓고 바라보게 하는 공간입니다.
      </p>
      <p>
        너무 사소해 보이거나 부끄러워서 말하지 못한 감정들이
        검은 여백 위에 남고, 비슷한 흔적들과 만나며 작은 안도감으로 이어집니다.
      </p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Emotion Space -->
  <section class="section emotion" id="emotion">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <div>
        <p class="eyebrow">01 / release</p>
        <h2 class="brush">감정을 꺼내는 공간</h2>
      </div>
      <p>
        입력한 문장은 하나의 묶음으로 남고, 그 안의 단어들은 주변에 작게 흩어집니다.
        마우스나 터치로도 낙서하듯 남길 수 있습니다.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="emotion-stage reveal" id="emotionStage">
      <canvas id="drawCanvas"></canvas>
      <div id="emotionLayer" aria-live="polite"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="emotion-controls reveal">
      <input class="emotion-input" id="emotionInput" placeholder="정리되지 않아도 됩니다. 문장이 아니어도 괜찮습니다." />
      <div class="control-buttons">
        <button id="clearBtn" type="button">비우기</button>
        <button id="saveBtn" type="button">남기기</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- Shared Feelings -->
  <section class="section cloud" id="cloud">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <div>
        <p class="eyebrow">02 / gather</p>
        <h2 class="brush">함께 남은 감정</h2>
      </div>
      <p>
        많이 언급된 감정은 크게, 적게 남은 말은 작게 남습니다.
        이 페이지는 실제 AI 대신 브라우저 안의 간단한 키워드 추출로 움직입니다.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="cloud-stage reveal">
      <div id="cloudWords"></div>
      <p class="cloud-note">
        불안은 혼자 감당할 때 커지지만, 꺼내놓는 순간 조금 가벼워집니다.
        중요한 것은 불안을 없애는 것이 아니라, 그것을 마주하고 다시 나아가는 것입니다.
      </p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- About -->
  <section class="section about" id="about">
    <article class="about-card reveal">
      <p class="about-kicker">ABOUT THIS WEBSITE</p>
      <h2 class="about-main-title">나만 그런 게 아니었다</h2>
      <p>현대인은 일상 속에서 크고 작은 불안을 느낍니다. 그 불안은 구체적인 걱정일 수도 있고, 막연한 무게감일 수도 있습니다.</p>
      <p>어떤 불안은 너무 사소해 보이거나, 부끄럽거나, 괜히 무겁게 받아들여질까 봐 쉽게 꺼내지 못합니다.</p>
      <p><strong>이 홈페이지는 불안을 해결해주는 공간이 아닙니다.</strong> 사용자가 자신의 불안과 고민을 글자와 낙서로 꺼내놓고, 잠시 바라보게 만드는 공간입니다.</p>
      <p>비슷한 감정을 가진 사람들의 흔적을 보며, 불안을 혼자만의 문제가 아닌 모두의 감정으로 바라보게 합니다.</p>
      <p>최종적으로 이 사이트의 목적은 불안을 지우는 것이 아니라, 그 무게를 조금 덜어내는 것입니다.</p>
    </article>
  </section>
</main>

<div class="toast" id="toast">감정이 함께 남은 감정에 반영되었습니다.</div>

<script>
/* =========================================================
   Utility
========================================================= */
const $ = (selector, root = document) => root.querySelector(selector);
const $$ = (selector, root = document) => Array.from(root.querySelectorAll(selector));

function clamp(n, min, max) { return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, n)); }
function rand(min, max) { return Math.random() * (max - min) + min; }
function pick(arr) { return arr[Math.floor(Math.random() * arr.length)]; }

const stopWords = new Set([
  "그리고","그래서","하지만","나는","내가","너무","정말","그냥","오늘","내일","어제",
  "있는","없는","하게","해서","되는","같아","같다","같은","것도","것은","것이","이게",
  "저는","제가","하고","하며","되게","아직","조금","많이","계속","근데","뭔가",
  "the","and","or","is","are","to","of","in"
]);

function extractKeywords(text) {
  const preserved = text.replace(/버티는 중/g, "버티는중");
  return preserved
    .split(/[\s,.;!?…~\/|()\[\]{}"'“”‘’]+/)
    .map(w => w.replace(/[^0-9A-Za-zㄱ-ㅎㅏ-ㅣ가-힣]/g, "").trim())
    .filter(w => w.length >= 2 && !stopWords.has(w))
    .slice(0, 12);
}

function chunkSentence(text) {
  const raw = text.trim();
  if (raw.length <= 34) return [raw];
  const chunks = raw
    .split(/(?<=[.!?。！？])\s+|[,，]\s*/g)
    .map(v => v.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
  if (chunks.length > 1) return chunks.slice(0, 3);
  return [raw.slice(0, 34) + "…"];
}

function showToast(message) {
  const toast = $("#toast");
  toast.textContent = message;
  toast.classList.add("show");
  setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove("show"), 1800);
}

/* =========================================================
   Smooth navigation + active menu + progress
========================================================= */
$$('a[href^="#"]').forEach(link => {
  link.addEventListener("click", e => {
    const id = link.getAttribute("href");
    const target = $(id);
    if (!target) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
  });
});

const navLinks = $$(".nav-line a");
const progress = $("#scrollProgress");

function updateScrollUI() {
  const scrollTop = window.scrollY;
  const docHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
  progress.style.width = `${docHeight > 0 ? (scrollTop / docHeight) * 100 : 0}%`;

  let current = "home";
  $$("main section[id]").forEach(section => {
    if (section.offsetTop - 140 <= scrollTop) current = section.id;
  });
  navLinks.forEach(a => a.classList.toggle("active", a.getAttribute("href") === `#${current}`));
}

window.addEventListener("scroll", updateScrollUI, { passive: true });
updateScrollUI();

/* Hide header when scrolling down, show when scrolling up */
const siteHeader = $(".site-header");
let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
let tickingHeader = false;

window.addEventListener("scroll", () => {
  if (tickingHeader) return;
  window.requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    const currentY = window.scrollY;
    const goingDown = currentY > lastScrollY && currentY > 120;
    siteHeader.classList.toggle("header-hidden", goingDown);
    lastScrollY = currentY;
    tickingHeader = false;
  });
  tickingHeader = true;
}, { passive: true });

/* =========================================================
   Reveal animation
========================================================= */
const io = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) entry.target.classList.add("visible");
  });
}, { threshold: 0.14 });

$$(".reveal").forEach(el => io.observe(el));

/* =========================================================
   Canvas drawing
========================================================= */
const stage = $("#emotionStage");
const canvas = $("#drawCanvas");
const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
let drawing = false;
let last = null;

function resizeCanvas() {
  const ratio = Math.max(1, window.devicePixelRatio || 1);
  const rect = stage.getBoundingClientRect();
  const old = ctx.getImageData ? null : null;
  canvas.width = Math.floor(rect.width * ratio);
  canvas.height = Math.floor(rect.height * ratio);
  canvas.style.width = rect.width + "px";
  canvas.style.height = rect.height + "px";
  ctx.setTransform(ratio, 0, 0, ratio, 0, 0);
  ctx.lineCap = "round";
  ctx.lineJoin = "round";
}
window.addEventListener("resize", resizeCanvas);
resizeCanvas();

function pointerPos(e) {
  const p = e.touches ? e.touches[0] : e;
  const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
  return { x: p.clientX - rect.left, y: p.clientY - rect.top };
}

function beginDraw(e) {
  drawing = true;
  last = pointerPos(e);
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(last.x, last.y);
  ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(230,235,245,${rand(.16,.32)})`;
  ctx.lineWidth = rand(1.2, 3.4);
}

function moveDraw(e) {
  if (!drawing) return;
  e.preventDefault();
  const pos = pointerPos(e);
  const midX = (last.x + pos.x) / 2;
  const midY = (last.y + pos.y) / 2;
  ctx.quadraticCurveTo(last.x, last.y, midX, midY);
  ctx.stroke();
  last = pos;
}

function endDraw() {
  drawing = false;
  last = null;
}

canvas.addEventListener("mousedown", beginDraw);
canvas.addEventListener("mousemove", moveDraw);
window.addEventListener("mouseup", endDraw);
canvas.addEventListener("touchstart", beginDraw, { passive: false });
canvas.addEventListener("touchmove", moveDraw, { passive: false });
window.addEventListener("touchend", endDraw);

/* =========================================================
   Emotion text placement — 문장 묶음 + 흩어진 단어
========================================================= */
const input = $("#emotionInput");
const layer = $("#emotionLayer");
let pendingTexts = [];

function placeEmotionText(text) {
  const chunks = chunkSentence(text);
  const keywords = extractKeywords(text);
  const rect = stage.getBoundingClientRect();

  chunks.forEach((chunk, i) => {
    const note = document.createElement("div");
    note.className = "emotion-note";
    note.textContent = chunk;

    const noteWidth = clamp(chunk.length * 14, 190, 520);
    const x = rand(8, Math.max(12, rect.width - noteWidth - 28));
    const y = rand(90, Math.max(110, rect.height - 150));

    note.style.left = `${x}px`;
    note.style.top = `${y}px`;
    note.style.setProperty("--note-size", `${rand(18, 28)}px`);
    note.style.setProperty("--note-weight", Math.floor(rand(380, 690)));
    note.style.setProperty("--rotate", `${rand(-3.5, 3.5)}deg`);
    note.style.setProperty("--op", `${rand(.72, .93)}`);
    layer.appendChild(note);

    keywords.slice(0, 5).forEach((word, idx) => {
      const chip = document.createElement("span");
      chip.className = "emotion-chip";
      chip.textContent = word.replace("버티는중", "버티는 중");

      const angle = rand(0, Math.PI * 2);
      const radius = rand(92, 190);
      const cx = clamp(x + noteWidth * .45 + Math.cos(angle) * radius, 18, rect.width - 120);
      const cy = clamp(y + 38 + Math.sin(angle) * radius, 70, rect.height - 70);

      chip.style.left = `${cx}px`;
      chip.style.top = `${cy}px`;
      chip.style.setProperty("--chip-size", `${rand(13, 19)}px`);
      chip.style.setProperty("--rotate", `${rand(-8, 8)}deg`);
      chip.style.animationDelay = `${rand(-4, 0)}s`;
      layer.appendChild(chip);
    });
  });

  pendingTexts.push(text);
}

input.addEventListener("keydown", e => {
  if (e.key === "Enter" && input.value.trim()) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const text = input.value.trim();
    input.value = "";
    placeEmotionText(text);
  }
});

$("#clearBtn").addEventListener("click", () => {
  layer.innerHTML = "";
  pendingTexts = [];
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
});

/* =========================================================
   Keyword cloud with localStorage
========================================================= */
const defaultData = {
  "불안": 7, "걱정": 6, "고민": 6, "무기력": 4, "미래": 4, "취업": 3,
  "발표": 3, "과제": 3, "건강": 3, "연애": 2, "돈": 3, "군대": 2,
  "혼자": 4, "버티는 중": 3, "괜찮아": 2, "숨": 2, "오늘": 2, "위로": 3,
  "나만 그런 게 아니었다": 2
};

function loadCloudData() {
  try {
    return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("gureotdaKeywordData") || "{}");
  } catch {
    return {};
  }
}

function saveCloudData(data) {
  localStorage.setItem("gureotdaKeywordData", JSON.stringify(data));
}

function mergeData() {
  return { ...defaultData, ...loadCloudData() };
}

function addWordsToCloud(texts) {
  const data = loadCloudData();
  texts.forEach(text => {
    const keywords = extractKeywords(text);
    const chunks = chunkSentence(text);
    keywords.forEach(word => {
      const normalized = word === "버티는중" ? "버티는 중" : word;
      data[normalized] = (data[normalized] || 0) + 1;
    });
    chunks.forEach(chunk => {
      if (chunk.length >= 6 && chunk.length <= 24) {
        data[chunk] = (data[chunk] || 0) + 1;
      }
    });
  });
  saveCloudData(data);
  renderCloud();
}

function cleanCloudTextFromNode(node) {
  return Array.from(node.childNodes)
    .filter(child => !(child.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE && child.classList?.contains("erase-spot")))
    .map(child => child.textContent || "")
    .join("")
    .trim();
}

function collectToolTextNotesForCloud() {
  return Array.from(layer.querySelectorAll(".mode-text-note"))
    .map(note => ({ note, text: cleanCloudTextFromNode(note) }))
    .filter(({ note, text }) => text.length >= 2 && text !== "텍스트" && note.dataset.cloudSavedText !== text);
}

$("#saveBtn").addEventListener("click", () => {
  if (input.value.trim()) {
    placeEmotionText(input.value.trim());
    input.value = "";
  }
  const noteTexts = collectToolTextNotesForCloud();
  const textsForCloud = [
    ...pendingTexts,
    ...noteTexts.map(item => item.text)
  ];
  if (!textsForCloud.length) {
    showToast("먼저 감정을 적거나 Enter로 남겨주세요.");
    return;
  }
  addWordsToCloud(textsForCloud);
  noteTexts.forEach(({ note, text }) => {
    note.dataset.cloudSavedText = text;
  });
  pendingTexts = [];
  showToast("감정이 함께 남은 감정에 반영되었습니다.");
});


let cloudFocusWord = null;

function getDisplayCloudEntries() {
  const seedWords = {
    "막막함": 2, "초조": 2, "긴장": 2, "외로움": 2, "피곤": 2, "압박": 2,
    "잠": 1, "후회": 1, "기대": 1, "실수": 1, "시선": 1, "마감": 1,
    "선택": 1, "관계": 1, "시간": 1, "방황": 1, "답답함": 2, "눈치": 1,
    "비교": 1, "자신감": 1, "텅 빈 느낌": 1, "해야 할 일": 1, "괜찮은 척": 1,
    "말하지 못한 것": 1, "조용한 밤": 1, "내일": 1, "버거움": 2, "정리 안 됨": 1,
    "무거운 마음": 1, "흔들림": 1, "기다림": 1, "두려움": 2, "멍함": 1,
    "괜찮지 않음": 1, "다시 시작": 1, "작은 위로": 1, "불확실": 1, "혼란": 1,
    "참는 중": 1, "소진": 1, "기분": 1, "생각": 1, "밤공기": 1,
    "눈물": 1, "숨 고르기": 1, "조금씩": 1, "괜찮아질까": 1, "혼잣말": 1,
    "불안": 3, "걱정": 3, "과제": 2, "발표": 2, "미래": 2, "돈": 1,
    "잠 부족": 1, "집중 안 됨": 1, "하기 싫음": 1, "늦은 시작": 1, "완벽주의": 1,
    "기준": 1, "실패": 1, "어색함": 1, "답 없음": 1, "멈춤": 1, "불편함": 1,
    "계속 생각남": 1, "잘하고 싶음": 1, "속도": 1, "부담": 2, "복잡함": 1,
    "흐릿함": 1, "미룸": 1, "혼자": 1, "예민함": 1, "마음 정리": 1
  };
  const merged = { ...seedWords, ...mergeData() };
  return Object.entries(merged)
    .filter(([word]) => word && word.trim().length > 0)
    .sort((a,b) => b[1] - a[1] || a[0].length - b[0].length)
    .slice(0, 96);
}

function renderCloud(focusWord = cloudFocusWord) {
  const cloud = $("#cloudWords");
  const stage = cloud?.closest(".cloud-stage");
  if (!cloud || !stage) return;

  const isFlat = stage.classList.contains("is-flat");
  const entries = getDisplayCloudEntries();
  if (!entries.length) return;

  if (focusWord && entries.some(([word]) => word === focusWord)) {
    cloudFocusWord = focusWord;
  } else if (!cloudFocusWord || !entries.some(([word]) => word === cloudFocusWord)) {
    cloudFocusWord = entries[0][0];
  }

  const focused = cloudFocusWord;
  const ordered = [...entries].sort((a,b) => {
    if (a[0] === focused) return -1;
    if (b[0] === focused) return 1;
    return b[1] - a[1] || a[0].length - b[0].length;
  });

  const max = Math.max(...ordered.map(e => e[1]), 1);
  const min = Math.min(...ordered.map(e => e[1]), max);
  const rect = stage.getBoundingClientRect();
  const W = Math.max(rect.width || 0, window.innerWidth * .86, 820);
  const H = Math.max(rect.height || 0, window.innerHeight * .66, 520);
  const isMobile = window.matchMedia("(max-width: 860px)").matches;

  function measure(word, size) {
    const chars = Array.from(word).length;
    const spaceBonus = /\s/.test(word) ? .12 : 0;
    const ratio = /[a-zA-Z]/.test(word) ? .62 : .78;
    return Math.min(W * .72, size * (chars * (ratio - spaceBonus) + .85));
  }

  const items = ordered.map(([word, count], idx) => {
    const letters = Array.from(word).length;
    const isPhrase = word.includes(" ") || letters > 6;
    const countWeight = max === min ? 1 : (count - min) / (max - min);
    const rankWeight = 1 - idx / Math.max(1, ordered.length - 1);
    let emphasis = clamp(countWeight * .76 + rankWeight * .24, 0, 1);
    if (word === focused) emphasis = 1;
    const lengthFactor = word === focused ? 1 : clamp(1 - Math.max(0, letters - 4) * (isPhrase ? .040 : .028), .40, 1);
    const maxSize = isMobile ? 70 : 118;
    const minSize = isMobile ? 10.5 : 12;
    let size = clamp((minSize + Math.pow(emphasis, 1.72) * (maxSize - minSize)) * lengthFactor, minSize, maxSize);
    if (word === focused) size = isMobile ? 82 : 132;
    else if (idx === 0) size = clamp(size * 1.05, isMobile ? 30 : 42, isMobile ? 78 : 126);
    if (idx > 24) size *= .86;
    if (idx > 42) size *= .76;
    const alpha = clamp(.20 + Math.pow(emphasis, 1.34) * .78, .20, .98);
    const fontWeight = Math.round(clamp(260 + Math.pow(emphasis, 1.2) * 620, 260, 880));
    const w = measure(word, size);
    const h = size * .98;
    return { word, count, idx, isPhrase, emphasis, size, alpha, fontWeight, w, h };
  });

  cloud.innerHTML = "";

  if (isFlat) {
    cloud.classList.add("is-marquee");
    const rowCount = isMobile ? 5 : 6;
    const rows = Array.from({ length: rowCount }, () => []);
    items.forEach((item, idx) => rows[idx % rowCount].push(item));

    rows.forEach((rowItems, rowIdx) => {
      const row = document.createElement("div");
      row.className = "cloud-row";
      row.dataset.dir = rowIdx % 2 === 0 ? "left" : "right";
      row.style.setProperty("--row-top", `${((rowIdx + .5) / rowCount * 100).toFixed(3)}%`);
      row.style.setProperty("--row-speed", `${(96 + rowIdx * 10).toFixed(1)}s`);

      const track = document.createElement("div");
      track.className = "cloud-track";

      const sequence = [];
      const minItems = isMobile ? 20 : 28;
      while (sequence.length < minItems) sequence.push(...rowItems);

      function makeWordButton(item) {
        const span = document.createElement("button");
        span.type = "button";
        span.className = `cloud-word ${item.idx < 7 ? "major" : ""} ${item.isPhrase ? "phrase" : ""}`;
        span.textContent = item.word;
        span.setAttribute("aria-label", `${item.word}`);
        span.style.setProperty("--word-alpha", clamp(.46 + item.emphasis * .42, .46, .88).toFixed(3));
        span.style.setProperty("--word-glow", clamp(.012 + item.emphasis * .10, .012, .11).toFixed(3));
        span.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
          event.stopPropagation();
          cloudFocusWord = item.word;
          stage.classList.remove("is-flat");
          renderCloud(item.word);
          showCloudAdvice(item.word);
        });
        return span;
      }

      for (let copy = 0; copy < 4; copy++) {
        const loop = document.createElement("div");
        loop.className = "cloud-loop";
        sequence.forEach((item) => loop.appendChild(makeWordButton(item)));
        track.appendChild(loop);
      }

      row.appendChild(track);
      cloud.appendChild(row);
    });
    return;
  }

  cloud.classList.remove("is-marquee");
  const shell = document.createElement("div");
  shell.className = "cloud-globe-shell";
  cloud.appendChild(shell);

  const placed = [];
  const cx = W * .50;
  const cy = H * .50;
  const rx = W * (isMobile ? .57 : .54);
  const ry = H * (isMobile ? .50 : .55);
  const margin = isMobile ? 8 : 14;

  function collides(box) {
    return placed.some(p => !(box.x2 < p.x1 || box.x1 > p.x2 || box.y2 < p.y1 || box.y1 > p.y2));
  }

  function insideEllipse(x, y, w, h) {
    const safeX = Math.max(0, (Math.abs(x - cx) + w * .50) / rx);
    const safeY = Math.max(0, (Math.abs(y - cy) + h * .50) / ry);
    return safeX * safeX + safeY * safeY <= 1.10;
  }

  const candidates = [{ x: cx, y: cy, depth: 1 }];
  const step = isMobile ? 9 : 10;
  for (let r = step; r <= Math.max(rx, ry); r += step) {
    const points = Math.max(20, Math.round((Math.PI * 2 * r) / (step * .92)));
    for (let j = 0; j < points; j++) {
      const angle = (j / points) * Math.PI * 2 + r * .019;
      const x = cx + Math.cos(angle) * r;
      const y = cy + Math.sin(angle) * r * .78;
      const nx = (x - cx) / rx;
      const ny = (y - cy) / ry;
      const depth = clamp(1 - Math.sqrt(nx * nx + ny * ny) * .78, .16, 1);
      candidates.push({ x, y, depth, angle });
    }
  }

  items.forEach((item, idx) => {
    let size = item.size;
    let w = item.w;
    let h = item.h;
    let picked = null;

    for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 5 && !picked; attempt++) {
      const gap = Math.max(2, Math.min(9, size * .055));
      w = measure(item.word, size);
      h = size * .96;
      for (const c of candidates) {
        if (idx === 0 && c !== candidates[0]) break;
        const box = {
          x1: c.x - w / 2 - gap,
          x2: c.x + w / 2 + gap,
          y1: c.y - h / 2 - gap,
          y2: c.y + h / 2 + gap
        };
        if (box.x1 < margin || box.x2 > W - margin || box.y1 < margin || box.y2 > H - margin) continue;
        if (!insideEllipse(c.x, c.y, w, h)) continue;
        if (!collides(box)) {
          picked = { ...c, box, size, w, h };
          break;
        }
      }
      size *= .88;
    }

    if (!picked) return;
    placed.push(picked.box);

    const normX = (picked.x - cx) / rx;
    const normY = (picked.y - cy) / ry;
    const edge = clamp(Math.sqrt(normX * normX + normY * normY), 0, 1);
    const depth = clamp(1 - edge * .68, .22, 1);
    const span = document.createElement("span");
    span.className = `cloud-word ${idx < 7 ? "major" : ""} ${item.isPhrase ? "phrase" : ""}`;
    span.textContent = item.word;
    span.style.zIndex = `${Math.round(1000 + depth * 400 - idx)}`;
    span.style.setProperty("--word-size", `${picked.size.toFixed(2)}px`);
    span.style.setProperty("--word-alpha", clamp(item.alpha * (.46 + depth * .56), .14, .98).toFixed(3));
    span.style.setProperty("--word-weight", item.fontWeight);
    span.style.setProperty("--word-track", item.isPhrase ? "-.055em" : "-.04em");
    span.style.setProperty("--word-glow", clamp(.012 + item.emphasis * .12, .012, .13).toFixed(3));
    span.style.setProperty("--globe-x", `${(picked.x / W * 100).toFixed(3)}%`);
    span.style.setProperty("--globe-y", `${(picked.y / H * 100).toFixed(3)}%`);
    span.style.setProperty("--globe-scale", clamp(.72 + depth * .28, .66, 1.04).toFixed(3));
    span.style.setProperty("--globe-opacity", clamp(item.alpha * (.48 + depth * .52), .18, .98).toFixed(3));
    span.style.setProperty("--globe-ry", `${(-normX * 26).toFixed(2)}deg`);
    span.style.setProperty("--globe-rx", `${(normY * 14).toFixed(2)}deg`);
    span.style.setProperty("--globe-rot", `${idx === 0 ? 0 : ((idx % 5) - 2) * .45}deg`);
    span.style.setProperty("--globe-blur", `${clamp(edge * .65, 0, .65).toFixed(2)}px`);
    span.style.setProperty("--dur", `${(8.5 + (idx % 8) * .55).toFixed(2)}s`);
    span.style.setProperty("--float-y", `${(-2 - (idx % 4)).toFixed(1)}px`);
    cloud.appendChild(span);
  });
}


function getCloudAdvice(word) {
  const adviceMap = {
    "불안": "불안은 없애려고 할수록 커질 때가 많습니다. 지금 할 수 있는 행동을 하나만 정하고, 나머지는 다음 단계로 미루는 방식이 현실적입니다.",
    "걱정": "걱정이 많을 때는 생각을 더 하는 것보다 기준을 정하는 게 낫습니다. 확인할 것, 지금 못 바꾸는 것, 나중에 볼 것을 나눠보세요.",
    "막막함": "막막함은 전체를 한 번에 보려 할 때 커집니다. 오늘 끝낼 한 조각만 정하면 시작할 수 있는 형태가 생깁니다.",
    "초조": "초조함은 속도를 올리라는 신호처럼 느껴지지만, 실제로는 순서를 정하라는 신호에 가깝습니다. 먼저 할 일 하나만 앞으로 빼세요.",
    "긴장": "긴장은 준비가 부족해서만 생기는 감정은 아닙니다. 실수 가능성을 없애려 하기보다, 실수해도 이어갈 문장을 하나 준비해두는 게 더 효과적입니다.",
    "외로움": "외로움은 관계가 없다는 뜻보다 연결감이 약해졌다는 신호일 수 있습니다. 긴 대화보다 짧은 연락 하나가 회복의 시작이 될 수 있습니다.",
    "피곤": "피곤함이 계속되면 의지 문제가 아니라 회복 자원이 부족한 상태일 수 있습니다. 해야 할 일을 줄이는 것도 관리입니다.",
    "압박": "압박감은 목표가 크거나 기준이 많을 때 생깁니다. 지금 기준을 하나만 남기고, 나머지는 임시로 내려놓는 편이 낫습니다.",
    "마감": "마감 앞에서는 완성도보다 제출 가능한 형태가 우선입니다. 핵심 구조를 먼저 만들고 디테일은 남은 시간에 맞춰 줄이세요.",
    "미래": "미래가 불안할 때는 확신을 만들기보다 선택지를 늘리는 게 현실적입니다. 지금의 작은 준비가 나중의 방향 전환을 쉽게 만듭니다.",
    "비교": "비교는 참고 자료로는 쓸 수 있지만 기준이 되면 쉽게 지칩니다. 남의 결과보다 내 다음 수정 포인트를 하나 찾는 쪽이 생산적입니다.",
    "완벽주의": "완벽하게 시작하려 하면 시작이 늦어집니다. 초안은 일부러 부족하게 만들고, 수정으로 끌어올리는 방식이 더 안정적입니다.",
    "미룸": "미루는 건 게으름보다 시작 단위가 큰 경우가 많습니다. 5분 안에 끝나는 첫 행동으로 쪼개면 저항이 줄어듭니다.",
    "자신감": "자신감은 기분보다 기록에서 생깁니다. 잘한 점을 크게 믿기 어렵다면, 해낸 행동을 작게라도 남겨두세요.",
    "관계": "관계 문제는 한 번에 결론내기 어렵습니다. 상대의 의도보다 내가 불편했던 지점을 먼저 정리하는 게 덜 흔들립니다.",
    "실수": "실수는 평가의 끝이 아니라 수정할 정보입니다. 감정적으로 오래 붙잡기보다, 다음에 바꿀 행동 하나로 정리하세요.",
    "돈": "돈 걱정은 막연하게 보면 커집니다. 이번 달 고정비, 남은 현금, 미룰 수 있는 지출을 숫자로 나누면 판단이 쉬워집니다.",
    "과제": "과제는 아이디어보다 제출 구조가 먼저입니다. 제목, 핵심 문장, 필요한 자료부터 잡으면 완성까지 덜 흔들립니다.",
    "발표": "발표는 자연스럽게 말하는 것보다 길을 잃지 않는 구조가 중요합니다. 첫 문장, 전환 문장, 마무리 문장을 고정해두세요."
  };
  if (adviceMap[word]) return adviceMap[word];
  if (word.includes("잠")) return "수면과 관련된 고민은 의지로 버티기보다 리듬을 다시 잡는 문제가 큽니다. 오늘은 해야 할 일을 줄이고 회복 시간을 먼저 확보하세요.";
  if (word.includes("말")) return "말하지 못한 고민은 바로 해결하지 않아도 됩니다. 다만 혼자만 반복해서 생각하지 않도록 문장 하나로 밖에 꺼내두는 게 좋습니다.";
  if (word.includes("시작")) return "시작이 어렵다면 완성 기준을 낮추는 게 먼저입니다. 결과물이 아니라 첫 동작을 목표로 잡아보세요.";
  return `${word}에 대한 고민은 바로 결론을 내리기보다, 지금 바꿀 수 있는 행동과 당장 못 바꾸는 조건을 나눠보는 게 좋습니다.`;
}

function showCloudAdvice(word) {
  const stage = document.querySelector("#cloud .cloud-stage");
  if (!stage) return;
  let box = stage.querySelector(".cloud-advice");
  if (!box) {
    box = document.createElement("div");
    box.className = "cloud-advice";
    stage.appendChild(box);
  }
  box.textContent = getCloudAdvice(word);
  requestAnimationFrame(() => box.classList.add("show"));
}

renderCloud();

(function setupCloudSpreadToggle(){
  const cloud = $("#cloudWords");
  const stage = cloud?.closest(".cloud-stage");
  if (!stage || stage.dataset.spreadToggleReady === "true") return;
  stage.dataset.spreadToggleReady = "true";
  stage.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
    if (stage.classList.contains("is-flat") && event.target.closest(".cloud-word")) return;
    stage.classList.toggle("is-flat");
    renderCloud();
  });
  window.addEventListener("resize", () => {
    renderCloud();
  }, { passive: true });
})();



/* Hero scroll dissolve effect */
function updateHeroScrollEffect() {
  const hero = document.querySelector("#home");
  if (!hero) return;
  const rect = hero.getBoundingClientRect();
  const progress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, -rect.top / Math.max(1, window.innerHeight * 0.85)));
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--heroScroll", progress.toFixed(3));
}

window.addEventListener("scroll", updateHeroScrollEffect, { passive: true });
window.addEventListener("resize", updateHeroScrollEffect);
updateHeroScrollEffect();


/* Separate screen transition for Emotion / Cloud */
(function () {
  const body = document.body;

  function closeViews() {
    body.classList.remove("view-emotion", "view-cloud");
  }

  function openView(viewName) {
    if (viewName === "emotion") {
      body.classList.add("view-emotion");
      body.classList.remove("view-cloud");
    }

    if (viewName === "cloud") {
      body.classList.add("view-cloud");
      body.classList.remove("view-emotion");
      if (typeof renderCloud === "function") renderCloud();
    }
  }

  document.querySelectorAll('a[href="#emotion"]').forEach(link => {
    link.addEventListener("click", event => {
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopImmediatePropagation();
      openView("emotion");
    }, true);
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('a[href="#cloud"]').forEach(link => {
    link.addEventListener("click", event => {
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopImmediatePropagation();
      openView("cloud");
    }, true);
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('a[href="#home"], a[href="#about"]').forEach(link => {
    link.addEventListener("click", event => {
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopImmediatePropagation();
      const target = document.querySelector(link.getAttribute("href"));
      closeViews();
      setTimeout(() => {
        target?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
      }, 20);
    }, true);
  });

  const closeButton = document.createElement("button");
  closeButton.type = "button";
  closeButton.className = "view-close";
  closeButton.textContent = "Home으로 돌아가기";
  closeButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
    closeViews();
    setTimeout(() => document.querySelector("#home")?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" }), 20);
  });
  document.body.appendChild(closeButton);

  window.addEventListener("keydown", event => {
    if (event.key === "Escape") closeViews();
  });
})();








/* Enhanced scroll motion: Home + planning intention */
(function () {
  let raf = 0;

  function clamp01(value) {
    return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, value));
  }

  function smoothstep(value) {
    return value * value * (3 - 2 * value);
  }

  function updateScrollMotions() {
    raf = 0;

    const home = document.querySelector("#home");
    if (home) {
      const rect = home.getBoundingClientRect();
      const raw = -rect.top / Math.max(1, window.innerHeight * 1.02);
      const progress = clamp01(raw);
      const eased = smoothstep(progress);

      /*
        v8의 살짝 끊기는 질감을 살리되,
        단계 수를 늘려 부드러운 버벅임처럼 보이게 조정.
      */
      const steps = 36;
      const stepped = Math.round(eased * steps) / steps;

      document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--homeScrollMotion", eased.toFixed(3));
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--homeScrollStepped", stepped.toFixed(3));
    }

    const statement = document.querySelector(".statement");
    if (statement) {
      const rect = statement.getBoundingClientRect();
      const start = window.innerHeight * .92;
      const end = window.innerHeight * .18;
      const raw = (start - rect.top) / Math.max(1, start - end);
      const progress = smoothstep(clamp01(raw));
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--intentMotion", progress.toFixed(3));
    }
  }

  function requestScrollMotions() {
    if (raf) return;
    raf = requestAnimationFrame(updateScrollMotions);
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", requestScrollMotions, { passive: true });
  window.addEventListener("resize", requestScrollMotions);
  updateScrollMotions();
})();


/* v14 nav current-state correction */
(function () {
  const navLinks = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".nav-line a"));

  function setCurrentNav() {
    const isEmotion = document.body.classList.contains("view-emotion");
    const isCloud = document.body.classList.contains("view-cloud");

    navLinks.forEach(link => link.classList.remove("is-current"));

    if (isEmotion) {
      document.querySelector('.nav-line a[href="#emotion"]')?.classList.add("is-current");
      return;
    }

    if (isCloud) {
      document.querySelector('.nav-line a[href="#cloud"]')?.classList.add("is-current");
      return;
    }

    const about = document.querySelector("#about");
    const aboutTop = about ? about.getBoundingClientRect().top : Infinity;

    if (aboutTop < window.innerHeight * 0.45) {
      document.querySelector('.nav-line a[href="#about"]')?.classList.add("is-current");
    } else {
      document.querySelector('.nav-line a[href="#home"]')?.classList.add("is-current");
    }
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", setCurrentNav, { passive: true });
  window.addEventListener("resize", setCurrentNav);
  document.addEventListener("click", () => setTimeout(setCurrentNav, 80));
  setInterval(setCurrentNav, 250);
  setCurrentNav();
})();


/* v15 global side keyword rain motion */
(function () {
  let raf = 0;

  function updatePageScrollMotion() {
    raf = 0;
    const max = Math.max(1, document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight);
    const progress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, window.scrollY / max));
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--pageScrollMotion", progress.toFixed(4));
  }

  function requestPageScrollMotion() {
    if (raf) return;
    raf = requestAnimationFrame(updatePageScrollMotion);
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", requestPageScrollMotion, { passive: true });
  window.addEventListener("resize", requestPageScrollMotion);
  updatePageScrollMotion();
})();


/* v22 continuous scroll value updater */
(function () {
  let raf = 0;

  function clamp01(value) {
    return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, value));
  }

  function smoothstep(value) {
    return value * value * (3 - 2 * value);
  }

  function updateContinuousScrollValues() {
    raf = 0;

    const max = Math.max(1, document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight);
    const pageProgress = clamp01(window.scrollY / max);
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--pageScrollMotion", pageProgress.toFixed(4));

    const home = document.querySelector("#home");
    if (home) {
      const rect = home.getBoundingClientRect();
      const raw = -rect.top / Math.max(1, window.innerHeight * 1.05);
      const eased = smoothstep(clamp01(raw));
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--homeScrollMotion", eased.toFixed(3));
      /* stepped 변수도 continuous와 같은 값으로 덮어써서 끊김 제거 */
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--homeScrollStepped", eased.toFixed(3));
    }

    const statement = document.querySelector(".statement");
    if (statement) {
      const rect = statement.getBoundingClientRect();
      const start = window.innerHeight * .92;
      const end = window.innerHeight * .18;
      const raw = (start - rect.top) / Math.max(1, start - end);
      const progress = smoothstep(clamp01(raw));
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty("--intentMotion", progress.toFixed(3));
    }
  }

  function requestUpdate() {
    if (raf) return;
    raf = requestAnimationFrame(updateContinuousScrollValues);
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", requestUpdate, { passive: true });
  window.addEventListener("resize", requestUpdate);
  updateContinuousScrollValues();
})();


/* v24-3 focused nav state fix */
(function () {
  const navLinks = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".nav-line a"));

  function setFocusedCurrentNav() {
    const isEmotion = document.body.classList.contains("view-emotion");
    const isCloud = document.body.classList.contains("view-cloud");

    navLinks.forEach(link => link.classList.remove("is-current"));

    if (isEmotion) {
      document.querySelector('.nav-line a[href="#emotion"]')?.classList.add("is-current");
      return;
    }

    if (isCloud) {
      document.querySelector('.nav-line a[href="#cloud"]')?.classList.add("is-current");
      return;
    }

    const about = document.querySelector("#about");
    const aboutTop = about ? about.getBoundingClientRect().top : Infinity;

    if (aboutTop < window.innerHeight * 0.45) {
      document.querySelector('.nav-line a[href="#about"]')?.classList.add("is-current");
    } else {
      document.querySelector('.nav-line a[href="#home"]')?.classList.add("is-current");
    }
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", setFocusedCurrentNav, { passive: true });
  window.addEventListener("resize", setFocusedCurrentNav);
  document.addEventListener("click", () => setTimeout(setFocusedCurrentNav, 80));
  setInterval(setFocusedCurrentNav, 250);
  setFocusedCurrentNav();
})();


/* v24-4 emotion-space-only header hide on scroll */
(function () {
  const body = document.body;
  const emotionSection = document.querySelector("#emotion");

  if (!emotionSection) return;

  function updateEmotionHeaderState() {
    if (!body.classList.contains("view-emotion")) {
      body.classList.remove("emotion-scrolled");
      return;
    }

    if (emotionSection.scrollTop > 24) {
      body.classList.add("emotion-scrolled");
    } else {
      body.classList.remove("emotion-scrolled");
    }
  }

  emotionSection.addEventListener("scroll", updateEmotionHeaderState, { passive: true });
  window.addEventListener("resize", updateEmotionHeaderState);
  document.addEventListener("click", () => setTimeout(updateEmotionHeaderState, 80));
  updateEmotionHeaderState();
})();


/* v24-5 emotion tools: modes, brushes, text, select, undo/redo */
(function () {
  const emotion = document.querySelector("#emotion");
  const stage = document.querySelector(".emotion-stage");
  const layer = document.querySelector("#emotionLayer");
  const canvas = document.querySelector("#drawCanvas");
  const clearBtn = document.querySelector("#clearBtn");

  if (!emotion || !stage || !layer || !canvas || !clearBtn) return;

  const SVG_NS = "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg";
  let svg = document.querySelector("#emotionSvgLayer");
  if (!svg) {
    svg = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, "svg");
    svg.setAttribute("id", "emotionSvgLayer");
    stage.insertBefore(svg, layer);
  }

  const state = {
    mode: "draw",
    color: "rgba(230,235,245,.28)",
    colorKey: "white",
    size: 2,
    style: "soft",
    drawing: false,
    points: [],
    currentPath: null,
    undo: [],
    redo: [],
    dragTarget: null,
    dragStart: null,
    elementStart: null,
    strokeStartSnapshot: null,
    transformAction: null,
    transformCenter: null,
    selectedTarget: null,
    suppressNextStageClick: false,
    eraserKind: "partial",
    erasing: false,
    erasedThisDrag: new Set(),
    eraserLastPoint: null,
    eraserLastClient: null,
    toolsEnabled: true
  };

  const brushStyles = {
    soft: { opacity: .42, whiteOpacity: .68, filter: "blur(.08px)", dash: "", jitter: 0 },
    solid: { opacity: .78, whiteOpacity: .96, filter: "none", dash: "", jitter: 0 },
    mist: { opacity: .24, whiteOpacity: .38, filter: "blur(1.1px)", dash: "", jitter: 0 },
    broken: { opacity: .50, whiteOpacity: .68, filter: "none", dash: "8 13", jitter: 0 },
    scratch: { opacity: .58, whiteOpacity: .76, filter: "none", dash: "2 8", jitter: .9 }
  };

  const brushSizes = {
    xs: 1.2,
    s: 2.2,
    m: 4,
    l: 7,
    xl: 12
  };

  let transformBox = null;
  let eraserCursor = null;

  function isEditableActive() {
    const active = document.activeElement;
    const tag = active?.tagName?.toLowerCase();
    return !!active && (active.isContentEditable || tag === "input" || tag === "textarea");
  }

  function finishActiveEditing() {
    const active = document.activeElement;
    if (!active || !isEditableActive()) return false;

    if (active.isContentEditable) {
      const selection = window.getSelection();
      if (selection) selection.removeAllRanges();
      if (active.classList.contains("mode-text-note") && !active.textContent.trim()) {
        if (state.selectedTarget === active) selectElement(null);
        active.remove();
      }
    }

    active.blur();
    return true;
  }

  function ensureTransformBox() {
    if (transformBox) return;

    transformBox = document.createElement("div");
    transformBox.className = "selection-transform-box";
    transformBox.innerHTML = `
      <button type="button" class="selection-handle" data-handle="nw" title="Resize"></button>
      <button type="button" class="selection-handle" data-handle="ne" title="Resize"></button>
      <button type="button" class="selection-handle" data-handle="sw" title="Resize"></button>
      <button type="button" class="selection-handle" data-handle="se" title="Resize"></button>
      <button type="button" class="selection-handle" data-handle="rotate" title="Rotate"></button>
    `;
    stage.appendChild(transformBox);
  }

  function ensureEraserCursor() {
    if (eraserCursor) return;
    eraserCursor = document.createElement("div");
    eraserCursor.className = "eraser-cursor";
    stage.appendChild(eraserCursor);
  }

  function addEraserTools(hotzone) {
    const modeRow = hotzone.querySelector('[data-tool-group="mode"]');
    if (modeRow && !modeRow.querySelector('[data-mode="erase"]')) {
      const eraseBtn = document.createElement("button");
      eraseBtn.type = "button";
      eraseBtn.className = "tool-btn";
      eraseBtn.dataset.mode = "erase";
      eraseBtn.title = "E";
      eraseBtn.textContent = "Erase E";
      modeRow.appendChild(eraseBtn);
    }

    const modeGroup = modeRow?.closest(".tool-group");
    if (modeGroup && !hotzone.querySelector('[data-tool-group="eraser"]')) {
      const eraserGroup = document.createElement("div");
      eraserGroup.className = "tool-group";
      eraserGroup.innerHTML = `
        <span class="tool-label">Eraser</span>
        <div class="tool-row" data-tool-group="eraser">
          <button type="button" class="tool-btn active" data-eraser="partial" title="Erase touched parts">partial</button>
          <button type="button" class="tool-btn" data-eraser="object" title="Erase whole touched item">object</button>
        </div>
      `;
      modeGroup.after(eraserGroup);
    }

    const hint = hotzone.querySelector(".tool-hint");
    if (hint) hint.innerHTML = "V select · P draw · T text · E eraser<br>Shift E toggles partial/object erase.";
  }

  function ensureToolbar() {
    if (document.querySelector(".emotion-tool-hotzone")) return;

    const hotzone = document.createElement("div");
    hotzone.className = "emotion-tool-hotzone";
    hotzone.innerHTML = `
      <aside class="emotion-tool-panel" aria-label="감정 도구 패널">
        <div class="tool-group">
          <h3>감정 도구</h3>
          <span class="tool-label">Mode</span>
          <div class="tool-row" data-tool-group="mode">
            <button class="tool-btn active" data-mode="draw" title="P">그리기 P</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" data-mode="text" title="T">텍스트 T</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" data-mode="select" title="V">선택 V</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="tool-group">
          <span class="tool-label">Color</span>
          <div class="tool-row" data-tool-group="color">
            <button class="tool-btn color-dot active" style="--swatch:rgba(230,235,245,.82)" data-color="rgba(230,235,245,.28)" data-color-key="white" title="기본"></button>
            <button class="tool-btn color-dot" style="--swatch:#F316B0" data-color="#F316B0" data-color-key="pink" title="#F316B0"></button>
            <button class="tool-btn color-dot" style="--swatch:#0FD86E" data-color="#0FD86E" data-color-key="green" title="#0FD86E"></button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="tool-group">
          <span class="tool-label">Thickness</span>
          <div class="tool-row" data-tool-group="size">
            <button class="tool-btn" data-size="xs">XS</button>
            <button class="tool-btn active" data-size="s">S</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" data-size="m">M</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" data-size="l">L</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" data-size="xl">XL</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="tool-group">
          <span class="tool-label">Stroke</span>
          <div class="tool-row" data-tool-group="style">
            <button class="tool-btn active" data-style="soft">soft</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" data-style="solid">solid</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" data-style="mist">mist</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" data-style="broken">broken</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" data-style="scratch">scratch</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="tool-group">
          <span class="tool-label">History</span>
          <div class="tool-row">
            <button class="tool-btn" data-action="undo">Ctrl Z</button>
            <button class="tool-btn" data-action="redo">Ctrl Shift Z</button>
          </div>
          <p class="tool-hint">V 선택 · P 그리기 · T 텍스트<br>우측에 마우스를 가져가면 열립니다.</p>
        </div>
      </aside>
      <div class="emotion-tool-tab">TOOLS</div>
    `;

    const toggle = document.createElement("button");
    toggle.type = "button";
    toggle.className = "tool-toggle-floating";
    toggle.textContent = "tools on";

    document.body.appendChild(hotzone);
    document.body.appendChild(toggle);
    ensureTransformBox();
    ensureEraserCursor();
    addEraserTools(hotzone);

    hotzone.addEventListener("click", event => {
      const btn = event.target.closest("button");
      if (!btn) return;

      if (btn.dataset.mode) setMode(btn.dataset.mode);
      if (btn.dataset.color) {
        state.color = btn.dataset.color;
        state.colorKey = btn.dataset.colorKey || "custom";
        markActive("color", btn);
      }
      if (btn.dataset.size) {
        state.size = brushSizes[btn.dataset.size] || 2.2;
        markActive("size", btn);
      }
      if (btn.dataset.style) {
        state.style = btn.dataset.style;
        markActive("style", btn);
      }
      if (btn.dataset.eraser) {
        setEraserKind(btn.dataset.eraser);
      }
      if (btn.dataset.action === "undo") undo();
      if (btn.dataset.action === "redo") redo();
    });

    toggle.addEventListener("click", () => {
      state.toolsEnabled = !state.toolsEnabled;
      document.body.classList.toggle("tools-disabled", !state.toolsEnabled);
      toggle.textContent = state.toolsEnabled ? "tools on" : "tools off";
    });
  }

  function markActive(group, btn) {
    document.querySelectorAll(`[data-tool-group="${group}"] .tool-btn`).forEach(b => b.classList.remove("active"));
    btn.classList.add("active");
  }

  function setEraserKind(kind) {
    state.eraserKind = kind === "object" ? "object" : "partial";
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-tool-group="eraser"] .tool-btn').forEach(b => {
      b.classList.toggle("active", b.dataset.eraser === state.eraserKind);
    });
  }

  function toggleEraserKind() {
    setEraserKind(state.eraserKind === "partial" ? "object" : "partial");
  }

  function setMode(mode) {
    if (state.mode === "text" && mode !== "text") finishActiveEditing();
    state.mode = mode;
    emotion.classList.remove("mode-select", "mode-draw", "mode-text", "mode-erase");
    emotion.classList.add(`mode-${mode}`);
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-tool-group="mode"] .tool-btn').forEach(b => {
      b.classList.toggle("active", b.dataset.mode === mode);
    });
    if (mode !== "select") selectElement(null);
    else updateSelectionTools();
    if (mode !== "erase") hideEraserCursor();
  }

  function rectPoint(event) {
    const p = event.touches ? event.touches[0] : event;
    const rect = stage.getBoundingClientRect();
    return { x: p.clientX - rect.left, y: p.clientY - rect.top };
  }

  function clientPoint(event) {
    const p = event.touches ? event.touches[0] : event;
    return { x: p.clientX, y: p.clientY };
  }

  function distance(a, b) {
    return Math.hypot(a.x - b.x, a.y - b.y);
  }

  function getStrokePoints(path) {
    try {
      return JSON.parse(path.dataset.points || "[]");
    } catch {
      return [];
    }
  }

  function boundsFromPoints(points) {
    if (!points.length) return { left: 0, top: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, width: 0, height: 0, cx: 0, cy: 0 };
    const xs = points.map(point => point.x);
    const ys = points.map(point => point.y);
    const left = Math.min(...xs);
    const right = Math.max(...xs);
    const top = Math.min(...ys);
    const bottom = Math.max(...ys);
    return {
      left,
      top,
      right,
      bottom,
      width: right - left,
      height: bottom - top,
      cx: (left + right) / 2,
      cy: (top + bottom) / 2
    };
  }

  function getStrokePointBounds(path, transformed = false, padded = false) {
    const points = getStrokePoints(path);
    if (!points.length) {
      try {
        const box = path.getBBox();
        return {
          left: box.x,
          top: box.y,
          right: box.x + box.width,
          bottom: box.y + box.height,
          width: box.width,
          height: box.height,
          cx: box.x + box.width / 2,
          cy: box.y + box.height / 2
        };
      } catch {
        return boundsFromPoints([]);
      }
    }

    const mapped = transformed ? points.map(point => transformStrokePoint(point, path)) : points;
    const bounds = boundsFromPoints(mapped);
    if (!padded) return bounds;

    const t = getTransform(path);
    const width = parseFloat(path.getAttribute("stroke-width") || "2") * (transformed ? t.scale : 1);
    const pad = Math.max(7, width / 2 + 6);
    return {
      left: bounds.left - pad,
      top: bounds.top - pad,
      right: bounds.right + pad,
      bottom: bounds.bottom + pad,
      width: bounds.width + pad * 2,
      height: bounds.height + pad * 2,
      cx: bounds.cx,
      cy: bounds.cy
    };
  }

  function getStrokeCenter(path) {
    const bounds = getStrokePointBounds(path, false, false);
    return { x: bounds.cx, y: bounds.cy };
  }

  function getStrokeTransformCenter(path) {
    const x = parseFloat(path.dataset.transformCx || "");
    const y = parseFloat(path.dataset.transformCy || "");
    if (Number.isFinite(x) && Number.isFinite(y)) return { x, y };
    return getStrokeCenter(path);
  }

  function transformStrokePoint(point, path) {
    const t = getTransform(path);
    const center = getStrokeTransformCenter(path);
    const angle = t.rotate * Math.PI / 180;
    const scaledX = (point.x - center.x) * t.scale;
    const scaledY = (point.y - center.y) * t.scale;
    return {
      x: center.x + scaledX * Math.cos(angle) - scaledY * Math.sin(angle) + t.x,
      y: center.y + scaledX * Math.sin(angle) + scaledY * Math.cos(angle) + t.y
    };
  }

  function isPointNearStroke(point, path, tolerance = 14) {
    const points = getStrokePoints(path);
    const width = parseFloat(path.getAttribute("stroke-width") || "2");
    const hitRadius = tolerance + width / 2;
    return points.some(pt => distance(point, transformStrokePoint(pt, path)) <= hitRadius);
  }

  function closestStrokeAt(point, tolerance = 14) {
    let nearest = null;
    let nearestDistance = Infinity;
    svg.querySelectorAll(".emotion-svg-stroke").forEach(path => {
      const points = getStrokePoints(path);
      const width = parseFloat(path.getAttribute("stroke-width") || "2");
      const hitRadius = tolerance + width / 2;
      for (const pt of points) {
        const d = distance(point, transformStrokePoint(pt, path));
        if (d <= hitRadius && d < nearestDistance) {
          nearest = path;
          nearestDistance = d;
        }
      }
    });
    return nearest;
  }

  function selectableFrom(event) {
    return event.target.closest(".mode-text-note, .emotion-note, .emotion-chip, .emotion-svg-stroke")
      || closestStrokeAt(rectPoint(event), 16);
  }

  function getTargetStageBounds(target) {
    if (target instanceof SVGElement) {
      return getStrokePointBounds(target, true, true);
    }

    const stageRect = stage.getBoundingClientRect();
    const rect = target.getBoundingClientRect();
    return {
      left: rect.left - stageRect.left,
      top: rect.top - stageRect.top,
      right: rect.right - stageRect.left,
      bottom: rect.bottom - stageRect.top,
      width: rect.width,
      height: rect.height,
      cx: rect.left - stageRect.left + rect.width / 2,
      cy: rect.top - stageRect.top + rect.height / 2
    };
  }

  function getTargetClientCenter(target) {
    const bounds = getTargetStageBounds(target);
    const stageRect = stage.getBoundingClientRect();
    return {
      x: stageRect.left + bounds.cx,
      y: stageRect.top + bounds.cy
    };
  }

  function selectElement(target) {
    if (state.selectedTarget && state.selectedTarget !== target) {
      state.selectedTarget.classList.remove("is-selected");
    }
    state.selectedTarget = target || null;
    if (state.selectedTarget) state.selectedTarget.classList.add("is-selected");
    updateSelectionTools();
  }

  function updateSelectionTools() {
    if (!transformBox) return;
    const target = state.selectedTarget;
    if (!target || !target.isConnected || state.mode !== "select") {
      transformBox.classList.remove("is-visible");
      return;
    }

    const bounds = getTargetStageBounds(target);
    transformBox.style.left = `${bounds.left}px`;
    transformBox.style.top = `${bounds.top}px`;
    transformBox.style.width = `${Math.max(16, bounds.width)}px`;
    transformBox.style.height = `${Math.max(16, bounds.height)}px`;
    transformBox.classList.add("is-visible");
  }

  function releaseActiveEditorOnStage(event) {
    if (!document.body.classList.contains("view-emotion")) return;
    if (!stage.contains(event.target)) return;
    if (!isEditableActive()) return;
    if (event.target.closest(".selection-transform-box, .emotion-tool-panel, .tool-toggle-floating")) return;

    const target = selectableFrom(event);
    const released = finishActiveEditing();
    if (!released || target) return;

    state.suppressNextStageClick = true;
    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopPropagation();
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();
  }

  function pointsToPath(points) {
    if (!points.length) return "";
    if (points.length === 1) return `M ${points[0].x} ${points[0].y}`;
    let d = `M ${points[0].x} ${points[0].y}`;
    for (let i = 1; i < points.length; i++) {
      const prev = points[i - 1];
      const cur = points[i];
      const midX = (prev.x + cur.x) / 2;
      const midY = (prev.y + cur.y) / 2;
      d += ` Q ${prev.x} ${prev.y} ${midX} ${midY}`;
    }
    return d;
  }

  function makeStroke(point) {
    const style = brushStyles[state.style] || brushStyles.soft;
    const path = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, "path");
    path.classList.add("emotion-svg-stroke");
    path.dataset.kind = "stroke";
    const strokeColor = state.colorKey === "white" ? "rgba(246,248,245,.95)" : state.color;
    const strokeOpacity = state.colorKey === "white" ? (style.whiteOpacity || style.opacity) : style.opacity;
    path.setAttribute("stroke", strokeColor);
    path.setAttribute("stroke-width", String(state.size));
    path.setAttribute("opacity", String(strokeOpacity));
    if (style.dash) path.setAttribute("stroke-dasharray", style.dash);
    path.style.setProperty("--brush-filter", style.filter);
    path.dataset.tx = "0";
    path.dataset.ty = "0";
    path.dataset.scale = "1";
    path.dataset.rotateOffset = "0";
    path.dataset.points = JSON.stringify([point]);
    path.setAttribute("d", `M ${point.x} ${point.y}`);
    svg.appendChild(path);
    return path;
  }

  function beginNewDraw(event) {
    if (!document.body.classList.contains("view-emotion")) return;
    if (state.mode !== "draw") return;
    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopPropagation();
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();

    const point = rectPoint(event);
    state.drawing = true;
    state.points = [point];
    state.currentPath = makeStroke(point);
  }

  function moveNewDraw(event) {
    if (!state.drawing || state.mode !== "draw") return;
    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopPropagation();
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();

    const point = rectPoint(event);
    const style = brushStyles[state.style] || brushStyles.soft;
    if (style.jitter) {
      point.x += (Math.random() - .5) * style.jitter * state.size;
      point.y += (Math.random() - .5) * style.jitter * state.size;
    }
    state.points.push(point);
    state.currentPath.dataset.points = JSON.stringify(state.points);
    state.currentPath.setAttribute("d", pointsToPath(state.points));
  }

  function endNewDraw(event) {
    if (!state.drawing) return;
    if (event) {
      event.preventDefault?.();
      event.stopPropagation?.();
      event.stopImmediatePropagation?.();
    }
    state.drawing = false;
    if (state.currentPath) {
      state.currentPath.dataset.points = JSON.stringify(state.points);
      pushHistory({ type: "add", el: state.currentPath });
      state.currentPath = null;
    }
    state.points = [];
  }

  function createTextAt(point) {
    const note = document.createElement("div");
    note.className = "mode-text-note";
    note.contentEditable = "true";
    note.textContent = "텍스트";
    note.style.left = `${point.x}px`;
    note.style.top = `${point.y}px`;
    note.style.setProperty("--text-size", `${Math.max(18, state.size * 4.8 + 12)}px`);
    note.style.setProperty("--text-weight", state.style === "solid" ? "680" : "520");
    note.style.color = state.colorKey === "white" ? "rgba(248,248,245,.90)" : state.color;
    note.style.setProperty("--rotate", `${(Math.random() - .5) * 2.2}deg`);
    note.dataset.kind = "text";
    note.dataset.tx = "0";
    note.dataset.ty = "0";
    note.dataset.scale = "1";
    note.dataset.rotateOffset = "0";
    layer.appendChild(note);
    pushHistory({ type: "add", el: note });
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      note.focus();
      const range = document.createRange();
      range.selectNodeContents(note);
      const sel = window.getSelection();
      sel.removeAllRanges();
      sel.addRange(range);
    });
  }

  function stageClickText(event) {
    if (!document.body.classList.contains("view-emotion")) return;
    if (state.mode !== "text") return;
    if (state.suppressNextStageClick) {
      state.suppressNextStageClick = false;
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopPropagation();
      event.stopImmediatePropagation();
      return;
    }
    if (event.target.closest(".mode-text-note")) return;
    if (finishActiveEditing()) {
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopPropagation();
      event.stopImmediatePropagation();
      return;
    }
    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopPropagation();
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();
    createTextAt(rectPoint(event));
  }

  function pushHistory(item) {
    state.undo.push(item);
    state.redo = [];
  }

  function undo() {
    const item = state.undo.pop();
    if (!item) return;
    if (item.type === "add") {
      if (state.selectedTarget === item.el) selectElement(null);
      item.el.remove();
      state.redo.push(item);
    } else if (item.type === "move" || item.type === "transform") {
      applyTransform(item.el, item.from);
      state.redo.push(item);
    } else if (item.type === "strokeGeometry") {
      applyStrokeSnapshot(item.el, item.from);
      state.redo.push(item);
    } else if (item.type === "remove") {
      item.parent.insertBefore(item.el, item.next);
      state.redo.push(item);
    } else if (item.type === "eraseSpot") {
      item.spot.remove();
      state.redo.push(item);
    } else if (item.type === "partialStroke") {
      item.replacements.forEach(el => el.remove());
      item.parent.insertBefore(item.original, item.next);
      state.redo.push(item);
    }
  }

  function redo() {
    const item = state.redo.pop();
    if (!item) return;
    if (item.type === "add") {
      if (item.el instanceof SVGElement) svg.appendChild(item.el);
      else layer.appendChild(item.el);
      state.undo.push(item);
    } else if (item.type === "move" || item.type === "transform") {
      applyTransform(item.el, item.to);
      state.undo.push(item);
    } else if (item.type === "strokeGeometry") {
      applyStrokeSnapshot(item.el, item.to);
      state.undo.push(item);
    } else if (item.type === "remove") {
      if (state.selectedTarget === item.el) selectElement(null);
      item.el.remove();
      state.undo.push(item);
    } else if (item.type === "eraseSpot") {
      item.parent.appendChild(item.spot);
      state.undo.push(item);
    } else if (item.type === "partialStroke") {
      item.original.remove();
      item.replacements.forEach(el => item.parent.insertBefore(el, item.next));
      state.undo.push(item);
    }
  }

  function getTransform(el) {
    return {
      x: parseFloat(el.dataset.tx || "0"),
      y: parseFloat(el.dataset.ty || "0"),
      scale: parseFloat(el.dataset.scale || "1"),
      rotate: parseFloat(el.dataset.rotateOffset || "0")
    };
  }

  function isIdentityTransform(t) {
    return t.x === 0 && t.y === 0 && t.scale === 1 && t.rotate === 0;
  }

  function strokeSnapshot(path) {
    return {
      points: getStrokePoints(path),
      width: parseFloat(path.getAttribute("stroke-width") || "2"),
      transform: getTransform(path),
      transformCx: path.dataset.transformCx || "",
      transformCy: path.dataset.transformCy || "",
      d: path.getAttribute("d") || ""
    };
  }

  function applyStrokeSnapshot(path, snapshot) {
    path.dataset.points = JSON.stringify(snapshot.points || []);
    path.setAttribute("d", snapshot.d || pointsToPath(snapshot.points || []));
    path.setAttribute("stroke-width", String(snapshot.width || 2));

    const t = snapshot.transform || { x: 0, y: 0, scale: 1, rotate: 0 };
    path.dataset.tx = String(t.x || 0);
    path.dataset.ty = String(t.y || 0);
    path.dataset.scale = String(t.scale || 1);
    path.dataset.rotateOffset = String(t.rotate || 0);
    path.dataset.transformCx = snapshot.transformCx || "";
    path.dataset.transformCy = snapshot.transformCy || "";

    if (isIdentityTransform(getTransform(path))) {
      path.removeAttribute("transform");
    } else {
      applyTransform(path, getTransform(path));
    }
  }

  function resetStrokeTransform(path) {
    path.dataset.tx = "0";
    path.dataset.ty = "0";
    path.dataset.scale = "1";
    path.dataset.rotateOffset = "0";
    path.dataset.transformCx = "";
    path.dataset.transformCy = "";
    path.removeAttribute("transform");
  }

  function bakeStrokeTransform(path) {
    const t = getTransform(path);
    if (isIdentityTransform(t)) return;

    const points = getStrokePoints(path).map(point => transformStrokePoint(point, path));
    const width = Math.max(.6, parseFloat(path.getAttribute("stroke-width") || "2") * t.scale);

    path.dataset.points = JSON.stringify(points);
    path.setAttribute("d", pointsToPath(points));
    path.setAttribute("stroke-width", String(width));
    resetStrokeTransform(path);
    updateSelectionTools();
  }

  function setStrokeGeometry(path, points, width) {
    path.dataset.points = JSON.stringify(points);
    path.setAttribute("d", pointsToPath(points));
    path.setAttribute("stroke-width", String(Math.max(.6, width)));
    resetStrokeTransform(path);
    updateSelectionTools();
  }

  function transformPoints(points, center, options = {}) {
    const dx = options.dx || 0;
    const dy = options.dy || 0;
    const scale = options.scale ?? 1;
    const rotate = (options.rotate || 0) * Math.PI / 180;
    const cos = Math.cos(rotate);
    const sin = Math.sin(rotate);

    return points.map(point => {
      const sx = (point.x - center.x) * scale;
      const sy = (point.y - center.y) * scale;
      return {
        x: center.x + sx * cos - sy * sin + dx,
        y: center.y + sx * sin + sy * cos + dy
      };
    });
  }

  function sameStrokeSnapshot(a, b) {
    if (!a || !b) return false;
    if (Math.abs((a.width || 0) - (b.width || 0)) > .001) return false;
    if ((a.points || []).length !== (b.points || []).length) return false;
    return (a.points || []).every((point, index) => {
      const other = b.points[index];
      return Math.abs(point.x - other.x) < .001 && Math.abs(point.y - other.y) < .001;
    });
  }

  function applyStrokeAction(path, action) {
    bakeStrokeTransform(path);
    const points = getStrokePoints(path);
    if (!points.length) return;

    const bounds = getStrokePointBounds(path, false, false);
    const center = { x: bounds.cx, y: bounds.cy };
    const width = parseFloat(path.getAttribute("stroke-width") || "2");
    let options = {};
    let nextWidth = width;

    if (action === "scale-up") {
      options.scale = 1.12;
      nextWidth = width * 1.12;
    }
    if (action === "scale-down") {
      options.scale = 1 / 1.12;
      nextWidth = width / 1.12;
    }
    if (action === "rotate-left") options.rotate = -7;
    if (action === "rotate-right") options.rotate = 7;
    if (action === "nudge-left") options.dx = -8;
    if (action === "nudge-right") options.dx = 8;
    if (action === "nudge-up") options.dy = -8;
    if (action === "nudge-down") options.dy = 8;

    setStrokeGeometry(path, transformPoints(points, center, options), nextWidth);
  }

  function applyTransform(el, transform, y) {
    const current = getTransform(el);
    const next = typeof transform === "number"
      ? { ...current, x: transform, y }
      : { ...current, ...transform };

    next.scale = Math.min(3, Math.max(.35, next.scale || 1));
    next.rotate = Number.isFinite(next.rotate) ? next.rotate : 0;

    el.dataset.tx = String(next.x);
    el.dataset.ty = String(next.y);
    el.dataset.scale = String(next.scale);
    el.dataset.rotateOffset = String(next.rotate);
    if (el instanceof SVGElement) {
      const center = getStrokeTransformCenter(el);
      el.dataset.transformCx = String(center.x);
      el.dataset.transformCy = String(center.y);
      el.style.translate = "";
      el.style.scale = "";
      el.style.rotate = "";
      el.setAttribute(
        "transform",
        `translate(${next.x} ${next.y}) translate(${center.x} ${center.y}) rotate(${next.rotate}) scale(${next.scale}) translate(${-center.x} ${-center.y})`
      );
    } else {
      el.style.translate = `${next.x}px ${next.y}px`;
      el.style.scale = next.scale === 1 ? "" : String(next.scale);
      el.style.rotate = next.rotate ? `${next.rotate}deg` : "";
    }
    updateSelectionTools();
  }

  function sameTransform(a, b) {
    return a.x === b.x && a.y === b.y && a.scale === b.scale && a.rotate === b.rotate;
  }

  function deleteSelected() {
    const target = state.selectedTarget;
    if (!target) return;
    const parent = target.parentNode;
    const next = target.nextSibling;
    selectElement(null);
    target.remove();
    pushHistory({ type: "remove", el: target, parent, next });
  }

  function transformSelected(action) {
    const target = state.selectedTarget;
    if (!target || !target.isConnected) return;

    if (action === "delete") {
      deleteSelected();
      return;
    }

    if (target instanceof SVGElement) {
      const strokeBefore = strokeSnapshot(target);
      applyStrokeAction(target, action);
      const strokeAfter = strokeSnapshot(target);
      if (!sameStrokeSnapshot(strokeBefore, strokeAfter)) {
        pushHistory({ type: "strokeGeometry", el: target, from: strokeBefore, to: strokeAfter });
      }
      return;
    }

    const from = getTransform(target);
    const to = { ...from };

    if (action === "scale-up") to.scale = from.scale * 1.12;
    if (action === "scale-down") to.scale = from.scale / 1.12;
    if (action === "rotate-left") to.rotate = from.rotate - 7;
    if (action === "rotate-right") to.rotate = from.rotate + 7;
    if (action === "nudge-left") to.x = from.x - 8;
    if (action === "nudge-right") to.x = from.x + 8;
    if (action === "nudge-up") to.y = from.y - 8;
    if (action === "nudge-down") to.y = from.y + 8;

    applyTransform(target, to);
    const applied = getTransform(target);
    if (!sameTransform(from, applied)) {
      pushHistory({ type: "transform", el: target, from, to: applied });
    }
  }

  function eraserRadius() {
    return Math.min(38, Math.max(18, state.size * 2.35 + 12));
  }

  function showEraserCursor(point) {
    if (!eraserCursor) return;
    const diameter = eraserRadius() * 2;
    eraserCursor.style.setProperty("--eraser-size", `${diameter}px`);
    eraserCursor.style.left = `${point.x}px`;
    eraserCursor.style.top = `${point.y}px`;
    eraserCursor.classList.add("is-visible");
  }

  function hideEraserCursor() {
    eraserCursor?.classList.remove("is-visible");
    if (!state.erasing) document.body.classList.remove("eraser-drag-active");
  }

  function circleIntersectsRect(center, radius, rect) {
    const x = Math.max(rect.left, Math.min(center.x, rect.right));
    const y = Math.max(rect.top, Math.min(center.y, rect.bottom));
    return Math.hypot(center.x - x, center.y - y) <= radius;
  }

  function touchedTextElements(client, radius) {
    return Array.from(layer.querySelectorAll(".mode-text-note, .emotion-note, .emotion-chip"))
      .filter(el => circleIntersectsRect(client, radius, el.getBoundingClientRect()));
  }

  function touchedStrokes(point, radius) {
    return Array.from(svg.querySelectorAll(".emotion-svg-stroke"))
      .filter(path => isPointNearStroke(point, path, radius));
  }

  function pointToSegmentDistance(point, a, b) {
    const dx = b.x - a.x;
    const dy = b.y - a.y;
    const lengthSq = dx * dx + dy * dy;
    if (!lengthSq) return distance(point, a);

    const t = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, ((point.x - a.x) * dx + (point.y - a.y) * dy) / lengthSq));
    return distance(point, { x: a.x + dx * t, y: a.y + dy * t });
  }

  function touchedStrokesBetween(fromPoint, toPoint, radius) {
    return Array.from(svg.querySelectorAll(".emotion-svg-stroke")).filter(path => {
      const width = parseFloat(path.getAttribute("stroke-width") || "2");
      const hitRadius = radius + width / 2;
      return getStrokePoints(path).some(point => (
        pointToSegmentDistance(transformStrokePoint(point, path), fromPoint, toPoint) <= hitRadius
      ));
    });
  }

  function addTextEraseSpot(el, client, radius) {
    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (!circleIntersectsRect(client, radius, rect)) return;

    el.style.overflow = "hidden";
    const spot = document.createElement("span");
    spot.className = "erase-spot";
    spot.contentEditable = "false";
    spot.style.width = `${radius * 2}px`;
    spot.style.height = `${radius * 2}px`;
    spot.style.left = `${client.x - rect.left - radius}px`;
    spot.style.top = `${client.y - rect.top - radius}px`;
    el.appendChild(spot);
    pushHistory({ type: "eraseSpot", parent: el, spot });
  }

  function cloneStrokeWithPoints(path, points) {
    const clone = path.cloneNode(false);
    clone.dataset.points = JSON.stringify(points);
    clone.setAttribute("d", pointsToPath(points));
    return clone;
  }

  function partialEraseStroke(path, point, radius) {
    partialEraseStrokeBetween(path, point, point, radius);
  }

  function partialEraseStrokeBetween(path, fromPoint, toPoint, radius) {
    bakeStrokeTransform(path);
    const points = getStrokePoints(path);
    if (points.length < 2) return;

    const segments = [];
    let current = [];
    let touched = false;

    points.forEach(pt => {
      if (pointToSegmentDistance(transformStrokePoint(pt, path), fromPoint, toPoint) <= radius) {
        touched = true;
        if (current.length > 1) segments.push(current);
        current = [];
      } else {
        current.push(pt);
      }
    });
    if (current.length > 1) segments.push(current);
    if (!touched) return;

    const parent = path.parentNode;
    const next = path.nextSibling;
    const replacements = segments.map(segment => cloneStrokeWithPoints(path, segment));

    path.remove();
    replacements.forEach(replacement => parent.insertBefore(replacement, next));
    if (state.selectedTarget === path) selectElement(null);
    pushHistory({ type: "partialStroke", original: path, replacements, parent, next });
  }

  function eraseWholeTarget(target) {
    if (!target || state.erasedThisDrag.has(target)) return;
    state.erasedThisDrag.add(target);
    if (state.selectedTarget === target) selectElement(null);
    const parent = target.parentNode;
    const next = target.nextSibling;
    target.remove();
    pushHistory({ type: "remove", el: target, parent, next });
  }

  function sampleLine(from, to, spacing) {
    const length = distance(from, to);
    const steps = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(length / Math.max(1, spacing)));
    return Array.from({ length: steps + 1 }, (_, index) => {
      const t = index / steps;
      return {
        x: from.x + (to.x - from.x) * t,
        y: from.y + (to.y - from.y) * t
      };
    });
  }

  function eraseBetween(fromPoint, toPoint, fromClient, toClient) {
    const radius = eraserRadius();
    showEraserCursor(toPoint);
    const stageRect = stage.getBoundingClientRect();
    const spacing = Math.max(8, radius * .62);
    const pointSamples = sampleLine(fromPoint, toPoint, spacing);
    const clientSamples = pointSamples.map(point => ({
      x: stageRect.left + point.x,
      y: stageRect.top + point.y
    }));

    if (state.eraserKind === "object") {
      clientSamples.forEach(client => touchedTextElements(client, radius).forEach(eraseWholeTarget));
      touchedStrokesBetween(fromPoint, toPoint, radius).forEach(eraseWholeTarget);
      return;
    }

    clientSamples.forEach(client => touchedTextElements(client, radius).forEach(el => addTextEraseSpot(el, client, radius)));
    touchedStrokesBetween(fromPoint, toPoint, radius).forEach(path => partialEraseStrokeBetween(path, fromPoint, toPoint, radius));
  }

  function beginErase(event) {
    if (!document.body.classList.contains("view-emotion")) return;
    if (state.mode !== "erase") return;

    finishActiveEditing();
    selectElement(null);
    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopPropagation();
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();

    state.erasing = true;
    state.erasedThisDrag = new Set();
    document.body.classList.add("eraser-drag-active");
    state.eraserLastPoint = rectPoint(event);
    state.eraserLastClient = clientPoint(event);
    eraseBetween(state.eraserLastPoint, state.eraserLastPoint, state.eraserLastClient, state.eraserLastClient);
  }

  function moveErase(event) {
    if (state.mode !== "erase") return;
    const point = rectPoint(event);
    const client = clientPoint(event);
    showEraserCursor(point);
    if (!state.erasing) return;

    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopPropagation();
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();

    const fromPoint = state.eraserLastPoint || point;
    const fromClient = state.eraserLastClient || client;
    eraseBetween(fromPoint, point, fromClient, client);
    state.eraserLastPoint = point;
    state.eraserLastClient = client;
  }

  function endErase() {
    state.erasing = false;
    state.erasedThisDrag = new Set();
    state.eraserLastPoint = null;
    state.eraserLastClient = null;
    document.body.classList.remove("eraser-drag-active");
  }

  function beginDrag(event) {
    if (!document.body.classList.contains("view-emotion")) return;
    if (state.mode !== "select") return;
    const handle = event.target.closest(".selection-handle");
    const boxTarget = event.target.closest(".selection-transform-box") ? state.selectedTarget : null;
    const target = handle ? state.selectedTarget : (selectableFrom(event) || boxTarget);
    if (!target) {
      selectElement(null);
      return;
    }

    finishActiveEditing();
    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopPropagation();
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();

    const p = event.touches ? event.touches[0] : event;
    if (target instanceof SVGElement) bakeStrokeTransform(target);
    selectElement(target);
    state.dragTarget = target;
    state.dragStart = { x: p.clientX, y: p.clientY };
    state.elementStart = getTransform(target);
    state.strokeStartSnapshot = target instanceof SVGElement ? strokeSnapshot(target) : null;
    state.transformAction = handle?.dataset.handle || "move";
    const center = getTargetClientCenter(target);
    const stageCenter = target instanceof SVGElement
      ? { x: getStrokePointBounds(target, false, false).cx, y: getStrokePointBounds(target, false, false).cy }
      : null;
    state.transformCenter = {
      x: center.x,
      y: center.y,
      stageX: stageCenter?.x,
      stageY: stageCenter?.y,
      startDistance: Math.max(12, Math.hypot(p.clientX - center.x, p.clientY - center.y)),
      startAngle: Math.atan2(p.clientY - center.y, p.clientX - center.x),
      startVector: { x: p.clientX - center.x, y: p.clientY - center.y }
    };
    document.body.classList.add("selection-drag-active");
    target.classList.add("is-dragging");
  }

  function moveDrag(event) {
    if (!state.dragTarget || state.mode !== "select") return;
    event.preventDefault();
    event.stopPropagation();
    event.stopImmediatePropagation();

    const p = event.touches ? event.touches[0] : event;
    const dx = p.clientX - state.dragStart.x;
    const dy = p.clientY - state.dragStart.y;

    if (state.strokeStartSnapshot) {
      const snapshot = state.strokeStartSnapshot;
      const center = { x: state.transformCenter.stageX, y: state.transformCenter.stageY };
      let options = {};
      let width = snapshot.width;

      if (state.transformAction === "rotate") {
        const angle = Math.atan2(p.clientY - state.transformCenter.y, p.clientX - state.transformCenter.x);
        options.rotate = (angle - state.transformCenter.startAngle) * 180 / Math.PI;
      } else if (["nw", "ne", "sw", "se"].includes(state.transformAction)) {
        const vector = { x: p.clientX - state.transformCenter.x, y: p.clientY - state.transformCenter.y };
        const start = state.transformCenter.startVector;
        const startLengthSq = Math.max(144, start.x * start.x + start.y * start.y);
        const projectedScale = Math.max(.15, (vector.x * start.x + vector.y * start.y) / startLengthSq);
        options.scale = projectedScale;
        width = snapshot.width * projectedScale;
      } else {
        options.dx = dx;
        options.dy = dy;
      }

      setStrokeGeometry(state.dragTarget, transformPoints(snapshot.points, center, options), width);
      return;
    }

    if (state.transformAction === "rotate") {
      const center = state.transformCenter;
      const angle = Math.atan2(p.clientY - center.y, p.clientX - center.x);
      applyTransform(state.dragTarget, {
        ...state.elementStart,
        rotate: state.elementStart.rotate + ((angle - center.startAngle) * 180 / Math.PI)
      });
      return;
    }

    if (["nw", "ne", "sw", "se"].includes(state.transformAction)) {
      const center = state.transformCenter;
      const vector = { x: p.clientX - center.x, y: p.clientY - center.y };
      const start = center.startVector;
      const startLengthSq = Math.max(144, start.x * start.x + start.y * start.y);
      const projectedScale = (vector.x * start.x + vector.y * start.y) / startLengthSq;
      applyTransform(state.dragTarget, {
        ...state.elementStart,
        scale: state.elementStart.scale * Math.max(.15, projectedScale)
      });
      return;
    }

    applyTransform(state.dragTarget, {
      ...state.elementStart,
      x: state.elementStart.x + dx,
      y: state.elementStart.y + dy
    });
  }

  function endDrag(event) {
    if (!state.dragTarget) return;
    const target = state.dragTarget;
    target.classList.remove("is-dragging");
    const end = getTransform(target);
    if (state.strokeStartSnapshot) {
      const strokeAfter = strokeSnapshot(target);
      if (!sameStrokeSnapshot(state.strokeStartSnapshot, strokeAfter)) {
        pushHistory({ type: "strokeGeometry", el: target, from: state.strokeStartSnapshot, to: strokeAfter });
      }
    } else if (!sameTransform(end, state.elementStart)) {
      pushHistory({ type: "transform", el: target, from: state.elementStart, to: end });
    }
    state.dragTarget = null;
    state.dragStart = null;
    state.elementStart = null;
    state.strokeStartSnapshot = null;
    state.transformAction = null;
    state.transformCenter = null;
    document.body.classList.remove("selection-drag-active");
  }

  function keyboard(event) {
    const tag = document.activeElement?.tagName?.toLowerCase();
    const editingText = document.activeElement?.isContentEditable || tag === "input" || tag === "textarea";

    if ((event.ctrlKey || event.metaKey) && event.key.toLowerCase() === "z") {
      event.preventDefault();
      if (event.shiftKey) redo();
      else undo();
      return;
    }

    if (editingText && event.key === "Escape") {
      event.preventDefault();
      finishActiveEditing();
      return;
    }

    if (editingText) return;

    const key = event.key.toLowerCase();
    if (state.mode === "select" && state.selectedTarget) {
      const actions = {
        delete: "delete",
        backspace: "delete",
        arrowleft: "nudge-left",
        arrowright: "nudge-right",
        arrowup: "nudge-up",
        arrowdown: "nudge-down",
        "-": "scale-down",
        "_": "scale-down",
        "=": "scale-up",
        "+": "scale-up",
        "[": "rotate-left",
        "]": "rotate-right"
      };
      if (actions[key]) {
        event.preventDefault();
        transformSelected(actions[key]);
        return;
      }
    }

    if (key === "v") {
      event.preventDefault();
      setMode("select");
    }
    if (key === "p") {
      event.preventDefault();
      setMode("draw");
    }
    if (key === "t") {
      event.preventDefault();
      setMode("text");
    }
    if (key === "e") {
      event.preventDefault();
      if (event.shiftKey) toggleEraserKind();
      setMode("erase");
    }
  }

  ensureToolbar();
  setEraserKind("partial");
  setMode("draw");

  /* Capture phase로 기존 캔버스 드로잉보다 먼저 처리 */
  stage.addEventListener("mousedown", releaseActiveEditorOnStage, true);
  stage.addEventListener("touchstart", releaseActiveEditorOnStage, { passive: false, capture: true });

  stage.addEventListener("mousedown", beginNewDraw, true);
  stage.addEventListener("mousemove", moveNewDraw, true);
  window.addEventListener("mouseup", endNewDraw, true);
  stage.addEventListener("touchstart", beginNewDraw, { passive: false, capture: true });
  stage.addEventListener("touchmove", moveNewDraw, { passive: false, capture: true });
  window.addEventListener("touchend", endNewDraw, true);

  stage.addEventListener("click", stageClickText, true);

  stage.addEventListener("mousedown", beginDrag, true);
  stage.addEventListener("mousemove", moveDrag, true);
  window.addEventListener("mouseup", endDrag, true);
  stage.addEventListener("touchstart", beginDrag, { passive: false, capture: true });
  stage.addEventListener("touchmove", moveDrag, { passive: false, capture: true });
  window.addEventListener("touchend", endDrag, true);

  stage.addEventListener("mousedown", beginErase, true);
  stage.addEventListener("mousemove", moveErase, true);
  window.addEventListener("mouseup", endErase, true);
  stage.addEventListener("mouseleave", hideEraserCursor);
  stage.addEventListener("touchstart", beginErase, { passive: false, capture: true });
  stage.addEventListener("touchmove", moveErase, { passive: false, capture: true });
  window.addEventListener("touchend", endErase, true);

  window.addEventListener("keydown", keyboard);
  window.addEventListener("resize", updateSelectionTools);
  window.addEventListener("scroll", updateSelectionTools, true);

  clearBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
    selectElement(null);
    svg.innerHTML = "";
    layer.querySelectorAll(".mode-text-note").forEach(el => el.remove());
    state.undo = [];
    state.redo = [];
  });
})();


/* v24-6 emotion tool usability refinements */
(function () {
  const body = document.body;

  function blurActiveEditable() {
    const active = document.activeElement;
    const tag = active?.tagName?.toLowerCase();
    if (active && (active.isContentEditable || tag === "input" || tag === "textarea")) {
      active.blur();
      if (active.isContentEditable) {
        const selection = window.getSelection();
        if (selection) selection.removeAllRanges();
      }
    }
  }

  /* 텍스트 편집 중에는 Adobe 계열처럼 Esc로 편집 종료 후 도구 단축키 사용 */
  window.addEventListener("keydown", (event) => {
    const active = document.activeElement;
    const tag = active?.tagName?.toLowerCase();
    const isEditable = active && (active.isContentEditable || tag === "input" || tag === "textarea");

    if (!body.classList.contains("view-emotion")) return;

    if (isEditable && event.key === "Escape") {
      event.preventDefault();
      blurActiveEditable();
      return;
    }

    /*
      텍스트 편집 중 V/P/T를 누르면 글자로 입력되는 문제가 있어서,
      Alt + V/P/T 또는 Esc 후 V/P/T로 도구 변경되도록 보정.
      Photoshop/Illustrator처럼 텍스트 편집 상태를 먼저 종료하는 흐름에 가깝게 처리.
    */
    if (isEditable && event.altKey) {
      const key = event.key.toLowerCase();
      const modeMap = { v: "select", p: "draw", t: "text" };
      if (modeMap[key]) {
        event.preventDefault();
        blurActiveEditable();
        const btn = document.querySelector(`[data-tool-group="mode"] [data-mode="${modeMap[key]}"]`);
        btn?.click();
      }
    }
  }, true);

  /* 툴 패널의 버튼을 누를 때 텍스트 편집 커서가 남아 있어서 모드 전환이 막히지 않게 */
  document.addEventListener("mousedown", (event) => {
    if (!body.classList.contains("view-emotion")) return;
    if (event.target.closest(".emotion-tool-panel button")) {
      blurActiveEditable();
    }
  }, true);

  /* 패널이 너무 빠르게 닫히지 않도록 클릭 시 잠깐 열림 상태 유지 */
  document.addEventListener("click", (event) => {
    const panel = document.querySelector(".emotion-tool-panel");
    if (!panel) return;
    if (event.target.closest(".emotion-tool-panel button")) {
      panel.classList.add("is-open");
      setTimeout(() => panel.classList.remove("is-open"), 900);
    }
  });
})();

</script>
</body>
</html>
